title: Client Services Liaison
description:
About the Role

Our firm is seeking a Client Services Liaison to serve as the welcoming voice and primary point

of contact for prospective and current clients. This role is essential in managing incoming leads,

guiding potential clients through our intake process, and helping convert inquiries into retained

clients.



The ideal candidate is personable, organized, and confident in communicating with individuals

who may be navigating important legal planning decisions. This role requires a client-first

mindset, strong communication skills, and the ability to build trust quickly. Experience working

in a law firm or familiarity with trust and estates is highly preferred.



Key Responsibilities

- Serve as the first point of contact for prospective and current clients.

- Respond to and manage incoming leads through phone,
, and other communication channels.

- Guide prospects through the firm’s intake process and introduce them to our services.

- Build rapport with potential clients and help convert qualified leads into retained clients.

- Schedule consultations and coordinate appointments with attorneys and team members.

- Maintain organized client records and communications throughout the intake process.

- Conduct timely follow-ups with leads and clients to ensure a positive experience.

- Utilize platforms such as Calendly, Dialpad, Lawmatics, or similar applications to manage scheduling, calls, and client intake.

- Work collaboratively with attorneys and staff to ensure a smooth client onboarding process.



Qualifications

- Excellent communication and interpersonal skills.

- Sales experience or strong ability to build relationships and convert leads.

- Professional, friendly, and client-focused demeanor.

- Experience working in a law firm or familiarity with trust and estates practice is highly preferred.

- Proficiency with CRM, scheduling, and communication tools such as Calendly, Dialpad, Lawmatics, or similar systems.

- Highly organized with strong attention to detail.

- Ability to communicate with empathy and professionalism when handling sensitive matters.



What We Value

- A welcoming and positive attitude

- Strong listening skills and emotional intelligence

- Professionalism and discretion

- Reliability and attention to detail

- Commitment to providing exceptional client service.

title: Front-End Software Developer (Android)
description:
Your contributions take flight to save lives and protect both our communities and our country.



WHO WE ARE 

Flyhound is a cutting-edge drone payload company focused on public safety. We specialize in the rapid detection and localization of individuals honing on their mobile phones. Our mission is simple but powerful: help first responders in finding people in emergencies to save lives. 

WHAT WE’RE LOOKING FOR

We are seeking a talented Front-End Software Developer (mid-level) to lead the development of our end-user software product on an Android tablet platform that visually displays data received from our airborne payload solution. You will work closely with the founding team and play a pivotal role in the design, implementation, and optimization of the embedded system software architecture.

This role requires expertise in building robust, high-performance software for large-screen format devices where real-time data flow is essential. As the software lead, you will take ownership of building a new application from the ground up, ensuring seamless data transmission between the airborne payload and the ground-based front-end application. While the drone’s control is independent, your focus will be on displaying data received from the airborne payload on the application including unique IDs of individuals as well as GPS coordinates to be displayed as interactive pins.  

This role demands a proactive, innovative problem-solver who is comfortable making strategic decisions and implementing best practices in software development, all while contributing to the broader technical vision of the company.

KEY REPONSIBILITIES 

• Lead the design, implementation, and optimization of our frond-end application for Android tablets.

• Manage data flow from airborne payload to ground-based front-end application in real-time.

• Display data including unique IDs and GPS coordinates as interactive pins on a map that can be stored and accessed offline as our use-case requires offline capability.

• Ensure software modularity, scalability, and support for over-the-air (OTA) updates.

• Establish and maintain best practices for software development and team collaboration.



WHAT’S REQUIRED



• Relevant experience or education in Computer Science, Electrical Engineering, or a related field.

• Proven experience with Android programming through Kotlin and other cross-platform languages.

• Strong problem-solving skills.



Key Attributes for Success:

• Entrepreneurial spirit: You will be working closely with the founding team, so it is crucial to be comfortable taking initiative, adapting to evolving challenges, and contributing creatively to the company’s growth.

• Innovative problem-solver: Capable of anticipating issues and independently developing effective solutions with minimal guidance.

• Collaborative team player: Strong interpersonal skills and a passion for working together to build a product that delivers real-world impact.

• Flexible and adaptable: Able to thrive in a dynamic, fast-paced startup environment, embracing change and quickly adjusting to new directions when needed.



THE OTHER STUFF 

Flyhound is based in Syracuse, USA and the role is fully remote and intended for hire within the Philippines.

title: Google sheets data entry
description:
I need someone that is ultra organized, that is a pro with google sheets/data entry, & wants some very part time work that is extremely flexible on your own time. 



Overview - 



I give you access to a text group where all apartment rental payment receipts from all properties are submitted, and tagged with the property, and unit # throughout the month. (180-220 units) 



You then input the rent amount into google sheets under the right property, unit #, month, & then create a journal entry comment which is time stamped, & provides a paper trail. 



You then check off the photo of the receipt in the rent receipt text group indicating that you've filed this payment. 



I have a bookkeeper that uses this same text rent group, that files the same payments with the actual photos of the receipts into my accounting software.



 - At the beginning of the month, we match up the rents inputted into google sheets, with the rents submitted into the accounting software to ensure they balance, & find the discrepancies if any exist. 



This is all I am really looking for, however, if you are comfortable on the phone talking to customers, & have operations/task management/property management experience, I may be able to provide more opportunity, if you have open availability including, but not limited to - 







Tracking unpaid rents, calling tenants to get updates on when rent will be paid, & Managing/update delinquency lists 

photo receipt filing 

Logging task requests in a Ringcentral text group, and transferring to trello 

Call/text handling and routing 

Research - products/services/laws/contractors/ect 

Social media marketing 

Creating/organizing folders/files 

Bookkeeping via REIHUB & attaching receipts 

Google sheets payment submission

title: B2B Lead Generation VA — Cold Email & Outreach
description:
ABOUT THE COMPANY

SPOR Group is a UK-based AV technology company. We design, install, and manage meeting room technology for enterprise clients across the UK, Europe, and the US. We manage 1,500+ meeting rooms for 200+ companies and run a proprietary remote monitoring platform called SPORTrack.

We work with large organisations — think 500–5,000 person companies where the IT Director or Facilities Manager is responsible for making sure meetings actually work. That's our client.

We're growing fast and we need a detail-oriented, proactive VA to own our outbound lead generation operation week in, week out.



THE ROLE

This is a B2B lead generation role. Your job is to keep our cold outreach pipeline full and running smoothly so that our founder can focus on calls and closing deals.

You will NOT be doing the selling. You will be building the lists, setting up the sequences, managing replies in the CRM, and making sure the whole system runs like clockwork every week.

This is a long-term role with room to grow. If you're good at this, we'll give you more responsibility and more hours over time.



WHAT YOU'LL BE DOING

List Building (weekly)



Search Wiza for new prospects matching our ICP (enterprise Facilities Managers and IT Directors at 500–5,000 person companies in the UK and Europe)

Export and clean prospect lists (100–200 contacts per week)

Run all
 addresses through a verification tool (NeverBounce or ZeroBounce) before import

Remove duplicates and cross-check against existing HubSpot contacts



Sequence Management (weekly)



Import verified lists into Instantly.ai and enrol them in the correct
 sequence

Monitor open rates, reply rates, and bounce rates — flag anything that looks off

Pause sequences or individual contacts as directed



CRM Management (weekly)



Log all new contacts in HubSpot with the correct source, tags, and properties

Update contact stages when replies come in (Leads ? Appointments ? Presentations)

Create follow-up tasks for the founder when positive replies arrive

Keep the pipeline clean — no stale contacts, no missing data



LinkedIn Outreach (weekly)



Send 20–25 connection requests per day to ICP prospects

Monitor who has accepted and log in HubSpot

Send follow-up DMs using provided templates (with light personalisation)



Trigger Event Research (weekly)



Monitor Google Alerts and LinkedIn for office move announcements, new senior hires, and AV-related job postings at target companies

Compile a short weekly report of the top 5–10 priority targets and why



Reporting (weekly)



Send a brief weekly summary every Friday:
s sent, open rate, reply rate, new leads added to HubSpot, LinkedIn connections sent/accepted





WHAT WE'RE LOOKING FOR

Must have:



At least 1 year of experience in B2B lead generation or outbound sales support

Hands-on experience with Wiza or a similar prospecting tool (Hunter, Lusha, etc.)

Familiarity with cold
 sequencing tools (Instantly, Lemlist, Woodpecker, or similar)

Experience using a CRM — HubSpot preferred, but Salesforce or Pipedrive is fine

Strong English — written and verbal. You'll be writing personalised outreach messages.

Extremely organised and self-directed. This role runs on systems and consistency.

Reliable internet connection and dedicated workspace



Nice to have:



Experience in AV, IT, facilities management, or B2B tech sectors

Familiarity with LinkedIn Sales Navigator

Experience with Clay.com or other enrichment tools

Previous work with a UK or US-based company





WHAT THIS JOB IS NOT



This is not a customer service role

This is not a social media management role

This is not a data entry role where you just follow a checklist blindly — we need someone who thinks and flags problems





HOURS AND SCHEDULE



Part-time to start: 20 hours per week

Flexible schedule, but you must be available for a weekly check-in call (UK time, typically Monday morning)

Potential to move to full-time as the role grows

Long-term position — we are not looking for someone for a one-off project





PAY



Starting rate: $5–$8 USD per hour depending on experience

Reviewed after 90 days





HOW TO APPLY

Please do not send a generic application. We will not read it.

Instead, answer these three questions in your application message:



What prospecting or sequencing tools have you used before, and what did you use each one for?

Describe a lead generation process you've run before — what was the ICP, how did you build the list, and what results did it produce?

What's your process for keeping a CRM clean and up to date?



Applications that don't answer these questions will not be considered.



A NOTE FROM THE FOUNDER

I'm Chris. I run SPOR Group. I'm looking for someone I can trust to own this process and run it without me having to chase them. If you're the kind of person who takes initiative, spots problems before they become disasters, and takes pride in doing things properly — we'll get along fine.

I'm not looking for perfect. I'm looking for reliable, smart, and hungry to learn.

 you!

title: Full-Time Virtual Assistant (Customer Support + Estimating) | Long-Term Role | ?46k–?59k/month
description:
Join One of the Fastest-Growing Painting Companies in the Midwest

This role includes answering customer calls and assisting with preparing painting estimates using Google Maps measurements.



Nebraska Elite Painting is a growing painting company based in Omaha, Nebraska. As we continue expanding, we’re looking for a reliable and detail-oriented Virtual Assistant to help support operations, communicate with customers, and assist with estimating projects.



This is a long-term, stable position with a growing company.



Work Schedule



Monday – Friday

8:00 AM – 5:00 PM CST

(1 hour unpaid lunch)



Long-Term Opportunity



We are looking for someone who wants a stable, long-term role, not a short-term project.



Nebraska Elite Painting is growing quickly, and the right person can stay with us for many years if it’s a good fit for both sides.



We value reliability, loyalty, and people who want to grow with the company.



Pay



?46,000 – ?59,000 per month depending on experience and performance.



To Apply



Please send a short video (camera ON) answering the questions below to:







Applications without a video will not be considered.



When sending your application, include the word “Precision” in the subject line.



Video Questions



Briefly tell us about your past work experience.



What excites you most about this role with Nebraska Elite Painting?



What motivates you in your work and career?



Tell me about a time accuracy was extremely important in your work. What did you do to avoid mistakes?



Compensation Question



In your
, please also answer the following:



What was your hourly or monthly pay in your most recent role, and what are your compensation expectations for this position?



Position Overview



This role combines customer service, scheduling, sales support, and estimating assistance.



A key part of this job will be learning how to measure homes remotely using tools like Google Maps and input those measurements into our estimating system.



You will be trained to prepare painting estimates from your computer, which will help support our operations and scheduling.



You must be comfortable learning new skills, working with numbers, and being precise with measurements and details.



Key Responsibilities

Customer Communication



• Answer inbound calls from customers

• Help schedule painting estimate appointments

• Follow up with leads via phone, text, and

• Provide friendly and professional customer service



Scheduling & Operations



• Manage estimate scheduling and calendar coordination

• Communicate with painters regarding job schedules

• Call in paint orders when needed

• Handle customer questions and reschedules



Estimating Support



• Measure homes online using Google Maps

• Input measurements into our estimating system

• Assist with preparing and sending quotes

• Track estimate follow-ups



Over time you will be trained to prepare full estimates independently from your computer.



Lead Management



• Track incoming leads and estimate requests

• Maintain organized spreadsheets and CRM records



Marketing Support



• Assist with light social media posting

• Engage with customers online when needed



Qualifications



• Excellent written and spoken English

• Strong attention to detail and accuracy

• Confident and friendly on the phone

• Comfortable using spreadsheets and Google Drive

• Self-motivated and organized

• Able to learn systems and follow instructions carefully



Work Environment Requirements



• Reliable high-speed internet

• Quiet workspace for phone calls

• Quality headset or microphone

• Ability to work full schedule without distractions



Availability



This is a full-time position. We are looking for someone who can dedicate their full work schedule to this role and is not actively working multiple full-time jobs during these hours.



We are hiring immediately and look forward to meeting great candidates.

title: On-Demand Virtual Assistant for Research and Practical Tasks
description:
Hey! I’m looking for a reliable virtual assistant I can message on 
 whenever something comes up.



This is an on-demand role, not a full-time position. Some weeks I may send a few tasks, and other times there may be a gap. I’m looking for someone who is comfortable with that and can pick things up quickly when needed.



Most tasks will involve research, comparisons, finding local services, sourcing products, and preparing simple outreach.



Examples of tasks:



* Find the 3 best AI note taker apps for my use case and compare pricing, features, and downsides

* Find the best dentist, clinic, or other local provider near me in Katowice

* If I need to go somewhere physically, include the link, address, opening hours, distance, and where the entrance is if possible

* Find the closest practical option when speed matters, such as a print shop nearby

* Find all authorized CFMOTO dealers within a reasonable distance from Katowice

* Work out the right questions to ask before buying a motorcycle

* Turn those questions into a short, professional
 and find the correct contact details



What I’m looking for:



* Strong online research skills

* Clear written English

* Good judgment and common sense

* Someone who can think and recommend, not just send links

* Detail-oriented and reliable

* Comfortable with irregular task flow



I do not want long reports. I value concise, useful answers that make the next step obvious.



To apply, please include:



* a short intro

* your hourly rate

* a few examples of similar work

* the word Katowice at the top of your application



Looking forward to hearing from you and finding the right fit.

description:

This role will create multimedia content that highlights professional expertise, wellness, style, and empowerment while building a strong digital presence across social media platforms.

Key Responsibilities





Content Development

Develop storytelling content that highlights professional journeys, lifestyle, and empowerment



Produce educational healthcare content that is accessible to the public



Create short-form and long-form content for digital platforms

TikTok



YouTube



LinkedIn






Schedule and publish content using social media management tools



Monitor engagement and respond to audience interactions

Partner with brands for product reviews, styling content, and collaborations

Healthcare Education

Translate complex healthcare topics into simple, engaging content



Share information on:



preventative health



healthcare leadership



nurse practitioner insights



patient education



wellness trends







Brand Building

Support development of a personal brand and media presence



Collaborate on campaigns, partnerships, and sponsorship opportunities



Maintain brand voice and visual identity







Production

Film, edit, and produce content including:



reels



short videos



podcasts



interviews



behind-the-scenes content



Assist with photography and creative direction



Qualifications

Experience creating social media or digital content



Knowledge of fashion, lifestyle, or healthcare content



Strong storytelling and communication skills



Familiarity with video editing software (CapCut, Adobe Premiere, Canva, etc.)



Understanding of social media analytics and growth strategies



Ability to maintain professional healthcare ethics and compliance



Preferred Qualifications

Background in healthcare, nursing, or wellness



Experience working with influencers, brands, or media platforms



Photography or videography experience



Knowledge of personal branding and influencer marketing



Skills

Creative storytelling



Video production



Social media strategy



Brand development



Audience engagement



Trend analysis



Work Environment

Hybrid / Remote



Event coverage, photoshoots, and brand collaborations



Flexible creative schedule



Opportunities





This role offers opportunities to grow within a fashion, healthcare, and lifestyle media brand, contributing to digital media expansion, partnerships, and brand influence.





Healthcare & Lifestyle Media Director



Medical Lifestyle Content Creator



Healthcare Fashion Influencer



Executive Brand Content Creator



Nurse Practitioner Lifestyle Creator

Role Overview

We are seeking a proactive and detail-oriented part-time bookkeeper to join our remote team. The ideal candidate will have a strong understanding of Australian bookkeeping practices and experience working with short-term rental (Airbnb-style) businesses.

• High attention to detail and accuracy

• Strong English communication skills (written and verbal)

• Proficient in Excel and Google Sheets

• Reliable internet connection and ability to work independently



Please respond to this job post with a subject title  "(full name and all contact information)."

 

Send your resume and cover letter at faithful stays.

title: Expert Etsy Shop Manager – Digital Products Specialist (SEO & Canva)
description:
OVERVIEW:

I am looking for a results-driven, highly organized Full-Time Etsy Expert (8 hours/day) to help launch and scale 3 digital product shops. This is a long-term position for someone who understands that Etsy success is a mix of Data-Driven SEO and High-Quality Design.

YOUR RESPONSIBILITIES:

• Market Research: Perform deep research using tools like eRank, Alura, or Marmalead to identify high-demand, low-competition digital niches.

• Product Creation: Design high-converting digital templates, journals, or guides using Canva (professional level only).

• Advanced SEO: Craft optimized titles, 13 strategic tags, and compelling descriptions to rank on Page 1.

• Listing Management: Create and upload 3-5 premium listings daily across the shops.

• Customer Support: Manage all inquiries professionally and maintain "Star Seller" status.

• Shop Optimization: Constant A/B testing of thumbnails/mockups to increase Click-Through Rate (CTR).

REQUIREMENTS:

• Proven Experience: At least 2 years of managing Etsy shops for Digital Products.

• Software Mastery: Expert-level skills in Canva and Etsy SEO tools.

• Design Eye: Ability to create "scroll-stopping" mockups that look professional and clean.

• English: Excellent written English for copywriting and customer service.

• Integrity: 100% original work. No copyright infringement or copying other sellers.

SALARY & BENEFITS:

• Base Salary: $600 - $800 USD per month (based on experience).

• Performance Bonus: Monthly bonuses based on shop sales/profit milestones.

• Stability: Long-term employment with growth opportunities.

HOW TO APPLY:

1. Start your application with the word "GREEN" so I know you read the full description.

2. Send links or screenshots of Etsy shops/listings you have managed or designed.

3. Briefly explain your process for finding a winning keyword

title: Video Editor (In House)
description:
Hello!

I run a Real Estate Media company in the United States. We are looking to bring our video editing in-house and add someone to our team.

There are many large editing companies, but they have big teams and different editors working on each project. Because of this, the quality and style can change every time. We want to work with one editor who can become part of our team and help us create a consistent style across all of our videos.

We specialize in high-end real estate video and are known as one of the highest quality media creators in our area. We are looking for someone who enjoys being creative, follows new trends in real estate video, and is comfortable giving suggestions. We also appreciate feedback about how we can improve on the filming side.

We see this as a team relationship, and we want the editor to feel like an important part of our crew.

Good communication is very important, so the ideal candidate should be comfortable communicating in English.



Editing Software:

Final Cut Pro is preferred, but not required.

DaVinci Resolve or Adobe Premiere are also perfectly fine.

We also create talking-head style ads for real estate agents.

We are looking for someone familiar with:

Current real estate video editing trends

Color grading LOG footage (currently C-Log3)

Creative transitions and masking transitions

Higgsfield AI (mainly for AI virtual staging and day-to-night effects — not heavy VFX)

Basic sound design

Premium captions and masking

We are hoping to bring someone on soon, as our busy season is coming up.



Test Edit:

A test edit is required as part of the application.

Below is a link to the RAW footage from a recent shoot.

Please create a 30–45 second edit to show your style and creativity. You do not need to create a full video.

We want to see:

Your color grading

Your music choice

Your sound design

Your creativity with transitions and shots

Have fun with it!

Please
 a link to your completed test edit when submitting your application.



Video Instructions:



Property Address:

123 Main Street

Scranton, PA 18434



Editing style:

Cinematic look and feel

Color grading is very important

Deeper shadows are okay if it creates a moody cinematic look



Please include:

At least one day-to-night transition

At least one door opening transition

Use as many or as few clips as you want from the link below. The goal is simply to show your creativity and editing style.



RAW footage Link:

title: Brand Strategist - Financial Education & Social Impact
description:
[Remote]



About the Organization: Native Finance Development Corporation (NFDC) is a California-based non-government entity dedicated to economic sovereignty of American Indian tribes and 7-generation stewardship. We are architecting an emerging Community Development Finance Institution and pioneering the first accredited pathway for Native financial professionals.



Our work addresses the complex intersection of Indian Tax and Sovereign Law-specialized knowledge that permeats all aspects of tribal wealth management. In 2025, we launched the nation's first accredited high school personal finance course for Native American youths. Our technological innovation, an offline, idle sim game, was a semifinalist in both 2024 and 2025 MIT Solve's Global Challenge. 



Led by a Harvard alumna and multi-credentialed expert (Certified Financial Planner™, EA, RIA and licensed insurance agent), NFDC seeks to transition its brand from a series of initiatives into a unified, national authority on indigenous finance.



The Mission



We are seeking a high-level Brand Strategist to unify our diverse initiatives into one "Uniform, Advanced strategy." You will bridge the gap between technical financial planning and indigenous community impact, ensuring our brand feels both authoritative and visionary.



Hard Skills (Technical Requirements)

Brand Architecture: Ability to build a "brand house" that fits together federal grants, professional development programs, and mobile gaming apps.



Strategic Copywriting: Crafting high-stakes narratives for social impact investors and global forums (MIT Solve, etc.).



Visual Governance: Expertise in defining typography, color theory, and UI/UX standards that translate across strategy decks and digital tools.



Asset Management: Experience using tools like Canva, Adobe Creative Suite, or Figma to maintain a unified brand library.



Soft Skills (Who You Are)

Sovereignty-Minded: You understand (or are eager to learn) the principles of indigenous economic sovereignty.



Technical Translator: You can take dense financial or grant-related data and turn it into a clear, sophisticated story.



Proactive Leader: You solve problems before they reach the CEO's desk and thrive with minimal supervision.



Detail-Oriented: You notice the small inconsistencies that others miss.



Key Responsibilities

Unify the Persona: Create a single "Institutional Voice" for NFDC that works for both local community leaders and global investors.



2035 Visioning: Align brand messaging with our long-term "Pathway to 10,000 Professionals" initiative.



Presentation Support: Refine strategy decks, conference proposals (e.g., Oweesta, Harvard Ideas), and board-level advocacy materials.



Product Branding: Establish the identity for our "Personal Finance + 7 Generations" course and its nationwide rollout.



How to Apply (READ CAREFULLY)



We value attention to detail above all else. To be considered for this role:



Send a message with the subject line: "Stewardship Matters: [Your Name] for Brand Strategy Director".



Include a link to your Portfolio (must show brand strategy or identity systems, not just individual graphics).



Answer this question: In 2 sentences, how would you describe the "vibe" of a brand that represents both high-level finance and indigenous conservation?



Mention your current Internet Speed and PC Specifications.

title: Property Management VA
description:
We are looking for a sharp, organised Virtual Assistant to support our growing property portfolio. If you have a background in property management and are reliable and responsive, we’d love to hear from you.



The Role:



You will be the first point of contact for our daily operations, acting as the primary liaison for tenants and tradespeople. Your goal is to ensure the smooth running of our properties while maintaining high standards of communication and documentation.

Hours: Up to 5 hours per day (Monday–Saturday).

Timezone: Must be fully available during UK Business Hours (GMT/BST).

Location: 100% Remote.



Key Responsibilities:



Communication: Handle inbound and outbound queries from tenants and contractors via
, phone, or messaging platforms.

Maintenance Coordination: Being reactive in liaising with tradespeople and the tenants to schedule repairs and ensuring jobs are completed to a high standard.

Documentation: Managing rent records, compliance docs, and property files using Google Suite (Docs, Sheets, Drive).

Admin Support: General administrative tasks to keep the portfolio organized and compliant.



Requirements:



Experience: Proven background in UK Property Management.

HMO Knowledge: Experience managing Houses in Multiple Occupation (HMOs) is a significant advantage.

Tech Savvy: Expert-level proficiency in Google Suite.

Communication: Exceptional written and verbal English skills with a professional yet friendly tone.

Reliability: You are highly responsive and take pride in "owning" tasks from start to finish.

Software (Bonus): Experience using Xero for basic reconciliation or invoicing is a major plus.



Why Work With Us?

We value clear communication and a long-term working relationship. You’ll be treated as a key member of the team with a consistent workflow and the autonomy to manage your tasks effectively.



How to Apply:

If you are interested in this position, please confirm your interest, and we will provide you with the application form.

title: Part-Time YouTube Video Editor (Long Form + Shorts)
description:
We are looking for a part-time YouTube editor to help produce content for a growing personal YouTube channel called The Corner.



The channel focuses on topics such as:



• Personal growth  

• Faith and life experiences  

• Business and productivity  

• Internet culture and opportunities  

• Conversations and interviews  



The goal of the channel is to share thoughtful long-form content and build a community around meaningful ideas and experiences.



We are looking for someone who can help turn raw footage into engaging videos that people enjoy watching.



--------------------------------------------------



Editing Expectations



You will be responsible for editing:



• 1–2 long form YouTube videos per week  

• 5–10 YouTube Shorts per week



The editing style should be clean, natural, and story-focused, not overly flashy.



Focus on:



• Strong pacing  

• Removing unnecessary moments  

• Adding simple text or graphics where helpful  

• Keeping viewer attention throughout the video  



For long form videos, the first 30 seconds are very important. We want strong hooks and highlights that make people want to keep watching.



--------------------------------------------------



Responsibilities



• Edit long form YouTube videos  

• Create short form clips from longer videos  

• Improve pacing and structure of videos  

• Add background music where appropriate  

• Add text or simple graphics when helpful  

• Export videos ready for YouTube upload  



Bonus if you can also:



• Suggest improvements to content structure  

• Help identify strong short-form moments from long videos  



--------------------------------------------------



What We Are Looking For



• Experience editing long form YouTube content  

• Excellent English comprehension  

• Strong attention to detail  

• Reliable and communicates clearly  

• Comfortable receiving feedback  



We are looking for someone who wants to help improve the videos and grow the channel, not just complete tasks.



--------------------------------------------------



Working With Charles



Charles believes business should treat people well and operate like a team.



The goal is to build something meaningful without sacrificing the people involved in the process.



Team members are encouraged to share ideas, challenge assumptions, and help improve the work.



--------------------------------------------------



Compensation



This is a part-time position.



Monthly compensation will be:



$300 – $500 per month depending on performance and results.



--------------------------------------------------



Test Edit



Applicants may be asked to complete a short test edit.



The footage will involve a travel style video showing moments from trips between the United States and Puerto Rico.



The goal of the edit will be to keep the video playful and natural while focusing on storytelling and retention.



The first 30 seconds should highlight exciting moments from the video to improve viewer retention.



--------------------------------------------------



How to Apply



Please include:



1. Links to 2–3 videos you have edited

2. What editing software you use

3. Your internet speed

4. Your experience editing YouTube videos

5. Confirm that you have strong English comprehension



Applications without video examples will not be considered.



To confirm you read this entire job post, start your application with the word "Corner".

title: VA Needed to Review Website Quality, E-E-A-T, Spam vs Real Sites
description:
Hi, I’m looking for a detail-oriented virtual assistant with real experience in evaluating website quality. Your job will be to review lists of domains and determine whether each site is a genuine, high-quality website, a low-value site, or outright spam.



You should be comfortable assessing things like:

Content quality and originality

E-E-A-T signals (expertise, experience, authority, trust)

Whether a site is a real personal blog, brand, or just a low-value SEO site



As I'm looking for detail oriented candidates, please start your submission with the word "pitch" so I know you read this description. This will be ongoing work if we’re a good fit. I prefer candidates who’ve worked in SEO, content marketing, link building, or outreach before, but it's not a requirement. The point is to be able to tell quality sites from SEO spam sites.

title: AI Automation Developer (Python & Agentic Video Synthesis)
description:
We are looking for a Senior Python Engineer to build an autonomous video creation engine from the ground up. This system will not just use stock footage (Pixabay/Pexels) but will actively crawl digital channels for "real" footage and compound it based on a generated script and voiceover. You will be responsible for architecting a multi-agent system that handles research, asset sourcing, semantic matching, and programmatic video rendering.



Technical Requirements:



Backend: Advanced Python (FastAPI/Django) and asynchronous processing.



Orchestration: Experience with LangChain, CrewAI, or Pydantic Agents.



Video Processing: Proficiency in MoviePy (v2.0+) and FFmpeg.



Sourcing: Expert-level knowledge of yt-dlp, BeautifulSoup, and browser automation (Playwright/Selenium).



AI/ML: Integration with LLMs (GPT-4o/Gemini 2.0), ElevenLabs TTS, and Multimodal Embeddings (CLIP or TwelveLabs) for semantic video search.



Infrastructure: Deployment on AWS (Fargate/S3) or Kubernetes.



Main Tasks:



Develop a Crawler Agent to source relevant footage from YouTube and social channels using yt-dlp and RSS monitoring.



Implement a Semantic Matcher using CLIP or TwelveLabs to align sourced clips with specific sentences in a script.



Build a Programmatic Editor using MoviePy to sync voiceovers with visuals and apply transitions/overlays.

title: Real Estate Inside Sales Agent (ISA) – Lead Conversion + Google Business Optimization
description:
Real Estate Inside Sales Agent (ISA) – Lead Conversion + Google Business Optimization



We are hiring a motivated Inside Sales Agent to work with a Canadian real estate professional. This role focuses on calling internet leads, building relationships, and converting those leads into active buyers and sellers.



This is not just an appointment setting job. We are looking for someone who is motivated to develop strong sales skills, follow a proven training program, and help convert leads into real clients.



About Us

We are a growing real estate business based in Alberta, Canada serving Wetaskiwin, Leduc, and surrounding communities. We receive buyer and seller leads from online sources including our website and Google.



Training, scripts, and guidance will be provided to help you succeed.



Primary Responsibilities (Lead Conversion)



• Call new internet leads quickly after they register

• Build rapport and qualify buyers and sellers

• Convert interested prospects into active clients

• Schedule consultations for the agent when appropriate

• Transfer hot leads directly to the agent for a live conversation when available

• Follow up with leads who are not ready yet

• Update notes and client status inside our CRM

• Maintain consistent communication with prospects



Secondary Responsibilities (Google Business & SEO Support)



• Request Google reviews from past clients

• Post weekly updates on our Google Business Profile

• Upload listing photos and sold properties

• Help improve our local search presence in Wetaskiwin and Leduc

• Assist with simple Google SEO tasks to help generate more leads



What We Are Looking For



• Excellent spoken English

• Comfortable speaking on the phone daily

• Positive attitude and willingness to learn

• Ability to follow training and scripts

• Reliable internet connection and quiet workspace

• Experience with CRM systems preferred

• Experience with Google Business Profile or SEO is a bonus



Compensation



• $8–$10 USD per hour base pay depending on experience

• $20 bonus for each qualified appointment booked

• $500 bonus for each real estate deal that closes from your lead conversion



This role rewards people who are confident on the phone and motivated by performance bonuses.



Schedule



Full-time preferred. Must be available during Canadian daytime hours.



Training



We will provide training and guidance on how to communicate with real estate leads and convert them into clients.



Application Instructions



1. Send a short voice recording introducing yourself.

2. Briefly explain any experience with phone sales or lead follow-up.

3. Include the word “Wetaskiwin” in your application so we know you read the full job post.



Applicants without a voice recording will not be considered.

title: Assistant Property Manager
description:
INTRODUCTION: Hello! 
 (on IG). I'm an entrepreneur that started by buying rentals and is now developing houses by building and renovating in Nashville, TN. Now with ~35 units, I established a property management company (
) to manage them. My goal is 100 rental units, but to get there I need your help! I rely heavily on my team in place to keep things running smoothly so I can grow the company.



Location: Remote

Time Schedule: Business hours M - F in the U.S.A. (Overnight hours in the Philippines)

Compensation: $6-8/hr USD, paid bi-weekly via Onlinejobs.ph

Benefits: Paid USA bank holidays (~13 days) after trial period.



Job Summary:

Flywheel needs an APM to run the day to day business operations. You will report to me, Allan, for confirming outcome metrics and overcoming obstacles. You are the singular employee of Flywheel and play a critical role in its success!



The Perks:

    • Play a direct role in a growing local company and enjoy a distinct sense of satisfaction from seeing results that YOU made happen.

    • Enjoy autonomy of identifying and handling tasks using your own judgment, without micromanagement of a supervisor. 

    • Plenty of training provided to build on your existing experience and ensure your success!   



A Typical Week:

    • Receive notice of a tenant not renewing lease. Schedule contractor to begin turnover repairs.

    • Receive a maintenance request from a unit in the software, and forward to the appropriate vendor.

    • Follow up on certain tenants if rent not received on the 1st.

    • Run month-end reports and distribute to rental property owners.



Qualifications:

    • Read sections “Outcomes” & “Core Competencies” down below.

    • This job is not for a “first timer”. Only those with Property Management experience need apply.

    • Level of Completed Education: N/A

    • English Fluency: 4+ out of 5. Some accent is fine but must be easy to understand.



===============================================



Mission: To manage a rental property portfolio for maximum profitability, especially by turning vacancies quickly and handling repairs and maintenance requests quickly and cost-effectively.



Outcomes: Property Management 

    • Rent collections are at 100% by the end of each month (excluding detainer warrants).

    • Vacant units are filled in less than 3 weeks by getting units rent-ready, listing them, and screening tenants.

    • Global Vacancy stays at or below 5% on a trailing 30 day basis (different from the above in that low global vacancy means tenants are staying and renewing leases likely due to effective management)

    • All valid maintenance requests are completed within 7 days by quickly scheduling vendors and following up.

    • Recurring tasks are performed on time by completing each item in the SOP’s checklists (Ex: Interim inspections, monthly owner statements and distributions).

    • <24 hour response time on all property management-related
s, calls, & SMS. 



Core Competencies 						

    • Honesty & Integrity – Displays consistent, straightforward behavior. Always speaking in truth and not deception. Does not cut corners ethically.

    • Proactive problem solving – Tackles new problems using self-administered resources.

    • Own it – Sees tasks through to results (AKA tenacity or persistence) 

    • Assertiveness – Quick to take action, not afraid of conflict.

    • Checklist Aficionado - Thorough executor of to-do lists and SOPs.  

    • Professional Communication skills – Concise and clear via phone and written. Grammar is largely appropriate.

    • Intelligence –Retains information and thinks through tasks for optimum results at an above-average capability.

    • High Attention to Detail – Does not let details slip through the cracks by carefully keeping track of each one.

    • Work Ethic – Has no qualms about working many hours every day without dopamine distractions.

    • Computer Literate – Is comfortable with computer-based web applications.

    • Customer Service – Responds quickly to inquiries. Empathizing and moving them towards the goal.



TO APPLY: If you’ve read this far, show your attention to detail in your application: Add “FLYWHEEL” in all caps to the subject line (or title). Attach your resume and for a cover letter, use the application body to summarize your property management experience!

title: Appointment Setter – Inbound Lead Follow-Up (Remote)
description:
Appointment Setter – Inbound Lead Follow-Up (Remote)

$500 Base + Performance Bonus



We are hiring a reliable appointment setter to call warm inbound leads from our
 ads. These are HVAC business owners who submitted a form and are expecting a follow-up.



This role is simple and focuses on consistency. You must be able to respond quickly when a new lead comes in, follow a short script, and book a consultation if they qualify.



Requirements:

 • Clear, confident English (easily understood)

 • Comfortable speaking to business owners

 • Able to follow a simple script

 • Calm, steady tone (not robotic)

 • Quiet workspace and headset

 • Stable internet connection

 • Available during U.S. Eastern business hours

 • Fast response time (must call new leads within 2–5 minutes)

 • Looking for a long-term, stable position



(If you need constant supervision or respond slowly to messages, this role is not a fit.)



Job Details:

 • You will follow up with warm inbound leads, not cold calls

 • Calls made through PhoneBurner or similar system (we provide access)

 • Script and short training videos provided

 • Call volume is low (1–5 calls per day, sometimes none)

 • You must log call results and notes

 • Follow-up attempts required if there is no answer



This is an execution-based role. Reliability and consistency are important.



Performance Bonus:

 • $15 for every qualified booked appointment

 • Bonus capped at $100 per month



Pay:

 • $500 per month base salary

 • Up to $100 monthly bonus



Paid Trial (1 Week):



We will select two candidates for a 1-week paid trial ($25).

During the trial, we evaluate:

 • Response speed

 • Tone

 • Script accuracy

 • Call logs

 • Professionalism

 • Ability to follow instructions



One candidate will be selected for the long-term position.



How to Apply:



Send a message with:

 1. A 30–45 second voice recording reading the script below

 2. Your availability in U.S. EST time



Applications without all items will not be reviewed.



Script for Voice Recording:



Hi, is this Mickey?



Hey Mickey, this is Mark.



You filled out our
 form about getting more 
 installs, so I’m just calling to follow up.



Did I catch you at a good time?

title: Production Project Manager
description:
We are looking for a virtual video production project manager to help manage video and animation projects for our video marketing agency. The ideal candidate is the perfect blend of 1) high attention to detail and organization that can help manage projects as a go-between between customer requests &
s and freelancers & editors, 2) a digital project management guru who can help engineer a ClickUp system to track projects and deadlines, make sure tasks are assigned with deadlines, and organize assets & communication, and 3) has a good video/design eye that can help source pre-production inspiration, mood board assets, review freelancer work, etc.



We are looking to start part time, but based on our need, and the value you bring to our business, we may be open to full-time in the next couple months. 



Specific tasks and responsibilities will include:

Following all customer
 communication and assigning tasks and deadlines to projects & freelancers.

Managing Click-Up project management top to bottom.

Voiceover sourcing, hiring, and managing

Casting Assistant: putting out casting calls, managing casting submission, and putting together talent decks for clients.

Location Scouting: sourcing online websites to find potential locations for live-shoots and putting together decks for clients.

Concept Development: Collecting potential "reference videos" as inspiration options, using ChatGPT to source potential concepts, etc. 



Most important job skills are: 1) high attention to detail, 2) excellent project management (using ClickUp), and 3) good eye for design.



Other attractive skills are basic video editing experience, experience working in video production or marketing agency, and ability to work on US time zone.

title: Senior Accounting & Billing Coordinator  (Remote) – Healthcare Operations
description:
Evergreen Rehab & Wellness | Greater Vancouver, BC, Canada



About Evergreen Rehab & Wellness 



Evergreen Rehab & Wellness is a leading multidisciplinary healthcare organization serving the 

Greater Vancouver area, with clinics located in Coquitlam, Surrey, Langley, and Burnaby 

(Brentwood). 



With a 4.9/5.0 patient satisfaction rating and a growing team of 70+ healthcare practitioners, 

we provide integrated healthcare services including: 

? Physiotherapy 

? Chiropractic Care 

? Registered Massage Therapy 

? Naturopathic Medicine 

? Kinesiology 

? Rehabilitation & Wellness Services

 

As our organization continues to grow, we are expanding our finance and operations team to 

support the increasing complexity of our clinics. 



Position Overview 



We are seeking a Senior Accounting & Billing Coordinator to support the financial operations 

of our healthcare clinics. 



This role is responsible for overseeing key accounting functions including billing reconciliation, 

financial reporting, contractor payment processing, insurance payment tracking, and 

operational financial analysis. 



The ideal candidate has strong accounting knowledge, high attention to detail, and experience 

managing financial workflows in a fast-paced organization. 



This position will work closely with clinic management and leadership to ensure financial 

accuracy, operational efficiency, and compliance with healthcare billing procedures. 



Key Responsibilities 

1. Insurance Billing & Revenue Monitoring 

? Monitor claim submissions for private insurance providers

? Track unsubmitted claims 

2. Billing & Claims Processing 

? Submit WSBC Invoices; Initial Reports and Extension Reports

? Ensure billing documentation is accurate and compliant 

? Identify billing discrepancies and coordinate corrections with clinic teams 

3. Financial Reporting & Analysis 

Prepare recurring operational and financial reports including: 

? Monthly EBITDA analysis

? Revenue and payment reconciliation reports 

? Operational performance tracking 

? Financial summaries for clinic leadership 

4. Independent Contractor Accounting 

? Prepare semi-monthly Independent Contractor payroll payments

? Update practitioner payment records 

? Reconcile practitioner revenue with billing records 

5. Tax & Compliance Support 

? Compile quarterly GST summaries

? Maintain accurate financial documentation for accounting and tax reporting 

? Assist with financial records required for external accounting review 

6. Insurance Payment Reconciliation 

? Monitor payments received from private insurers 

? Identify missing, delayed, or incorrect payments 

? Maintain organized payment tracking records 

7. Patient Scheduling Monitoring 

? Monitor unscheduled patients who have not booked recommended follow-up visits 

? Coordinate with clinic reception teams to support patient follow-up scheduling 

? Assist in maintaining continuity of patient care 



Compensation & Benefits 

? Full-time position (40 hours per week)

? Competitive monthly salary 

? 13th-month bonus after 12 months of successful employment 

? Fully remote work environment

? Professional development opportunities 

? Opportunity to grow within a fast-growing healthcare organization



Required Qualifications 

? 3–5+ years of accounting, finance, or billing experience

? Strong proficiency in Microsoft Excel and financial reporting

? Excellent attention to detail and analytical skills

? Strong English communication skills 

? Ability to manage financial workflows independently in a remote environment 

? Experience managing accounts receivable and financial reconciliation



Preferred Qualifications 

? Experience in healthcare accounting or clinic billing

? Familiarity with Jane App or healthcare practice management systems

? Knowledge of ICBC, WorkSafeBC (WSBC), and private insurance billing processes

? Experience working with independent contractor compensation structures

? Multilingual abilities (Korean, Mandarin/Chinese, French, or Farsi) are considered an 

asset 



Work Environment 

? 100% remote role

? Structured onboarding and training 

? Support from the VA Manager and leadership team

? Collaborative and supportive team environment 

? Opportunities for long-term career growth

title: Cold Email Outreach Specialist (Instantly.ai Setup + Training)
description:
This is not a done-for-you outreach job.



I’m looking for someone experienced with Instantly.ai who can set up the system with me and teach me how to run cold
 campaigns myself.



My goal is to fully understand how to run outreach campaigns inside Instantly, including campaign setup, deliverability, and automation, so that once everything is configured, I can manage campaigns independently.



I’m looking for someone who can walk me through the process step-by-step on Zoom and help me build a clean, repeatable system.



This role is part consultant, part technical setup, and part training.



What I Need Help With



You should be comfortable helping with the following:



• Setting up outreach domains and inboxes

• Connecting
 accounts to Instantly

•
 warm-up configuration

• Campaign structure and sequencing

• Lead list importing and segmentation

• Writing or improving cold
 sequences

• Deliverability best practices

• Reply handling and campaign optimization

• Teaching the overall system so I can manage campaigns myself



The goal is to build a clean outreach system from scratch that I understand and can operate independently.



Ideal Candidate



I’m looking for someone who:



• Has extensive experience using Instantly.ai

• Understands cold
 deliverability and domain setup

• Has built multiple cold
 outreach campaigns

• Is comfortable teaching and explaining systems clearly

• Is very detailed and organized

• Speaks fluent English





Because this work involves multiple steps and configuration details, being detailed is extremely important. Remember the word, detailed.



How This Will Work



We will work together via Zoom to:



• Set up the outreach infrastructure

• Configure Instantly properly

• Build the first campaigns together

• Document the workflow so I can repeat it in the future



Once the system is built, I should be able to run outreach campaigns myself.



Experience Required



Please only apply if you have experience with:



• Instantly.ai

• Cold
 infrastructure

•
 deliverability

If you have examples of campaigns you’ve built, please include them.

title: META ADS MANAGER

 & Instagram) ad campaigns for multiple dental clients.

Your Main Role

Campaign Creation & Launch

Ad creatives

Copy variations

Audience segments

Offers

Comfortable working inside Meta Ads Manager daily

 Pixel, Datasets, CallRail, GA4, or GTM tracking

PTO + Sick Days

title: Real Estate Assistant
description:
Seeking Real Estate Assistant



Luxury Real Estate Advisory



I am seeking a highly organized, proactive Real Estate Assistant to support my growing luxury real estate advisory serving high-net-worth clients throughout Greater Vancouver.



This role begins part-time (15–20 hours per week) with the potential to grow into a full-time position after a successful probationary period.



You will be working closely with me as an experienced real estate advisor focused on delivering exceptional client service, advanced marketing strategies, and AI-driven systems to support buyers, sellers, and investors in the luxury property market.



This is an excellent opportunity for someone interested in real estate, marketing, and technology, with potential long-term growth into Marketing Manager or even a licensed real estate agent role.



?



About the Role



The Real Estate Assistant will support the daily operations of my modern real estate business, helping manage listings, marketing initiatives, CRM systems, and administrative workflows.



This role requires someone who is detail-oriented, tech-savvy, proactive, and comfortable working with digital tools such as CRM platforms, Canva, and AI applications.



You will play an important role in maintaining high standards of client service while supporting marketing and operational systems that help drive business growth.



?



Responsibilities



Real Estate Operations

 • Assist with listing input and updates

 • Schedule property showings and coordinate appointments

 • Coordinate open houses and property marketing activities

 • Conduct client follow-up communications

 • Support transaction coordination from listing through completion

 • Assist with preparation of Comparative Market Analyses (CMAs)



Marketing Support

 • Create listing graphics and marketing materials using Canva Pro

 • Design listing brochures and digital marketing assets

 • Assist with social media posts and content creation

 • Support video editing and digital marketing initiatives

 • Assist with
 marketing campaigns and newsletters



CRM & Lead Management

 • Maintain and organize contacts within BoldTrail

 • Tag and segment leads appropriately

 • Support drip campaign setup and management

 • Help manage CRM automations

 • Perform database cleanup and organization



AI & Technology

 • Use ChatGPT and AI tools to support marketing and workflow automation

 • Help build and refine simple business systems and automations

 • Assist with documenting processes and creating standard operating procedures (SOPs)



Administrative Support

 • Assist with calendar management and scheduling

 • Support
 management and correspondence

 • Coordinate vendors and service providers when required

 • Maintain organized digital document and file systems



?



Qualifications



Ideal candidates will possess the following experience and qualities:

 • Real estate experience preferred

 • Real estate license preferred but not required

 • Experience with BoldTrail CRM is an asset

 • Strong experience using Canva Pro

 • Comfortable working with AI tools such as ChatGPT

 • Excellent written and verbal communication skills

 • Strong organizational and multitasking abilities

 • Highly detail-oriented and reliable

 • Self-directed and proactive with a strong work ethic



?



Skills & Tools



Experience with the following tools is strongly preferred:

 • BoldTrail CRM

 • Canva Pro

 • ChatGPT and AI productivity tools

 • Social media platforms

 • Google Workspace / digital document systems

• Paragon (MLS)



?



Additional Languages



Candidates who speak additional languages are encouraged to apply, including:

 • Mandarin

 • Cantonese

 • Punjabi

 • Farsi

 • Spanish

 • Hindi

 • Urdu



?



Growth Opportunities



This role offers meaningful career growth opportunities for the right candidate.



Potential growth paths include:

 • Marketing Manager

 • Operations Coordinator

 • Licensed Real Estate Agent



You will gain exposure to luxury real estate marketing, advanced CRM systems, and AI-driven business operations while working directly alongside me in building and scaling a modern real estate business.



?



Compensation & Schedule

 • Based on experience

 • Schedule: 15–20 hours per week initially

 • Location: Local office with potential remote flexibility depending on experience and performance

 • Opportunity to increase hours and transition to full-time after a successful probationary period



?



How to Apply



Please submit your application to 
 along with the following:

 1. A short paragraph explaining your experience with real estate, CRM systems, or marketing.

 2. The AI tools you currently use in your work.

 3. A link to one Canva design or marketing piece you have created.

 4. Include the phrase “Detail Matters” in the subject line so I know you read the full posting.



I look forward to hearing from motivated candidates who are excited about real estate, marketing, and the future of AI-driven business operations.

title: Bookkeeper – Virtual / Work From Home
description:
Job Type Part-Time (15–25 hrs/week) or Full-Time (40 hrs/week) — you choose

Pay Competitive pay — based on experience

Location 100% Work From Home — open to Philippines, Latin America, Eastern Europe

Hours Must overlap with US Central or Eastern Time (at least 4–5 hrs/day)

Start Date ASAP — immediate start available



ABOUT THE COMPANY

CFO Leverage is a US-based fractional CFO and bookkeeping firm. We work exclusively with nonprofits — charities, schools, churches, and social service organizations across the United States. Our clients rely on us to keep their finances clean and accurate so they can focus on their missions.

We are a remote-first company with a friendly, professional team. We have been growing steadily and are looking for a long-term bookkeeping partner to grow with us. This is NOT a short-term project — we are looking for someone who wants to build a career with a stable US company.



WHAT YOU WILL DO

You will handle the day-to-day bookkeeping for a set of nonprofit clients. You will work closely with a US-based fractional CFO who oversees each client. You do not need to communicate directly with clients — your main contact is the CFO on your team.



• Record all transactions and keep client books up to date in QuickBooks Online

• Reconcile bank accounts and credit card statements every month

• Process vendor payments and bill approvals using Bill.com

• Track restricted and unrestricted funds (nonprofit fund accounting)

• Prepare monthly reports: Profit & Loss, Balance Sheet, Budget vs. Actual

• Help with year-end close and audit support

• Flag any issues or discrepancies to the CFO team right away

• Keep records organized and easy to find



REQUIREMENTS

Please only apply if you meet ALL of these:

• At least 2 years of bookkeeping experience (nonprofit experience is a big plus)

• Proficient in QuickBooks Online — you use it regularly, not just occasionally

• Experience with Bill.com for processing and approving payments

• Understand US GAAP accounting principles

• Excellent English — written and spoken — you communicate clearly and professionally

• Available to work during US business hours (overlap with Central or Eastern Time required)

• Stable, fast internet connection

• Own computer/laptop in good working condition

• Quiet, professional home work environment



NICE TO HAVE (NOT REQUIRED)

• Experience working for a US-based accounting or bookkeeping firm

• Familiarity with nonprofit rules (restricted grants, Form 990, donor reporting)

• Accounting degree or bookkeeping certification (e.g., QuickBooks ProAdvisor)

• Experience managing multiple client accounts at the same time



WHY WORK WITH US

• Stable, long-term work — we don't hire and drop. Our clients stay with us for years

• US company with professional standards and reliable pay

• Supportive team — you will have a CFO to guide you, you are never alone

• Room to grow — we are expanding and promote people who perform well

• Meaningful work — every client is a nonprofit doing good in the world

• 100% work from home — no commute, flexible setup



HOW TO APPLY

Send your application through OnlineJobs.ph. In your message, please include:

• Your resume or a summary of your work experience

• How many years you have been doing bookkeeping and for what types of clients

• Your QuickBooks Online experience level: Basic / Intermediate / Advanced

• Your Bill.com experience: Yes / No / Limited

• Your available hours and time zone

• Part-time or full-time preference



Important: Applications without answers to the questions above will not be reviewed. We receive many applications — a complete, specific reply helps us find the right fit quickly.



We respond to all complete applications within 3 business days.
