title: Social Media Video Editor & Content Creator (Instagram / Facebook) – Flooring Retail
description:
We are looking for a creative and reliable Social Media Video Editor & Content Creator to help grow our flooring and building supply retail store through engaging social media content.



Your primary role will be editing short-form videos for Instagram and
, especially Reels. We will record the raw video clips in our store and at job sites, and you will edit the footage into engaging, professional social media content.



In addition to editing, we are looking for someone who can guide us on what to film. This includes suggesting video ideas, shot lists, and simple scripts so that we capture the right content when recording.



Our goal is to post 2–3 high-quality videos per week. We want our content to be similar in style and quality to successful competitors in the flooring and home improvement industry.



If you understand what makes short-form videos perform well and can help guide the content creation process, this role could become a long-term partnership.



Responsibilities:



Edit short-form videos for Instagram Reels and



Turn our raw footage into engaging social media videos



Add captions, transitions, music, and effects



Help us post 2–3 videos per week



Review competitor social media accounts and help create similar style content



Suggest video ideas and content formats



Provide simple scripts or outlines for videos



Tell us what clips to record to make better content



Help plan a simple weekly content schedule



Types of Videos We Want to Create:



Flooring product highlights



Before and after transformations



Installation clips



Flooring tips and education



Promotions and sales



Short showroom walkthroughs



Quick customer questions and answers



Requirements:



Experience editing short-form social media videos (Reels / TikTok / Shorts)



Strong understanding of what makes videos perform well on Instagram



Experience using tools such as CapCut, Adobe Premiere, Final Cut, or Canva



Ability to guide content creation and suggest video ideas



Good communication and reliability



Ability to consistently deliver content each week



Nice to Have:



Experience creating content for home improvement, construction, or product-based businesses



Basic graphic design skills



Experience helping manage social media content calendars



Compensation:



Part-time or project-based to start



Opportunity for long-term work if the partnership is successful



Application Instructions (IMPORTANT):



To confirm that you read this job description, please include the word “FLOORING” in the first line of your application.



Please also include:



Links to 3–5 short-form videos you have edited



The editing software you use



One Instagram or TikTok account that you think creates great content for a retail or home improvement business



A short explanation of how you would help guide us on what clips to record



Applications that do not follow these instructions may not be reviewed.

title: Social Media Monitoring & Documentation Virtual Assistant
description:
We are seeking a highly detail-oriented **Virtual Assistant to monitor and document social media activity across multiple platforms.**



The primary responsibility of this role is to **review public social media content daily and archive posts, stories, comments, and videos in an organized evidence database.**



This position requires someone who is extremely organized and able to maintain accurate records with timestamps and links.



### Responsibilities



• Monitor multiple public social media profiles daily

• Review posts, stories, comments, and videos

• Capture screenshots and screen recordings when necessary

• Save original links and timestamps for all archived content

• Organize files by **day, week, month, and year**

• Maintain a **master tracking spreadsheet of documented posts**

• Archive content in organized folders on cloud storage

• Provide a **daily or weekly monitoring report**



### Platforms to Monitor



• Instagram

•

• TikTok

• YouTube

• X 
)

• Reddit

• Public forums or blogs if applicable



### Documentation Process



For each item identified:



1. Screenshot or screen record the content

2. Save the direct URL

3. Record the date and time

4. Upload the file to organized cloud folders

5. Log the entry in the tracking spreadsheet



### Requirements



• Extremely detail-oriented

• Experience with social media platforms

• Comfortable using **Google Drive / Dropbox / spreadsheets**

• Strong organizational skills

• Ability to follow documentation procedures

• High level of discretion and confidentiality



### Important



This role involves **monitoring publicly available information only**.

The assistant will **not interact with any accounts or engage in communication** with any individuals being monitored.

title: YouTube Channel Revamp Specialist (Project-Based Gig)
description:
San Diego Real Estate Brand



We are a high-producing San Diego real estate brand with 100+ existing YouTube videos.



The content quality is strong.

The channel structure, branding, and optimization are not.



We are hiring a project-based specialist to fully revamp the existing channel before moving into any long-term engagement.



This is a gig hire to rebuild the foundation correctly. If performance is strong, this can grow into a longer-term contract role.



Project Scope



1?? Revamp Existing Videos



• Audit current titles for SEO

• Rewrite titles for stronger click-through and local search

• Rewrite descriptions for keyword optimization + lead conversion

• Optimize tags

• Improve end screens and internal linking

• Structure pinned comments for conversion



Focus: San Diego real estate search intent.



2?? Rearrange & Rebuild Playlists



• Reorganize all videos into strategic playlists

• Build keyword-based playlist clusters

• Improve watch session flow

• Structure playlists around buyer intent (Living in San Diego, Neighborhood Tours, VA Buyers, Market Updates, etc.)

• Optimize playlist descriptions for SEO



Goal: Increase session duration and topical authority.



3?? Thumbnail Overhaul



• Develop a consistent thumbnail system

• Redesign high-opportunity videos first

• Improve click-through rate

• Align visual branding for authority positioning

• Create a repeatable thumbnail framework



We are not looking for “pretty.”

We are looking for clickable and strategic.



4?? Channel Bio + Link Optimization



• Rewrite channel bio for authority + trust

• Structure homepage layout for conversion

• Optimize all description links

• Improve funnel path (calls, forms, consultations)

• Strengthen local positioning (San Diego focus)



Goal: Turn viewers into inbound leads.



Deliverables

• Fully optimized existing videos

• Rebuilt playlists

• New thumbnail framework + applied redesign

• Optimized channel bio and links

• Brief summary document outlining changes made



Ideal Candidate

• Proven YouTube SEO experience

• Strong CTR and thumbnail psychology knowledge

• Experience optimizing existing channels (not just launching new ones)

• Can show measurable before-and-after results

• Strategic thinker, not just executor



Bonus if you have worked with real estate brands.



Please provide:

1. Channels you have revamped

2. Before/after performance examples

3. Your audit process

4. What you would fix first on our channel



Channel:

[
](
)



This is a foundational rebuild project.

If you execute at a high level, there is room to grow into a long-term contract role.

title: Systems & Marketing Integrator
description:
Social Media Growth & Conversion Integrator



**Gig-to-Full-Time | Path to Department Head**



This starts as a **project-based / gig role** with a **clear path to becoming a full-time Department Head** for the right person.



I’m looking for a **high-level Social Media Growth & Conversion Integrator** — someone who knows how to turn **authority, reviews, and content into predictable inbound leads**, not vanity metrics.



Likes and views don’t move the needle here.

**Systems, conversion, and ownership do.**



### What’s Already in Place



* A strong personal brand with real-world credibility

* **High-volume Google My Business and Zillow reviews**

* Proven market trust and documented results



What’s missing is someone who can **architect, optimize, and scale the entire ecosystem** — and eventually **own it end-to-end**.



This is **not a posting VA role**.

This is **strategy + execution + systems + leadership**.



---



## Core Responsibilities



### Platform Optimization & Growth Systems



**YouTube (Primary Growth Engine)**



* Optimize titles, descriptions, tags, and keywords for search + intent

* Build TOF / MOF / BOF CTAs into every video

* Design high-conversion link and offer structure

* Turn long-form content into lead-generating assets



**Instagram, TikTok, LinkedIn,
**



* Profile, bio, and positioning optimization

* Caption structure built for clarity, authority, and conversion

* Pinned posts and highlight strategy

* Platform-native execution (no copy-paste thinking)



### Reviews & Authority Leverage



* Convert **Google My Business reviews** into trust multipliers:



  * Social proof content

  * Conversion-focused CTAs

  * Funnel reinforcement

* Repurpose **Zillow reviews** into:



  * Short-form authority content

  * Landing page and funnel assets

  * Objection-handling messaging



### Funnels, Automation & CRM Integration



* Design and refine **Top / Middle / Bottom funnel systems**

* Audit and rebuild all **link flows** (bios, landing pages, forms)

* Ensure **every lead routes cleanly into Follow Up Boss**

* Set up tagging, sources, and automations for clean follow-up

* Improve lead quality through intent-based filtering

* Eliminate friction between content ? click ? conversation



### Brand Ownership & Leadership



* Maintain premium brand positioning across platforms

* Track performance and optimize using real data

* Bring creative ideas grounded in conversion and authority

* Build, document, and systemize repeatable processes

* Over time: **lead and scale this function as a department**



## Who This Role Is For



* You think in **systems, funnels, and leverage**

* You’re as comfortable executing as you are strategizing

* You want **ownership**, not task lists

* You’re excited by the idea of **building a department**, not just filling a seat

* You care about results, not optics



## Required Skills

* Advanced digital marketing fundamentals

* Strong **YouTube SEO and social platform optimization**

* Funnel strategy (TOF / MOF / BOF)

* Conversion-focused copywriting and formatting

* CRM and automation experience (**Follow Up Boss a major plus**)

* Analytical mindset with creative execution

* Strong written English

* Experience with **real estate or personal brands**

* Google My Business optimization

* Review-based marketing and social proof strategy

* Familiarity with Zapier, landing pages, or CRM automations

title: SEO / Brand / PR Specialist (Full-Time, Full Remote)
description:
SEO / Brand / PR Specialist (Full-Time, Full Remote)



Overview



We’re hiring a full-time, senior-leaning Virtual Assistant to own day-to-day SEO execution and

brand/PR outreach. This person will represent our brand externally, build relationships with

publishers and partners, and consistently ship SEO content + backlinks that drive rankings and

reputation.



This is not a “basic VA” role. You’ll be expected to operate independently, write clearly at a

native level, and manage multiple workstreams without constant oversight.



Core Responsibilities



1) SEO Strategy + Execution (Weekly Output)

? Run keyword research and topic planning using SEMrush, SurferSEO, and related tools.

? Build and maintain a blog content calendar with clear targets (keyword, intent, outline,

internal links, backlink plan).

? Execute on-page SEO for every page/article:

? Titles/meta, headers, schema opportunities, internal linking, topical clusters,

image SEO, and “people also ask” coverage.

? Track rankings, traffic, impressions, and CTR; report weekly on wins, losses, and next

actions.



2) Content Creation (Ranking-Focused)

? Write and publish 3 SEO-optimized blogs per week (native-level English, clear structure,

non-fluffy, conversion-aware).

? Update/refresh existing content to improve ranking and keep pages current.

? Build proper internal linking across the site and propose new pages where gaps exist.

? Create supporting assets as needed (FAQs, short landing page sections, comparison

pages, glossary pages).



3) Backlinks And Mentions + Digital PR Outreach

? A key KPI is the # of new mentions and backlinks we score every month. Find the most

relevant blogs/pages/articles we must get on, and track down a way to contact and get

mentioned there.

? Build backlink opportunities via:

? InsertLink (or similar platforms)

? Direct outreach to website owners, journalists, bloggers, and brands

? Partnership swaps where appropriate

? Pitch guest posts, link insertions, brand mentions, listicle placements, and resource links.

? Maintain an outreach CRM (sheet is fine): targets,
s sent, replies, follow-ups,

outcomes, live links.

? Ensure backlinks are clean and relevant (no spam networks, no toxic placements).



4) AI SEO / LLM Visibility

? Implement AI SEO tactics to increase visibility in AI search and assistants:

? Improve entity coverage, structured content, FAQs, author credibility, and

“answer-first” formatting.

? Identify content types that win in AI summaries and optimize accordingly.

? Maintain a playbook of what’s working and apply it across new + existing content.



5) Technical SEO Coordination (With Devs)

? Identify technical SEO issues (indexing, site speed basics, CWV flags, broken links,

redirect chains, sitemap/robots, schema errors) shown in Semrush, Ahrefs and Search

Console.

? Write clear, developer-friendly tickets:

? What’s wrong

? Why it matters

? Priority level

? How to validate the fix

? Coordinate implementation and verify changes post-launch.



6) Competitor Backlink Intelligence

? Analyze competitor backlink profiles and identify high-quality sites we should pursue.

? Build a “replicate list” of competitor placements (guest posts, resource pages,

directories, link inserts) and execute outreach to win similar or better links.

? Track competitor moves (new pages, new links, ranking jumps) and propose

counter-actions weekly.



7) Content Distribution + Syndication

? Repurpose every major content piece into distribution assets (short posts, summaries,

announcements) and coordinate posting/placement

? Post thought-leader level content on our Linkedin as pages/articles



8) E-E-A-T + Credibility Building

? Improve site credibility signals for both Google and AI/LLM visibility:

? author pages, editorial standards, sourcing/citations, proof elements

? case studies, methodology/process pages, trust blocks, media/press assets

? Ensure content is written to win “answer-first” placement and AI summaries while

maintaining brand tone and accuracy.



9) Reputation + SERP Defense

? Monitor branded search results and key reputation queries to protect page-1 visibility.

? Build and optimize “defensive” content assets (brand pages, founder/team pages, press

page, comparisons, FAQs) to push positive/neutral coverage up.

? Coordinate outreach to secure credible third-party coverage that strengthens brand trust

and offsets negative or inaccurate results.



10) Partnerships + Co-Marketing Placements

? Identify complementary brands, agencies, tools, and communities for partnership

opportunities.

? Pitch and coordinate co-marketing initiatives: partner directories, resource pages,

newsletter swaps, guest features, co-authored content.

? Maintain a partnership pipeline and manage follow-ups through to placement and link

acquisition.



Tools You Must Be Comfortable With



? SEMrush

? SurferSEO

? Google Search Console

? Google Analytics (basic proficiency is fine)

? InsertLink

? Ahrefs

? Hunter / other
 finding service

?
 outreach

? Screaming Frog

? Google Sheets / Docs, Slack, project management tools



Required Skills



? 100% fluent English (near-native writing + speaking)

? Strong PR/outreach communication: confident, friendly, professional

? Proven ability to earn backlinks through outreach (not just “I know what backlinks are”)

? Strong SEO writing skills: intent-matching, structured, internal linking, SEO formatting

? Organized operator: pipelines, tracking, weekly deliverables, consistent follow-through

? Can represent a brand and maintain tone standards across communications

? Able to collaborate with developers and translate SEO needs into clear tasks



Nice-to-Haves



? Strong understanding/experience in the music industry and how the independent artist

space works

? Experience with high-output publishing (2–5 posts/week) while maintaining quality

? Past success improving rankings in competitive niches

? Basic understanding of schema markup and how to validate it

title: Virtual Assistant
description:
Virtual Assistant – RIOT Manual Therapy

Location: Remote

Type: Full Time 

Reports To: Owner / Clinical Director

Business Type: High-Performance Manual Therapy & Bodywork Practice

RIOT Manual Therapy is a performance-focused manual therapy practice that blends advanced osteopathic principles, physical therapy, and chiropractic-inspired movement restoration. Our clients range from everyday professionals to high-performing athletes and business leaders. We’re building something special — not just a clinic, but a movement around intentional body care and human performance.



We’re looking for a highly organized, proactive Virtual Assistant to help us manage operations, communication, and growth while protecting our clinicians’ time and energy.



Role Overview

As our Virtual Assistant, you’ll be the operational backbone of our practice.

Your job is to protect the owner’s time, enhance the client experience, and keep the business systems organized as we scale.

This role touches scheduling, client communication, marketing execution, admin, hiring support, and internal systems organization.

You won’t be creating our strategies — but you’ll help execute them cleanly and consistently.



Core Responsibilities

1. Scheduling & Client Communication

You will act as the first point of contact for our clients:

Manage incoming texts,
s, and calls.

Schedule, confirm, cancel, and reschedule appointments.

Send reminders and enforce the 24-hour cancellation policy.

Manage waitlists and special scheduling requests (VIP clients, multi-family accounts, etc.).

Review intake forms for completeness before appointments.

Follow up with new consults and missed rebooking opportunities.

Reach out to inactive clients to re-engage them.

You protect the calendar like a bodyguard.



2. Marketing & Content Execution

You support content and brand growth, not by strategizing — but by executing:

Post Instagram and
 content (stories, reels, carousels).

Upload YouTube Shorts and video content.

Organize and file video clips from treatment sessions.

Edit short-form videos for social media or internal training.

Manage direct messages and inquiries on social platforms.

Upload and schedule
 campaigns

Format and organize client testimonials.

You’ll help turn raw content into clean, consistent output.



3. Operations & Admin

You keep the back-end clean and scalable:

Update and organize SOPs inside Trainual.

Format internal training documents and materials.

Track and order office supplies.

Monitor inventory (tape, cups, oils, linens, equipment).



4. Billing, Payments & Reporting

With proper systems and training, you’ll help maintain financial clarity:

Reconcile incoming payments.

Send payroll summaries to leadership.

Follow up on outstanding balances.

Track and update KPIs such as:

Rebooking percentage

Average client value

Client retention rate

Therapist performance stats



5. Hiring & Team Support

You’ll support the growth of our therapy team:

Assist in sourcing potential massage/manual therapists.

Post job ads on platforms like Indeed and relevant groups.

Filter applicants and help schedule interviews.

Send onboarding documents and collect paperwork (W-9s, NDAs, agreements).

Set up new hires in relevant systems.

Track their training progress in Trainual.



6. Client Experience & Retention

You directly impact revenue through better client care systems:

Send first-visit follow-ups.

Manage referral program communications.

Send monthly check-ins to prior clients.

Organize and catalogue transformation stories and client feedback.



7. Special Projects

You’ll also assist with projects that help build the brand long-term:

Organizing referral systems and spreadsheets.

Assisting with website updates (bios, photos, contact forms).

Supporting brand storytelling and recap content.

Handling business-related personal admin tasks for the owner.



Ideal Candidate Profile

You might be a great fit if you are:

Highly organized and detail-oriented

Clear and professional in written communication

Comfortable managing multiple systems and platforms

Proactive, not just reactive

Able to follow systems and help improve them

Calm and clear when handling clients

Excited about being part of a growing health and performance brand





Bonus if you have experience in:

Acuity

Trainual

Social media management

Health, wellness, or service industries



Work Schedule & Compensation

Hours: 40–45 hours per week to start

Schedule: Flexible, but must support U.S. business hours

Pay: Based on experience and skill level

description:

title: Shopify Multi-Brand Specialist
description:
Project Overview:

I am building a high-level Intellectual Property (IP) portfolio under a single Shopify "Mother Ship" store (Frontier World IP). We are consolidating 10+ distinct lifestyle and niche brands into one centralized backend.

I need a specialist to build the technical infrastructure that allows each brand to maintain total branding, unique aesthetics, and dedicated URLs, while sharing one Shopify checkout and Amazon marketplace integration.

Key Objectives:

1. Total Brand Control: Each brand must have its own "boutique" look. When a customer is in the "Bitcoin Ranch" section, the colors, banners, and typography must reflect that brand, not the parent "Frontier World" site.

2. SEO Optimization: Each brand department must be optimized for its specific niche keywords to drive organic traffic.

3. URL Mapping: Each brand has its own external domain (e.g., 
). You must configure these to point directly to the unique collection "boutique" within the main store.

4. Amazon Synchronization: Set up the "push" to Amazon so that products are automatically mapped to their correct Brand Registry identities based on Shopify data.

Scope of Work:

• Theme Architecture: Implement a high-performance Shopify 2.0 theme. Create 10+ Custom Collection Templates using unique Sections and Blocks to define each brand's aesthetic.

• Navigation & UX: Build a "Mega-Menu" or Brand Directory allowing customers to easily navigate between the 10+ IP portfolios.

• Domain & Redirect Management: Connect 10+ external domains and configure 301 redirects to the specific collection URLs.

• Marketplace Integration: Configure Shopify Marketplace Connect (or similar) to map "Brand" and "Manufacturer" attributes correctly for Amazon Seller Central.

• Fulfillment Link: Ensure the setup allows for seamless Print-on-Demand (POD) fulfillment across all brands.

• Hand-off Training: Record a brief video (Loom) showing my Virtual Assistant how to add new products and assign them to the correct brand template/collection.

Candidate Requirements:

• Proven experience with Shopify 2.0 JSON templates and "Sections Everywhere."

• Experience in Multi-Brand / Multi-Store consolidation.

• Expertise in Domain Management and URL redirect strategies.

• Deep understanding of SEO best practices for Shopify collections.

• Strong communication skills and ability to provide a clean SOP (Standard Operating Procedure) for my assistant.

title: Virtual Assistant – Title Processing Coordinator
description:
Company: Bella Title LLC

Location: Remote

Position Type: Full-Time Virtual Assistant



About Bella Title



Bella Title is a boutique title and escrow company located in Blue Ash, Ohio. We work with real estate agents, lenders, buyers, sellers, and investors to provide smooth and efficient real estate closings. Our focus is accuracy, communication, and excellent customer service.



We are looking for a detail-oriented Virtual Assistant to assist with file management, transaction coordination, and communication with clients and lenders. 

MUST HAVE EXPERIENCE working with real estate transactions, title companies, mortgage companies, or a law firm in the USA. If you do not have any experience, please do not write. 



Position Overview



The Virtual Assistant will support the Bella Title team by helping manage title files, coordinate documentation, and communicate with parties involved in real estate transactions. This role focuses on administrative and coordination tasks and does not involve handling escrow funds or making title decisions.



Key Responsibilities:



Title File Management



Open new title orders in the system

Send introduction
s to buyers, sellers, agents, and lenders

Order title search

Organize and upload documents into the file

Track missing documents and follow up with parties

Track title search status

Order mortgage payoffs

Prep tax certificates

Order HOA / condominium documents

Request surveys when needed

Prep CPLs

Prep Title Commitments



Communication:



Follow up with lenders, real estate agents, buyers, and sellers

Provide transaction status updates

Respond to general
 inquiries



Closing Preparation:



Assist with scheduling closings:

Coordinate mobile or remote notary services

Confirm that required documents (IDs, affidavits, etc.) are received

Prepare files for final review by Bella Title staff



Administrative Support:

Help organize closing schedules

Support general administrative tasks for the Bella Title team



Qualifications:



Excellent written and verbal English communication

Strong attention to detail and organization

Ability to manage multiple files and deadlines

Experience in real estate, title, escrow, mortgage, or transaction coordination

Comfortable working with
, spreadsheets, and document management systems

Ability to work independently and follow instructions



Important Notes:

We use Qualia

Conducting title examination

All escrow, settlement, and title decisions remain with Bella Title staff.



Compensation:



Full-time remote position

Competitive monthly salary based on experience

Opportunity to grow with a growing real estate title company

13th-month bonus

Monthly Performance bonus

Stable long-term work

Respectful employer

When applying, please include the word “Bella Closing Experienced in Real Estate/Title/Mortgage” in the subject line so we know you read the entire job description.

We are looking for someone who understands how to structure campaigns effectively for service-based businesses, manage budgets efficiently, and continually improve campaign performance.

title: Product Research & Market Analyst (Helium10, Keepa, Junglescout)
description:
About Us

We're a pan-Asian sourcing consultancy connecting Western clinics and brands with manufacturers across China, Korea, Japan, and the Philippines. We specialize in professional skincare, cosmetics, and wellness products.



We're expanding into three parallel channels:



Distribution — brands are approaching us to distribute their products in Western markets

White Label — sourcing existing formulations from Asian manufacturers and branding for our clients

Custom Formulation — working with OEM/ODM manufacturers to develop proprietary products



We need someone who can identify which products are worth pursuing across all three channels.



The Role

You'll be our product intelligence engine — researching market demand, analyzing competitive landscapes, and producing actionable recommendations on which products to distribute, white label, or develop.

This is NOT a PPC or advertising role. This is research, analysis, and opportunity identification.



Core Responsibilities

Amazon & Marketplace Analysis



*Identify winning and trending products in skincare, beauty, and wellness categories using tools like Helium 10, Jungle Scout, or Keepa

*Analyze Best Seller Rank (BSR), revenue estimates, review velocity, and pricing trends

*Identify gaps and underserved niches (high demand + low competition + weak listings)

*Track seasonal trends and emerging ingredient/product trends (e.g., peptide serums, EMS devices, LED masks)



Distribution Evaluation



When brands approach us for distribution, assess their product-market fit for Western markets (US, Australia, Singapore, UAE)

Evaluate brand strength, existing Amazon presence, pricing positioning, and competitive landscape

Produce a GO / NO-GO recommendation with supporting data



White Label & Custom Formulation Opportunity Assessment



Identify product categories where white label or custom formulation offers better margins than distribution

Estimate landed cost vs. market price to model margin potential

Research existing OEM/ODM capabilities from our supplier network (China, Korea, Japan, Philippines)

Flag formulation trends worth developing (e.g., "glass skin" serums, exosome skincare, cica products)



Competitive Intelligence



Monitor competitor brands, new product launches, and pricing shifts

Track Amazon algorithm changes, category trends, and review patterns

Build and maintain a product opportunity pipeline with scoring/ranking





What You'll Deliver (Weekly)



Product Opportunity Report — 3-5 vetted product opportunities ranked by potential, with data backing each recommendation

Brand Evaluation Briefs — When brands approach us, a 1-page assessment with GO/NO-GO recommendation

Trend Alerts — Quick flags on emerging ingredients, viral products, or category shifts worth watching

Competitive Snapshots — Monthly overview of competitor movements in our key categories





Required Skills & Experience

Must Have:



2+ years experience in Amazon product research or e-commerce market analysis

Proficiency with product research tools (Helium 10, Jungle Scout, Keepa, or similar)

Understanding of BSR, revenue estimation, keyword demand analysis, and review analysis

Ability to model basic unit economics (landed cost, margin, breakeven)

Strong written communication — you'll produce reports, not just spreadsheets

Self-directed and comfortable working asynchronously



Strong Preference:



Experience in beauty, skincare, cosmetics, or wellness product categories

Understanding of white label vs. private label vs. custom formulation business models

Familiarity with sourcing from Asia (China, Korea, Japan) — manufacturing costs, MOQs, lead times

Experience evaluating brands for distribution or retail partnerships

Knowledge of FDA cosmetic regulations or international cosmetic compliance (bonus, not required)



Tools You Should Know (some or all):



Helium 10 (Black Box, Cerebro, Magnet)

Jungle Scout or similar

Keepa / CamelCamelCamel

Google Sheets / Excel for data modeling

Amazon Brand Analytics (if you've had seller access)

------------------------

How to Apply

Please include:



A brief intro — who you are and why this role fits your experience

Tool experience — which product research tools you've used and for how long

A sample analysis — Pick any skincare or beauty product currently in Amazon's top 100 for its subcategory. In 3-5 bullet points, tell us:



What's the estimated monthly revenue?

Who are the top 3 competitors?

Is there a white label or private label opportunity here? Why or why not?

What would you recommend we do with this product (distribute, white label, skip)?





Availability — hours per week (time slots and approximate hours) and timezone



Type: Part-time (potential to scale as needed)

Hours: 10-15 hrs/week to start, scaling to 20+

Rate: $TBD DOE

Location: Remote (any timezone, async-friendly)

Communication: Slack + weekly async check-in

Start: Immediate

title: Virtual FrontDesk For Lash & Brow Salon
description:
We are a premium lash and brow salon in the Dallas-Fort Worth area looking for a sharp, personable Virtual Front Desk Coordinator to be the first point of contact for our guests — from a screen, not a counter. You’ll greet clients via live video, manage bookings, handle check-ins and checkouts, follow up on leads, and keep the front-of-house running smoothly — all remotely. This is not a passive monitoring role. You are the face and voice of our salon. You’ll be on-camera greeting every guest who walks through the door, answering phone calls, and proactively reaching out to prospective and lapsed clients. If you’re warm, organized, tech-savvy, and thrive in a client-facing role, this is for you.



What You’ll Do

Live Guest Experience (During Salon Hours)

• Greet every guest via live video screen as they enter the salon — warm, professional, by name when possible

• Check clients in and out through Mindbody, confirm services, and process payments

• Prebook next appointments before the client leaves, maximizing retention

• Answer incoming phone calls, respond to inquiries, and route messages to stylists

• Monitor the lobby and alert stylists when their next client has arrived

• Handle walk-in inquiries and membership questions with confidence

Lead Management & Outreach (During + Off-Hours)

• Respond to new leads (web inquiries, social media, Google Ads) within 1 hour during business hours

• Follow up with prospective clients via text,
, and phone to convert leads into booked appointments

• Reactivate lapsed members (60+ days since last visit) with personalized outreach

• Contact no-shows and late cancellations to rebook

• Send appointment reminders and pre-visit confirmations

Membership & Revenue Support

• Explain membership benefits to new and prospective clients

• Track upcoming membership renewals and proactively follow up

• Request Google reviews from clients after their visit

• Support retail product recommendations at checkout when appropriate

Administrative

• Maintain accurate client records in Mindbody

• Flag scheduling conflicts, double-bookings, or coverage gaps to the owner

• Track daily check-in/checkout completion and report any discrepancies

• Assist with light social media tasks (posting, responding to DMs) if needed

Requirements

Must Have

• Excellent spoken and written English — neutral accent preferred; you’ll be on video with US-based clients

• Reliable high-speed internet (minimum 25 Mbps) and backup connectivity plan

• Professional home setup: quiet environment, good lighting, clean background

• HD webcam, quality headset with microphone, and a computer capable of running video + Mindbody simultaneously

• Experience with appointment scheduling or salon/spa/clinic front desk operations

• Strong proficiency with cloud-based software (CRM, booking systems, Google Workspace)

• Available to work US Central Time hours (salon typically operates 9 AM – 7 PM CT)

• High attention to detail, especially around client names, preferences, and appointment accuracy

Nice to Have

• Experience with Mindbody, Vagaro, Booker, or similar salon management software

• Background in beauty, wellness, or hospitality industry

• Experience with lead follow-up, outbound calling, or appointment setting

• Familiarity with membership-based businesses and recurring revenue models

• Basic knowledge of lash extensions, brow services, and beauty terminology

Data Privacy & Confidentiality

You will have access to client personal information, appointment history, and payment systems. This role requires:

• Signing a confidentiality and data handling agreement before starting

• Accessing client data only through authorized salon systems (Mindbody) — no downloading, copying, or storing client information on personal devices

• Strict adherence to role-based access permissions (you will not have access to full payment card numbers or financial reports)

• Immediate reporting of any data concerns or security issues to the salon owner

Why This Role

You’re not answering phones in a call center. You’re the front desk of a premium beauty salon — clients will see your face, hear your voice, and remember your name. You’ll build real relationships with regular guests, have direct impact on the salon’s growth, and work closely with a small team that values initiative and ownership.

This is an ideal role for someone who wants a long-term, stable remote position with a US-based business where their contribution is visible and valued every single day.



How to Apply

Send your resume along with a short video introduction (1–2 minutes) telling us:

1.  A little about yourself and your experience

2.  Why this role interests you

3.  Your home office setup and internet speed

4.  Your availability and desired hours

?? This is not for beginners. You must already know your way around Ads Manager.

How many years of experience do you have with

title: E-Commerce Chargeback Specialist Full-Time
description:
Hey! We're looking for a chargeback expert to join our Dispute team to resolve disputes on Shopify Payments, Stripe for our e-commerce business. You should have a proven track record of successfully handling chargebacks and an understanding of the above platforms' processes.



Responsibilities:

- Manage and resolve chargebacks for Shopify, Stripe

- Fixing inquiries and RFIs throughout the day

- Work with customers 
s) and platforms to settle disputes before the deadline.

- Keep records of each case and document everything accordingly.

- Providing EOD and EOW reports on all cases handled (won/lost)



Requirements:

- Experience resolving chargebacks with Shopify Payments, Stripe.

- A maximum response time on any incoming claim, inquiry, chargeback, RFI within 3 hrs.

- High success rate in dispute resolution (90%+).

- Good communication and problem-solving skills.



Questions (please reply to all of these to be considered):



1. What’s your experience with PayPal, Shopify, and Stripe chargebacks?

2. Have you worked on resolving disputes specifically for dropshipping or DTC Brands? If so, tell us more.

3. Can you share proof that you've worked in Shopify for disputes?

4. Do you use templates ? Can you give me a short explenation how you handle each case?

4. What’s your average success rate in resolving or reversing chargebacks?

5. Are you confident that you are able to handle incoming claims/disputes/RFIs within 3 hours? Why?



Important: To be considered for the role, please include “IM THE ONE” in the subject line of your application.



Looking forward to seeing your application!

description:

Salary: $3/hour (based on experience) | Hours: 9 AM - 5 PM (UK Time) | Location: Remote



We are a fast-growing 7-figure e-commerce brand aiming for 8 figures by 2026. We need a sharp, reliable CSR to handle high-volume customer support with precision.



What You’ll Do



Respond to customer inquiries 
, social media) via Gorgias, Zendesk, Zoho Desk, or Freshdesk.



Process returns, exchanges, cancellations, and refunds.



Escalate complex issues to the CS Manager.



Use macros/templates while maintaining personalized responses.



Stay organized and follow SOPs.



Requirements



Fluent in English (written & spoken).



E-commerce customer service experience (preferably dropshipping).



Familiar with Shopify, Gorgias, Zendesk, Zoho Desk, or Freshdesk.



Able to follow SOPs & handle returns/exchanges.



Reliable internet and a backup connection.



Independent, detail-oriented, and KPI-driven.



KPIs & Expectations



Minimum
tickets per shift.



Punctuality and minimal absences.



Working Hours



Monday to Saturday



5 PM - 1 AM Manila Time



(Equivalent to 9 AM - 5 PM UK Time)



How to Apply



To apply, please answer the following questions and attach your CV:



Do you have experience with Shopify? How long?



How many years of dropshipping or DTC customer support experience do you have?



Do you currently work for someone else?



Who and what was the last company you worked with? And what did you do in your last job? Tell us briefly about it.



Important: Please include the keyword "CXHERO" in your response. Applications without this keyword or CV attachment will not be considered.



Ready for the challenge? Apply today!

WANTED: Dropshipping Customer Support (Shopify)

Who are we?

We are a rapidly growing E-commerce brand, expanding our team to support our goals and ensure smooth operations across our platform.



Whom are we looking for?

We are looking for an experienced Shopify Virtual Assistant (VA) to join our team. We will train you for the specific position, but we are looking for someone who has experience using the Shopify platform, regardless of the type of experience. As long as you are familiar with Shopify and can navigate it smoothly, you’ll be a great fit!



Here’s what we expect from the role:



Managing and monitoring customer orders through Shopify.



Checking the status of orders, ensuring fulfillment, and tracking shipping progress.



Troubleshooting any order-related issues directly through the Shopify platform.



Communicating with suppliers to ensure timely delivery and accurate order fulfillment.



Ensuring the smooth running of the Shopify store, making necessary updates, and managing inventory.



Providing support to the team with general Shopify-related tasks, including but not limited to handling returns, updates, and product management.



General oversight of store performance, from order creation to delivery, ensuring all processes run efficiently.



Your profile:



At least 2 years of experience working with Shopify.



In-depth knowledge of Shopify's interface and features (experience with Shopify apps is a big plus).



Comfortable managing orders, products, and customer information within the Shopify platform.



Familiarity with using Shopify to manage inventory, track shipments, and monitor order statuses.



Full-time availability (8 hours a day), with some weekend availability as needed.



Ability to work independently and proactively to ensure the smooth running of the store.



Willingness to learn and be trained for specific tasks within the role.



What can we offer you?



A fully remote position, allowing you to work from anywhere.



A full-time role with flexible hours (48 hours per week).



Salary: $3/hour



The opportunity to be part of a dynamic and rapidly growing team that values open communication and sharing knowledge.



What do we value?



Results-driven mindset: We prioritize getting things done—efficiently and effectively.



Transparency: We believe in open conversations—if there’s a challenge, we talk about it. If we learn something new, we share it.



Ownership: We value people who take ownership of their work and strive to improve continually.



How to apply?

Please apply with the hashtag #SHOPIFYHERO at the end of your cover letter, so we know you’ve read the full description.



Send us an overview of your previous Shopify experience, highlighting how it can benefit our team. We are not looking for standard applications, as we carefully select candidates who align with our values.



Feel free to include your social media profiles to give us a better sense of your digital presence and approach. Show us your previous work and share any results you’ve achieved for past employers.



If you’re ready for this challenge, apply with your CV in English.



We look forward to hearing from you!

title: Virtual Assistant Needed: Copy YouTube Videos Into Exercise Library (Simple Data Entry)
description:
I am looking for a reliable virtual assistant to help with a one-time project transferring approximately 300 YouTube videos into an exercise library for my fitness/physical therapy platform.



This task is simple and mainly involves copying and pasting information, but it requires attention to detail and the ability to follow instructions carefully.



If the work is done well, there may be additional small projects in the future.



Responsibilities:



• Open a provided YouTube video link

• Copy the video title

• Create a new exercise entry in the platform

• Paste the title as the exercise name

• Paste the YouTube link into the video field

• Save the exercise entry

• Repeat for all videos in the list



Requirements:



• Strong attention to detail

• Ability to follow simple instructions exactly

• Familiarity with YouTube and basic web tools

• Reliable internet connection

• Basic English reading comprehension



No advanced technical skills are required. This is primarily a data entry and copy/paste task.



Estimated Time:

Approximately 2–3 hours of work.

This project should take approximately 2–3 hours total, so the expected payment is around $20–30 for the completed task.



Application Instructions:



To confirm that you read the full job description, please start your application message with the word:

PRIMETIME



Applications that do not include this word will not be considered.



Shortlisted applicants will be asked to complete a very small test task (3 videos) before the full project is assigned.

title: PAID SEARCH & SEO STRATEGIST
description:
We're not looking for someone who knows a little about everything. We're looking for someone who can look at an ad account, a keyword list, or a content gap—and immediately know what's wrong and how to fix it.



-



We're a small, focused marketing agency that manages campaigns and digital presence for a select portfolio of products and personal brands. We move fast, care deeply about results, and treat our partners like long-term relationships—not revolving contracts.



Right now we need a paid search and SEO generalist who can own strategy AND execution. Someone who's worked across multiple platforms, can write compelling ad copy and deliver strategy beyond what we see without being asked twice, and genuinely geeks out on attribution, algorithm updates, and what's coming next in AI-driven search.





-----------



Read This Before You Apply 



This role is NOT for you if:

•  You need hand-holding to set up a Google Ads campaign or structure a keyword matrix

•  You've never managed a real budget (not just boosted posts)

•  You struggle to write clean, persuasive copy 

•  You rely on one platform and call yourself a "strategist"

•  You treat SEO as a set-it-and-forget checklist



This IS for you if:

•  You've built PPC campaigns from scratch and have the ROAS to prove it

•  You understand the difference between navigational, informational, and transactional intent—and build content and ads accordingly

•  You follow algorithm updates and AI search developments obsessively

•  You've worked on Pinterest as an ad or organic channel (huge bonus—tell us everything)

•  You write well. Really well. Not just functional copy—but writing that sounds like a person, not a prompt



Listen, somewhere in your application form, use the phrase "search-first" so we know you actually read this post. Applications that skip this will be filtered out automatically. Tip: Put it in quotes and call it out so it stands out.





-----------



What You'll Actually Be Doing



Paid Search (PPC / SEM)

•  Build, manage, and optimize campaigns across Google Ads, Meta Ads, and Microsoft/Bing Ads

•  Conduct keyword research, write ad copy, and structure campaigns for both brand and non-brand terms

•  Own A/B testing: headlines, descriptions, landing page angles, bidding strategies

•  Monitor and report on core KPIs: CTR, CPC, ROAS, conversion rate, Quality Score

•  Identify budget allocation inefficiencies and proactively recommend shifts



SEO & Content Strategy

•  Conduct full technical SEO audits and prioritize fixes by impact

•  Build keyword strategies tied to funnel stages—not just volume

•  Guide or write optimized content briefs; improve on-page metadata, structure, and internal linking

•  Track rankings, organic traffic, and SERP feature wins/losses week-over-week

•  Coordinate with WordPress/Elementor web team on on-page implementations



AiSEO / GEO (Generative Engine Optimization)

•  Stay current on how LLM-driven answers (ChatGPT, Perplexity, Google AI Overviews) cite and surface content

•  Apply GEO tactics: structured data, entity-first content, authoritative sourcing, answer optimization

•  Advise on brand visibility in AI-generated search results and knowledge panels



Pinterest Marketing & Optimization (Initial Priority Project)

•  Build and manage Pinterest Ads campaigns—awareness through conversion

•  Develop organic Pinterest strategy: board architecture, pin cadence, keyword-rich descriptions

•  Understand how Pinterest's search algorithm differs from Google—and exploit those differences

•  Design or brief visual assets that perform (you don't need to design them, but you need to know what converts)

•  Analyze Pinterest Analytics and report on reach, saves, link clicks, and attributed conversions



Strategy & Reporting

•  Deliver concise weekly performance reports with insights—not just data dumps

•  Propose quarterly channel strategies tied to business objectives

•  Flag opportunities and threats proactively—we don't want to hear about problems after the fact





-----------



Core Competency Requirements



Here's what we expect you to have genuine proficiency in. Be honest with yourself—and honest on the application. We verify skills during our paid test project.



Required Platforms & Skills:

•  Google Ads (Search, Display, Shopping, Performance Max)

•  Google Analytics 4 (GA4) — not Universal Analytics

•  Google Search Console

•  Meta Ads Manager 
 + Instagram)

•  SEO toolset proficiency: Ahrefs, SEMrush, Moz, or Surfer SEO

•  Technical SEO: crawl analysis, Core Web Vitals, schema markup, robots.txt, sitemaps

•  Keyword research and clustering methodology

•  Copywriting: ad copy, headlines, CTAs, and long-form content

•  Google Workspace (Docs, Sheets, Slides, Drive)—this is our baseline operating system



Strong Bonus Areas (tell us what applies):

•  Pinterest Ads & organic strategy — this is a near-requirement for our first major project

•  Microsoft/Bing Ads

•  YouTube Ads

•  AI writing tools (ChatGPT, Claude, Jasper, etc.) used as a workflow accelerator—not a replacement for judgment

•  AiSEO / GEO content tactics

•  WordPress + Elementor content publishing

•  E-commerce or DTC brand experience





-----------



Who We're Looking to Align With



Our budget is honest—entry-to-mid level pay with real upside. What we offer in exchange is training investment, meaningful campaigns, and a long-term seat at the table if you're the type who grows with the work.



Strong fits include:

•  A freelance PPC specialist or SEO consultant looking for a stable, ongoing retainer-style engagement

•  A digital marketing generalist from an agency background who can run channels independently

•  A Pinterest-fluent marketer who also understands the broader paid/organic ecosystem

•  A strong writer first who has built up paid and organic search skills over time

•  Someone between gigs or in a career pivot who wants to prove their value at a lower initial rate—then grow into something bigger





-----------



Requirements



•  Reliable computer with stable, fast internet connection

•  Available for video calls 2–3x/week with management (more frequently in the first few weeks)—please ensure a quiet, professional, undistracting environment

•  Willing to submit brief daily activity logs or use our time-tracking system

•  Comfortable adapting to our reporting templates and communication cadence

•  Available 4–8 hours/day consistently at a schedule we agree upon, yet with some flexibility





-----------



Compensation & Long-Term Path



USD $3–$6/hour, depending on experience and skill depth (starting). We pay bi-weekly for the first three pay periods (first 6 weeks) to build mutual trust, then transition to monthly for all occurrences. 



Exceptional and unordinary candidates may open a different compensation discussion pathway, yet we will require a verifiable work history with reference interviews and a strong record of spectacular results. 



We Dance, We Date, We Marry — All contractors enter a one-month probationary period, followed by a three-month (minimum) deeper evaluation before any longer commitment. We do this to ensure mutual fit and find the right seat on the bus for everyone involved. If you deliver results, there's genuine room to grow—additional clients, higher rates, and expanded scope.





-----------



How to Apply



Do not reply here with a generic message. It will not get a response.



1) Complete our application form at: 



2) Then reply HERE on OnlineJobs.ph to confirm you submitted the form. Note your top platform specialty in that reply to indicate you paid attention to details.



We review every form submission and reply to each applicant to let you know if we see you as a current fit or a potential future match. We appreciate you taking the time.





------------------------------------------------------------------



PATHWAYS is an innovative fractional marketing agency in the U.S. We are a small, lean, and focused team that delivers swift and effective solutions. 



Are you wired to see OPPORTUNITY where others see problems?

Are you inclined to discover PATTERNS where others see chaos?

Are you able to see EXPANSION where others see limitation?



And most of all:

Are you undeniably and unapologetically COMMITTED TO YOURSELF and desire to work alongside others with equivalent levels of commitment?



We only work with those who are committed to their path and cultivating their highest potential. We don't do ordinary, and we're not a fit for the uncommitted. If you want to be a part of a dynamic, unified international group that delivers like a team of surgeons or anelite special forces squad, we're looking forward to hearing from you. 



See how clear and thorough we are?  That's what we require from everyone...

title: Senior Shopify Dropshipping Operations Specialist (Customer Support + Product Listing + Meta Ads Setup)
description:
Senior Shopify Dropshipping Operations Specialist

(Customer Support + Product Listing + Meta Ads Setup)



Remote | Full-Time | $5/hour Starting Rate + Bonuses + Salary Growth



We are a fast-growing Shopify dropshipping business operating in the Netherlands and Belgium market.



The business is scaling aggressively and currently processes 100+ orders per day. Daily revenue consistently reaches $8k–$9k and is continuing to grow toward $10k days and beyond.



Because of this growth we are looking for a reliable all-in-one e-commerce operator who can handle several operational tasks with precision and responsibility.



Your work directly impacts customer experience, operational efficiency, and revenue.



This role requires independence, accuracy, and a strong sense of responsibility.



This is not a beginner role.



Hard Requirements



You must have real experience in ALL three of the following areas:



Customer Support (minimum 3 years)

Shopify Product Listing (minimum 3 years)

Meta Ads Campaign Setup (minimum 3 years)



This experience must come from working at one or more dropshipping stores generating at least $100,000 per month.



You must have personally performed these tasks in those stores.



You must be able to prove this experience.



If you do not meet these requirements, please do not apply.



About The Work



Most tasks follow clear instructions, systems and templates.



The work itself is structured and not complicated, but it must always be executed carefully and correctly.



Accuracy and responsibility are extremely important in this role.



Your Responsibilities



Customer Support



Handle customer
s via Google Workspace

Respond to all
s within a maximum of 2 hours

Manage approximately 20–50 customer
s per day

Handle complaints about shipping times, product expectations, and quality issues

Apply our cashback strategy to protect profit

Look up order information inside Shopify

Use internal templates and workflows

Escalate issues when necessary

Perform additional support-related tasks when required



Product Listing



Import and create products in Shopify

Set up product variants correctly

Adjust product titles and descriptions

Translate and adapt product information into Dutch using our ChatGPT workflow

Create and organize product collections

Ensure listings are accurate and consistent

Follow internal listing templates and guidelines

Perform additional store management tasks when needed



Meta Ads Campaign Setup



Set up new Meta advertising campaigns daily according to instructions

Upload creatives

Insert ad copy

Configure campaign settings according to templates

Prepare campaigns so they are ready to run the next day

Organize campaigns clearly inside Ads Manager

Follow internal campaign setup instructions

Perform additional campaign preparation tasks when required



Campaign optimization and data analysis are handled separately. Your responsibility is accurate campaign setup.



Refund Strategy



Our refund strategy protects margins while solving customer problems.



10?shback + customer keeps the product

20?shback if needed

Maximum 30?shback without manager approval



If a customer refuses cashback, they are responsible for returning the product to our warehouse in Asia at their own cost and risk.



The goal is always to minimize refunds while resolving issues professionally.



Tools You Will Use



Shopify

Meta Ads Manager

Google Workspace

ChatGPT workflows

WhatsApp communication

Additional tools may be used when necessary to complete tasks efficiently.



You must be comfortable working with different tools when required.



What We Are Looking For



You must:



Have at least 3 years of dropshipping customer support experience

Have at least 3 years of Shopify product listing experience

Have at least 3 years of Meta ads campaign setup experience

Have worked at dropshipping stores doing at least $100k per month

Be highly detail-oriented and precise

Be able to work independently and take responsibility for your work



The tasks themselves follow clear systems and instructions, but mistakes are not acceptable.



Compensation and Growth



Starting rate: $5 USD per hour



Full-time position.



Performance bonuses available

Salary increases after achieving KPI targets

Long-term opportunity as the business continues to scale



Application Process



We do NOT accept long written applications.



Instead, send a short video via WhatsApp.



Your video must be maximum 5 minutes and answer the following:



Who you are and where you are based

Your experience working with dropshipping stores

The stores you worked for that generated at least $100k per month

Your exact responsibilities in those stores

Your experience with Shopify product listing

Your experience with Meta ads campaign setup

Your experience handling customer support

How you would handle a customer complaining about shipping delays

Why you believe you are the right person for this role

What value you can bring to a fast-scaling business



You must also send:



A list of the dropshipping stores you worked for

Your responsibilities in those stores



Send your video and information via WhatsApp to:




Important



To confirm that you have carefully read this entire job post, start your message with the word SCALING.



Messages that do not start with this word will not be reviewed.



We are building a serious scaling operation. If you have real experience inside profitable dropshipping businesses and can handle operational responsibility with precision, we look forward to hearing from you.

title: GHL Automation Specialist
description:
We run GHL systems for U.S. health, medical and med spa clients, including automations, webhooks, pipelines, and attribution tracking. We are looking for someone who knows GHL deeply and can work independently.



You Need

• Expert knowledge of workflows, custom fields, pipelines

• Deep understanding of webhooks and JSON payload parsing

• Experience connecting GHL to external tools

• Reliable communication skills and ability to deliver on time



To Apply

Record a Loom (10 min max) answering this:



A med spa client has
 leads flowing into 
 through landing pages.   There are two webhooks from the external scheduling software, one when a lead books their appointment,  and another fires when they purchase a treatment or service at their appointment. The revenue data is sent back to GHL through a webhook. Walk through how you would build attribution tracking to capture lead source, UTM data (campaign, source, medium, content, term), and revenue to be stored on the contact or opportunity and fed into a Google Sheet for reporting.



Please make sure you cover: what custom fields you'd create, how'd you ensure properly attribution per campaign, handle duplicates, and how you'd test it without a live lead.



Submit your Loom link to apply.

title: Media Buyer Meta Ads Specialist (Dropshipping Company) – Start as Campaign Launcher, Grow into Media Buyer
description:
Meta Media Buyer (Growth Role)

Start with Campaign Launching, Transition into Media Buying



Type: Part-time with long-term potential

Location: Remote

Markets: United Kingdom (UK) and Australia (AUS)

Platform: Meta Ads 
 and Instagram)

Starting Rate: $6 per hour (campaign launching phase)



About the Role:



We are building and scaling two e-commerce stores (UK and AUS) and are looking for an experienced Meta Ads professional.



This is not a training or junior role.

We are specifically looking for someone who already has hands-on experience as a Media Buyer and as a Campaign Launcher.



You will start by launching campaigns and ads to integrate into our structure and workflow. Over time, and based on proven performance, responsibilities will gradually shift toward full media buying ownership.



Please note:

We do not provide step-by-step training to become a media buyer. You are expected to already understand media buying principles, testing frameworks and decision-making.



Phase 1 Responsibilities – Campaign Launching



In the initial phase, your responsibilities include:

- Launching campaigns, ad sets and ads in Meta Ads Manager

- Setting up creatives (UGC and static), ad copy, links, UTMs, pixels, events, countries and placements

- Adding new ads to active campaigns

- Following strict campaign structures and naming conventions

- Working in ClickUp to identify which campaigns and ads are ready to go live

- Ensuring all launches are correct, structured and error-free

- Communicating clearly when campaigns are live or if issues are identified



Phase 2 Responsibilities – Media Buying (Gradual Transfer)



Once alignment, trust and performance are proven, responsibilities may expand to:

- Analyzing performance metrics (CPA, ROAS, CTR, creative performance)

- Making decisions on scaling, pausing and testing

- Managing budgets and campaign structures

- Coordinating with founders and creative team

- Taking increasing ownership of account performance

- The transition to full media buying responsibility happens only when capability and consistency are demonstrated.



Required Experience (Mandatory)



Please apply only if you have:

- Proven experience as a Meta Media Buyer

- Proven experience launching campaigns and ads in Meta Ads Manager

- Hands-on experience with e-commerce or dropshipping stores

- Experience with European, UK and/or AUS markets is a strong advantage

- Experience working with ClickUp or similar task management tools



Strong understanding of:

- testing and scaling structures

- creatives and hooks

- Funnelish funnels and offers



Skills and Work Style:

- Structured and disciplined approach

- Detail-oriented and precise

- Comfortable working independently

- Takes responsibility for execution quality

- Clear and professional communicator

- Long-term collaboration mindset



Availability:

- Available before and during EU and AUS daytime working hours

- Consistent weekly availability

- No night shifts



Compensation



Campaign Launching Phase:

- $6 per hour

- Part-time, consistent weekly workload



Media Buying Phase:

- Transition to a fixed monthly compensation

- Compensation based on scope, responsibility and performance

- Long-term role for the right candidate



How to Apply



Please include in your application:

- A short introduction

- Your experience as a Meta Media Buyer (years and type of accounts)

- Your experience launching Meta campaigns and ads

- E-commerce or dropshipping stores you have worked with

- Experience with EU, UK or AUS markets

- Your availability (hours per week and time zone)



Applications without clear, relevant experience details will not be reviewed.

title: Graphic Designer
description:
About PixelBull

PixelBull is a U.S.-based creative studio working with growing tech and B2B companies. We

handle digital ads, print materials, landing page layouts, and presentations.

We move fast. We hire fast. We’re a small, fun team with no corporate politics.

You’ll work directly with our Creative Director and help execute creative across multiple

projects.

What You’ll Be Designing

 Digital ad creatives

 Illustrations & Branding

 Landing page layouts (Figma)

 Presentation decks (PowerPoint & Google Slides)

 Print materials (flyers, brochures, booth graphics)

 Social graphics and marketing assets



Required Skills

You must have experience with:

 Figma

 Adobe Illustrator

 Adobe InDesign

 Adobe Photoshop

 PowerPoint

Google Slides





You must also:

Have solid typography and layout skills

Understand basic print production specs (bleed, margins, exports)

Speak English (written & spoken)

Be organized and responsive

Overlap at least 2 hours with New York time





What We’re Looking For

Someone detail-oriented

Someone fast and reliable

Someone who can take direction and execute cleanly

Someone who enjoys working in a small, growing team



Why Join PixelBull?

 Fast hiring process

 Direct collaboration with Creative Director

  Variety of real client work

 Room to grow with the company



How to Apply

Please send:

1. Portfolio (must include digital + print work) If no portfolio well not check application.

2. Your time zone

3. Your availability (full-time, part-time, freelance)

4. A short intro about yourself

We are reviewing applications immediately.

--------------------------------------------------------------------------------

Hiring Process

We move quickly.

1. Intro Interview (15–20 minutes): A short conversation to get to know you, review your

experience, and answer questions.

2. Paid Test Task: If there’s a strong fit, we’ll provide a short paid design assignment to

evaluate quality, attention to detail, and communication.

3. Final Decision: If everything aligns, we move forward fast.

We respect your time and aim to keep the process efficient and straightforward.

title: Lead Generation
description:
Overview



We are seeking a detail-oriented researcher responsible for identifying high-quality group sales opportunities for multiple hotels.



This role focuses on researching organizations, events, and businesses that may require hotel rooms, meeting space, catering, breakfast service, networking events, or group accommodations.



This is not a sales role. The primary responsibility is to find strong leads, organize them clearly, and deliver them to hotel teams each week.



The most important part of this job is quality research and attention to detail.



Key Responsibilities

Lead Research



Research organizations and events that may require:



Hotel room blocks



Corporate meetings



Training programs



Conferences



Networking events



Sports tournaments



Wedding accommodations



Long-term crew stays



Focus on organizations most likely to generate:



corporate meetings



networking events



training programs



sports tournaments



conferences



construction crew stays



wedding-related room blocks



Examples include:



Corporate training companies



Professional associations



Regional conferences



Sports tournaments



Wedding planners



Construction companies



Engineering firms



Government contractors



Business networking groups



Lead Data Collection



Leads must be:



Organized clearly by hotel

Recorded accurately in the lead tracking spreadsheet

Free of duplicates

Proper organization is critical so hotel teams can easily review and contact potential opportunities.



Weekly Lead Delivery



Each week, lead lists must be exported into Excel and
ed to the appropriate hotel teams.

The
 should include:

The attached lead list

A short explanation that the list includes organizations or events that may require hotel rooms, meetings, or group accommodations

A request to confirm receipt of the lead list



Weekly Reporting

A weekly lead report must be prepared showing:



Hotels that received leads

Number of leads delivered

Confirmation that the hotel teams received the lists



Research Tools

Common research sources include:



LinkedIn

Google Maps

Chamber of Commerce directories

Eventbrite

Meetup

Association directories

Sports tournament websites

WeddingWire

The Knot

Local event calendars



Required Skills

Strong online research skills

Excellent attention to detail

Ability to identify high-quality leads rather than random contacts

Strong organization and spreadsheet skills

Ability to follow structured processes

Ability to work independently and meet weekly deadlines

title: Sales Development Representative (Interior Design)
description:
*Do not reach out to the website - only applications submitted via OnlineJobs will be considered*



West Village Interior (
) is a high-end interior design firm serving offices, retail stores and homeowners in New York City. We specialize in transforming spaces with luxury designs, tailored aesthetics, and expert craftsmanship. Our clientele includes realtors, homebuilders, contractors, and property developers who seek high-quality interior design solutions. We are looking for a high-energy, results-driven Sales Development Representative  to generate leads, build relationships, and close sales with NYC-based clients.



What You’ll Be Doing

1. Make 20-30 outbound calls per day to NYC-area real estate professionals.

2. Follow up with warm leads to book design consultations.

3. Maintain a structured pipeline using CRM tools to track leads, calls, follow-ups, and closed deals.

4. Conduct 30-40 design consultations per month through direct outreach and follow-ups.

5. Build strategic referral partnerships with NYC-based realtors, contractors, and home stagers.

6. Convert leads into 2-4 closed sales per month, with project sizes ranging from $5,000 - $25,000.



What We’re Looking For

1. 3+ years of experience in sales, real estate, home services, or interior design sales.

2. Strong ability to sell high-ticket services to affluent clients.

3. Fluent in English with a neutral or American-accented tone.

4. Ability to build trust with NYC homeowners and handle objections effectively.

5. Self-motivated and results-driven, comfortable with a commission plus salary role.

6. Familiarity with CRM tools, cold-calling software, and lead-tracking systems.

7. Comfortable using
, LinkedIn, and online communities for lead generation.

8. Must be available to work NYC business hours (9amET - 5pmET).



Compensation & Earnings Potential 

This role includes a reasonable base salary for stability while still offering uncapped commissions. Salary of $1k-$1.5k plus commissions of $500-$1.5k per month, averaging $1.7k to $2.5k per month total.



Why Join Us?

- Team is already doing 3+ closes per month with no salespeople.

- Fully remote work with flexible scheduling, selling in a thriving NYC market.

- Unlimited earning potential with no salary caps.

- Support and training provided, including call scripts, sales training, and marketing materials.



To be considered you must submit a voice recording, resume and portfolio if available.

description:

DO NOT REACH OUT VIA OUR WEBSITE - any
s sent outside of onlinejobs will be immediately disqualified



About Us:

West Village Interior (
/) is a modern interior design company with a commitment to pushing the boundaries of design. We create innovative and captivating spaces that leave a lasting impression. Our team thrives on creativity and seeks to redefine the world of interior design.



Position Overview:

We’re looking for a detail-oriented Interior Design Project Coordinator with a strong grasp of the design process and a passion for project estimation, organization, and execution. This role is perfect for someone who enjoys the operational side of design—tracking deadlines, coordinating deliverables, supporting client updates, and managing vendors or contractors. It’s a hybrid role: part design, part operations, and fully essential to our process.



This is a part-time or seasonal role, with the possibility of growing into a full-time position.



Key Responsibilities:

1. Project Coordination: Track and manage timelines, schedules, and client updates across multiple interior design projects.

2. Estimation & Selling: Assist with scope definitions, cost estimations, sourcing quotes, and pricing. Love to upsell

3. Client Design Support: Communicate project updates clearly in written and spoken English; anticipate needs and flag delays proactively. Ability to modify renders and sourcing lists.

4. Design Documentation: Assist with floor plans, 3D models, and sourcing materials (you won’t be solely responsible for design, but a working knowledge helps).

5. Task Management: Organize action items, coordinate between design and sourcing teams, and escalate issues that may impact timelines.



Qualifications:

5+ years of full-time professional experience, preferably in design, construction coordination, or interior project management.

1. Strong English speaking *Required*

2. A portfolio showcasing your interior design work. *Required* 

3. Prior experience with US-based homeowners, companies or contractors *Preferred, please note in application*

4. Prior experience working night shift preferred

5. Ability to produce floor plans, 3d renderings and CAD drawings. Preferred, but not required are tools such as AutoCAD, SketchUp, Adobe Creative Suite.

6. Project management experience

7. Please note any managerial experience - not required



Compensation:

Competitive compensation and flexible work arrangements. All hires are part-time to start ($5/hour). At full-time, $700 - $1,250 total compensation (figures include annual bonus) depending on years experience after university, English level. 



Expectations:

Part-time shifts can work anytime. Full-time shifts: 9am-5pm ET. Either Tues - Sat or Mon - Fri



How to Apply:

Please also send a link to a cloud-based folder containing a voice recording of you reading your cover letter stating preference for full-time or part-time work, your resume, portfolio, and a brief cover letter detailing your experience. Also tell us how many years you spent managing clients. Indicate interest in part-time or full-time work. Without this, you will not be considered.



We look forward to seeing how your creativity and expertise can help us continue to redefine interior design!
