title: Cold Caller - 30 Calls Per Hour Minimum
description:
OVERVIEW



Your role is simple.



Call companies that sell annuities and ask if they want annuity leads.



The goal of every call is one thing only:



Find advisors who are interested in buying annuity leads.



Once they say yes, collect their name + phone number +
 so Max can follow up.



Do not overcomplicate the conversation.



CALLING SYSTEM



You will be calling using CloudTalk.



We will give you:



• Your own CloudTalk login

• A phone number assigned to you

• Access to the dialer



All calls must be made through CloudTalk.



CALL SPEED EXPECTATION



Minimum pace:



30 calls per hour



The job is simple and fast.



Calls should be short.



Move quickly from one call to the next.



VOI
S (VERY IMPORTANT)



Voi
s are actually preferred.



Why?



Because many advisors:



• Listen to the voi
 later

• Call back when they are free



Voi
 leads often convert well.



If the call goes to voi
, leave a voi
 whenever possible.



VOI
 SCRIPT



Example:



"Hi, this is calling about annuity leads. We generate annuity clients for advisors through our own ad spend and are looking for partners who want more annuity business. Call or text back if interested."



Short and simple.



WHAT WE SELL



We sell:



• Annuity leads

• Exclusive leads

• High-intent prospects

• Leads generated from our own ad spend



The advisor buys leads and then sells annuities to the client.



You are not selling the leads.



You are only finding advisors interested in buying leads.



WHO WE CALL



We only call financial advisors / insurance agents that sell annuities.



Examples:



• Financial advisors

• Insurance agencies

• Retirement planners

• Wealth advisors

• Independent agents



WHERE TO FIND THEM



Use:



• Google

• Google Maps

• LinkedIn

• Insurance directories



Search examples:



“annuity advisor near me”

“retirement planner”

“insurance agent annuities”

“financial advisor retirement planning”



You must be able to find businesses yourself using Google.



CALL SCRIPT



Keep it extremely simple.



Example:



"Hi, quick question. Do you currently work with annuities?"



(wait for answer)



If yes:



"The reason I'm calling is we generate annuity leads from our own ad spend and we're looking for advisors who want more annuity clients."



"Is that something you'd be open to?"



If they say yes:



"Perfect. Let me grab your information so Max can send details."



Collect:



• Name

• Phone

•

• Company



Then send it to Max.



WHAT COUNTS AS A LEAD



A lead counts if:



• They sell annuities

• They say they are interested in leads

• They give contact information



Send:



Name

Company

Phone




PAY STRUCTURE



You are paid based on qualified interested advisors.



Qualified means:



• They sell annuities

• They want leads

• They give contact information



More qualified leads = more pay.



TEST PERIOD



New callers go through a performance test period.



During the test we measure:



• Calls per hour

• Call consistency

• Leads generated

• Work speed



IMPORTANT



This job is a numbers game.



Most people will say no.



That is normal.



High call volume = leads.



FINAL NOTES



Always:



• Use CloudTalk for calls

• Leave voi
s whenever possible

• Keep calls short

• Stay polite

• Move quickly to the next call



Your only job is to find advisors interested in annuity leads.



Max handles the rest.



Before continuing with the job application, please answer the following questions:



Are you able to consistently make 30 calls per hour without complaints, slowing down, or losing 
ntum?



This role requires staying focused and moving quickly from one call to the next for most of the day. Are you comfortable spending long periods simply calling, keeping conversations short, and maintaining a fast pace?



The job is very simple: ask advisors if they want annuity leads and connect interested ones with our lead generation team. Are you able to follow this exact process without adding unnecessary steps?



Are you able to find businesses to call using Google and Google Maps throughout the day, without needing pre-made autodialing lists?

title: Amazon PPC Specialist for CPG Brand (Skinny Gum)
description:
We are looking for an experienced Amazon PPC specialist to manage and optimize advertising campaigns for our private label brand, Skinny Gum. The goal is to drive profitable sales growth while maintaining efficient ad spend and strong ROI.



This role requires someone who understands Amazon advertising strategy, keyword research, and listing optimization to maximize campaign performance.



Responsibilities



Launch, manage, and optimize Amazon PPC campaigns (Sponsored Products, Sponsored Brands, Sponsored Display)



Conduct in-depth keyword research to identify high-converting keywords



Continuously optimize bids, budgets, and targeting to maximize ROAS and minimize wasted spend



Monitor performance metrics such as ACOS, TACOS, CTR, and conversion rates



Identify profitable scaling opportunities while maintaining efficient ad spend



Audit and optimize existing Amazon listings to improve conversion rates



Provide weekly performance reports and strategy recommendations



Requirements



Proven experience managing Amazon PPC campaigns for private label brands



Strong understanding of Amazon advertising metrics (ACOS, TACOS, ROAS, CTR)



Experience with keyword research tools and Amazon Seller Central



Ability to run profitable campaigns with controlled budgets



Knowledge of Amazon listing optimization (titles, bullets, backend keywords)



Analytical mindset with a data-driven approach



Preferred Qualifications



Experience working with CPG or supplement brands



Experience launching and scaling new Amazon products



Familiarity with tools like Helium 10, Jungle Scout, or similar



Goal of This Role



Help Skinny Gum scale profitably on Amazon by building efficient PPC campaigns that generate strong sales while keeping advertising costs low.

title: Tech Savvy Operations Coordinator
description:
About Zero Interest Mastery:

 Zero Interest Mastery (ZIM) is a fast-growing company dedicated to helping entrepreneurs funding to launch, scale, and grow their businesses. We support clients in the United States through innovative funding strategies and world-class customer experience. 



Role Overview:

 We’re seeking a highly organized and tech-savvy Operations & Systems Coordinator. This role is responsible for keeping operations running smoothly, managing CRM and communication systems, supporting the sales team, and implementing processes that drive efficiency. This is a key role for someone who is proactive, detail-oriented, and thrives in a fast-paced, evolving environment. You'll be helping build an operations training module from the ground up, so being a fast learner with a strong "figure-it-out" mindset is essential. This role requires someone who can take initiative, solve problems independently, and create structure where there currently isn't any.



Key Responsibilities:

Operations & Team Support:

Human Resources & Employee Operations

Manage new hire contracts and ensure timely execution

Oversee new employee onboarding, including:

Setting up account access for all company platforms (Gmail, Zoho, Slack, Calendly, Zoom, Loom, GoHighLevel, etc.)

Creating streamlined onboarding processes and documentation

Maintain employee records and support HR administrative needs

CRM & Systems Management

Serve as primary admin for Zoho CRM

Manage forms, dashboards, reports, workflows, and automations

Build and optimize systems to improve efficiency

Implement new features and support special projects





Platform & Tech Oversight

Manage and troubleshoot all company platforms (scheduling, communication, payments, docs, automations, etc.)

Ensure integrations between systems are working properly

Proactively identify and resolve technical issues

Collaborate with technical partners on integrations and improvements





Process & Documentation

Create and maintain SOPs and training materials

Document workflows and system processes

Continuously improve and scale internal operations





Marketing & Project Support (Optional/As Needed):

Assist with marketing media management and sales funnel updates

Support content updates





Requirements:

Experience with Zoho CRM, GoHighLevel (GHL), and Zapier is HIGHLY preferred

Highly organized with exceptional attention to detail

Tech-savvy and comfortable navigating CRMs, automation tools, and communications platforms

Strong problem-solving skills and ability to troubleshoot independently

Excellent English written and verbal communication

Self-starter who can manage multiple tasks and prioritize effectively

Previous experience in operations, admin, or sales support is preferred





Why Join Us:

Work in a fast-growing company with opportunities for growth

Flexible remote work environment

Be part of a team that values initiative, efficiency, and results



How to Apply:

Please submit your resume and a brief cover letter explaining:

Experience with Zoho CRM, and any other tech experience you have

Why would you be a good fit for this role?

title: Content Creator & Social Media Strategist | Insurance | Financial Service
description:
Content Creator & Social Media Strategist — US Financial Services Firm

Insurance, Employee Benefits & Wealth Management Industry

Company:  Financial and insurance employee benefits firm

Location: Remote (Philippines preferred)

Hours: 20-30 hours/week with potential to grow to full-time

Compensation: $8–$12/hour USD depending on financial services content experience

Schedule: Flexible — must overlap with US Eastern Time for at least 2-3 hours daily



This Is NOT a Generic Social Media VA Role

We are looking for someone who can THINK and WRITE about insurance, employee benefits, retirement planning, and financial strategy — not just schedule posts someone else wrote.

If you've worked for an insurance agency, financial advisor, benefits brokerage, wealth management firm, or any professional services company in the US market and you created the actual content (not just posted it), keep reading. This role is built for you.

If your experience is limited to e-commerce, dropshipping, or consumer brand social media, this is not the right fit.



About Us

We are a financial services firm based in New Jersey, USA, operating two brands:

 — Employee benefits consulting for businesses (group health insurance, dental, vision, retirement plans like 401(k), voluntary benefits, ACA compliance). We serve medical practices, homecare agencies, auto dealerships, and growing businesses across NJ and NY and other states.

 — Wealth management, retirement planning, cash balance plans, life insurance strategies, disability insurance, estate planning, and executive benefits for high-income professionals — especially physicians, dentists, and business owners.

We are aggressively expanding into multiple market verticals and need a content professional who can generate high-quality thought leadership content, manage our social media presence across both brands, and help us become the most visible financial advisor in our market.



What You'll Do

Content Generation (50% of your time)

This is the core of the role. You will generate original content — not just repost articles or schedule pre-written material. You will:



Write 8-10 LinkedIn posts per week for the founder's personal profile  — thought leadership on retirement planning, employee benefits strategy, physician financial planning, insurance insights, and industry trends

Write 4-6 LinkedIn posts per week for two company pages  — educational content, service highlights, case study summaries, event promotions

Draft monthly
 newsletter content for both brands (distributed via Zoho Campaigns)

Write
 drip sequence copy for prospect nurture campaigns (5-7
 sequences targeting physicians, homecare agencies, and general business owners)

Create content for landing pages on both websites when needed

Draft scripts for short-form video content (60-90 second educational videos for LinkedIn)

Develop content calendar 2 weeks in advance for both brands

Research industry trends, regulatory changes (NJ/NY retirement mandates, ACA updates, wage parity changes), and competitor content to inform our content strategy



You will use AI tools (Claude, ChatGPT, Jasper) to accelerate your content creation — we encourage this. But the output must be polished, human, and sound like a real financial advisor talking to business owners and physicians. AI-generated content that sounds robotic or generic is not acceptable. You are the editor, quality controller, and voice shaper.

Social Media Execution (30% of your time)



Post all content on schedule across LinkedIn (personal profile + 2 company pages)

Send 25-40 personalized LinkedIn connection requests per day to target prospects: physicians, practice managers, HR directors, homecare agency owners, dental practice owners, and business owners in NJ and NY and other states

Write personalized connection request messages (not the default LinkedIn message — custo
ssages that reference the person's role, company, or recent post)

Engage authentically on LinkedIn: comment on 10-20 target prospects' posts daily with thoughtful, value-adding comments (not "Great post!" — real insights)

Respond to all comments on our posts within 4 hours

Monitor LinkedIn DMs and route qualified inquiries to the sales team (you'll flag them in Zoho CRM or via WhatsApp to Alex)

Manage
 
 ad content (create ad copy variations, suggest audience refinements)

Coordinate posting on 
 and
 for local community engagement



Strategy & Reporting (20% of your time)



Track weekly metrics: LinkedIn impressions, engagement rate, follower growth, profile views, connection acceptance rate,
 open/click rates

Identify top-performing content themes and recommend doubling down on what works

Research what other financial advisors, insurance brokers, and benefits consultants are posting on LinkedIn — competitive intelligence

Suggest new content formats, topics, and campaign ideas based on performance data and industry trends

Prepare a weekly content performance report (Google Sheet) every Friday

Attend a weekly 30-minute strategy call with Principal to review performance and plan upcoming content





Industry Knowledge We Need

You don't need to be a licensed insurance agent or financial advisor. But you DO need to understand these concepts well enough to write about them credibly:

Employee Benefits :



Group health insurance (how employers buy health coverage for their staff)

Dental and vision insurance plans

Voluntary benefits: critical illness, a
 insurance, hospital indemnity, supplemental life

401(k) retirement plans and how they work for small businesses

ACA (Affordable Care Act) employer mandate basics

Open enrollment and employee benefits enrollment process



Financial Planning :



Retirement planning for high-income professionals

Cash balance plans and defined benefit plans (you'll learn this — it's our specialty product)

Life insurance as a wealth transfer and estate planning tool

Disability insurance (especially "own-occupation" coverage for physicians)

Buy-sell agreements and key person insurance for business owners

Basic estate planning concepts (trusts, wealth transfer, estate tax)



Regulatory/Compliance awareness:



NJ RetireReady mandate (state retirement savings requirement)

NY Secure Choice Savings Program (state IRA mandate)

NY Wage Parity Law for homecare agencies

SECURE 2.0 Act tax credits for retirement plans

General awareness that financial services content has compliance review requirements (FINRA) — you don't manage compliance, but you need to understand that content must be reviewed before posting and cannot make performance promises or guarantees



If you've worked for a US insurance agency, financial advisory firm, employee benefits brokerage, or wealth management company and you wrote content about any of the above — you are exactly who we're looking for.

If you haven't worked in financial services but you're a strong B2B content writer who learns fast and can research industry topics thoroughly — we're open to that too, as long as your writing samples demonstrate the ability to write credibly about complex professional topics.



Required Skills



Exceptional written English — your content goes out under the name of a financial professional. It must be polished, authoritative, and free of errors.

LinkedIn content creation experience — you've written LinkedIn posts for a professional services company or executive (not personal blogging — B2B thought leadership)

Understanding of LinkedIn algorithm basics — you know that engagement in the first hour matters, that personal profiles outperform company pages, that comments drive reach more than likes

Canva proficiency — create professional graphics for LinkedIn posts,
 headers, and marketing materials

AI content tool experience — you use Claude, ChatGPT, Jasper, or similar to accelerate your work (we view this as a strength, not a shortcut)

Self-directed work ethic — you manage your own content calendar and don't need daily reminders to post

Ability to write in multiple brand voices — Kandelaki Solutions (approachable, benefits-focused, employer-friendly) vs.  (premium, sophisticated, physician/executive-focused)



Preferred Experience



2+ years creating content for a US insurance agency, financial advisor, benefits broker, or wealth management firm

Experience with Zoho Campaigns or similar
 marketing platform (Mailchimp, ActiveCampaign, HubSpot)

Experience with LinkedIn Sales Navigator

Understanding of the US healthcare system (enough to write about group health insurance intelligently)

Experience writing for physician or medical practice audiences

Video content creation (scripting, basic editing with CapCut or similar)

Experience with Google Analytics or LinkedIn Analytics for content performance tracking





Compensation & Growth

Starting rate: $8–$12/hour USD



$8-$9/hour: Strong B2B content writer with some financial services exposure, willing to learn the industry

$9-$10/hour: Proven financial services or insurance content experience with LinkedIn portfolio samples

$10-$12/hour: 2+ years creating content for US financial advisors or insurance agencies with demonstrable results (follower growth, lead generation from content)



Hours: 20-30 hours/week to start, potential full-time for exceptional performers

Payment: Bi-weekly via Wise, Payoneer, or direct bank transfer

Quarterly bonus: $100-$300 based on content performance metrics (LinkedIn growth,
 engagement, content-attributed leads)

Growth path: As we scale, this role can evolve into a Marketing Manager position overseeing additional content creators and managing our complete digital marketing strategy across multiple verticals.



How to Apply

Send the following (applications without ALL items will not be reviewed):

1. Your resume — PDF format

2. Financial services content samples — provide ONE of the following:



Links to 3+ LinkedIn posts you wrote for a financial advisor, insurance agency, or professional services company

A PDF portfolio showing content you created for financial services clients

Links to blog posts or articles you wrote on insurance, retirement planning, or employee benefits topics

If you don't have financial services samples: provide 3 B2B content samples from any professional services industry (legal, accounting, healthcare, consulting) that demonstrate your ability to write about complex topics credibly



3. LinkedIn profile link — your personal LinkedIn profile so we can see your own professional presence

4. Writing test — complete these TWO tasks:

Task A: Write a LinkedIn post (
words) on this topic: "Why physicians who own their medical practice should consider adding a cash balance plan on top of their 401(k) to shelter $150,000+ per year from taxes." Write it as if you are a financial advisor speaking directly to doctors. Professional but conversational — not salesy, not academic.

Task B: Write a LinkedIn connection request message (under 300 characters — LinkedIn's limit) that you would send to the owner of a homecare agency in New Jersey. The goal is to get them to accept the connection and eventually visit our website for a free benefits review. Make it personal and specific, not generic.

5. Your availability — confirm hours per week and timezone overlap with US Eastern Time

6. Your expected hourly rate within the posted range



What We're NOT Looking For



Content spinners who rewrite articles from other websites

Social media managers whose experience is only consumer brands, influencers, or e-commerce

People who will use AI to generate everything and submit it without editing or quality control

Anyone who cannot write at a native English level (this is non-negotiable for a role where content goes out under a financial professional's name)

People looking for a short-term gig — this is a long-term team position





About Working With Us

We are direct communicators. We give clear, honest feedback — both when things are great and when they need improvement. We expect you to take ownership of content quality and social media performance as if your name were on it.

In return, we pay reliably and on time, respect your schedule and personal time, invest in your professional development, give you creative latitude to experiment and improve, and treat you as a valued tea
mber — not a replaceable task-doer.

If you're a talented content creator who wants to specialize in financial services marketing with a growing US firm that will challenge you and value your work, we want to hear from you.

title: Social Media Research & Admin Assistant
description:
Hi, I’m looking for a highly organised, detail-focused Social Media Research & Admin Assistant to support me with content and social media-related admin tasks.



This is a part-time role for someone who is strong with data entry, Excel/spreadsheets, research, and written communication, and who can work accurately without making careless mistakes.



A big part of the role will involve tasks such as identifying and logging brand mentions from comments on my content, keeping spreadsheets updated and organised, preventing duplication, and helping with research tasks related to creators and content ideas. The exact tasks may evolve over time, so I’m looking for someone who is comfortable with structured admin work, repetitive detail-heavy tasks, and research-based work.



This role is not for a generic VA who sends copy-paste applications and needs chasing. I want someone reliable, switched on, process-driven, and easy to work with.



What You’ll Do

- Support me with social media and content-related admin tasks

- Carry out accurate data entry and keep spreadsheets clean, organised, and up to date

- Log information properly and make sure there are no duplicates or missing details

- Help with research tasks, including finding relevant creators and identifying strong-performing content

- Follow instructions carefully and communicate clearly via WhatsApp

- Keep recurring work updated by the required deadline each week

- Handle repetitive tasks with consistency and attention to detail

- Flag anything unclear, missing, duplicated, or potentially incorrect rather than guessing



What I’m Looking For

- Excellent written English

- Strong spoken English comprehension

- Very good with Excel / spreadsheets / data entry

- Highly organised and process-driven

- Strong attention to detail and able to work accurately

- Comfortable doing admin-heavy and research-heavy work

- Good communication without needing constant follow-up

- Able to work independently and manage their own time

- Reliable, consistent, and not careless



Expectations

- Part-time role

- Around 8–10 hours per week

- Work can be done on your own schedule

- Weekly work must be fully up to date by Sunday

- Communication must be clear and reasonably responsive through WhatsApp

- Accuracy matters more than rushing and making mistakes

title: Sales And Customer Service Manager
description:
Job Title: Sales And Customer Service Manager



Location: Remote



Hours: Monday-Friday, 8-5 Central Standard Time. Full Time (40 hours per week).



Company Overview



Everblue Pond is based in the United States.



Everblue Pond is a pioneering online pond and lake store dedicated to guiding customers to the right products and solutions. With a focus on selling highly technical products that require intricate electrical configurations, we pride ourselves on our unmatched customer service and technical expertise. Established for 3 years, our mission is to surpass competitors in customer care, embodying values of integrity, strong relationships, and exceptional service. As a small, family-owned business, we uphold the highest standards of ethics and professionalism, striving to build positive and honest relationships with our customers, dealers, and vendors while driving revenue and business growth.



Role Summary



As a key player in our company, the Sales and Customer Service Manager will be the face of Everblue Pond, leading day-to-day operations and driving our mission forward. This role requires a unique blend of tech savvy, sales and customer service skills. You will guide customers through thorough product selection, manage customer service issues, and forge strong supplier and customer relationships—all while operating remotely.



Primary Responsibilities



-Guide customers through the sales process via phone, providing technical advice and solutions while generating and closing sales.

-Handle customer service inquiries, troubleshooting, and warranty claims.

-Develop and maintain relationships with suppliers, HOAs, contractors, and business customers.

-Process orders, fulfillments, and returns through Shopify.

-Create sales materials and update website when needed.

-Participate in and contribute to ongoing training and professional development.



Candidate Requirements



-Strong problem-solving skills and technical aptitude.

-Experience in sales and customer service preferred.

-Ability to learn and apply technical information.

-Proficient in relationship-building and sales closing strategies.

-Self-motivated with extreme ownership, good judgment, and decision-making skills.

-Excellent communication and interpersonal skills, comfortable with confrontation and capable of closing sales.

-Must have a reliable computer and internet connection for remote work.

-A self-starter attitude is critical. We seek someone who actively seeks solutions, approaches challenges creatively, and shows -exceptional judgment in autonomous decision-making while learning quickly.



Benefits/Compensation



-$16,000-$18,000 Salary + Commission (based on monthly sales volume)

-Flexible, remote working environment.

-Opportunities for professional development and growth within the company.

-This will be a Full Time contractor position estimated at 40 working hours per week.



Our Culture



At Everblue Pond, we believe in empowering our tea
mbers to make decisions and learn from their experiences. We value open communication, teamwork, and a culture of continuous improvement. Our daily operations are grounded in our core values, and we strive to deliver the “Wow” factor in everything we do.



Application Process



Please follow these directions to apply for this position. Any applications that do not follow these steps will be immediately disqualified.



1.) Send an
 to 

2.) The subject line of your response must be "Sales And Customer Service Manager"

3.) Write one paragraph of 3 lines or less in black font and tell me about yourself.

4.) Write a second paragraph of 3 lines or less in blue size 14 font about why you would be a great fit for this role.

5.) Include your resume as an attachment in the
.



If you're a proactive problem solver with a technical edge and a passion for sales and customer service, we'd love to hear from you! Everblue Pond is more than just a business; it's a family committed to excellence, integrity, and our customers. Join us in making a difference together.



Job Types: Full-time, Contract



Benefits:



-Flexible schedule

-On-the-job training

-Paid time off and paid holidays

-Work from home



Work Location: Remote

title: Short-Form Video Editor – Renovation & DIY Content
description:
Hi, I’m looking for a highly organised, detail-focused Short-Form Video Editor to support me with editing content for social media.



This is a part-time role for someone who is strong with short-form video editing, clip selection, pacing, audio cleanup, and written/spoken English comprehension, and who can work accurately without making careless mistakes.



The role will involve editing 2 main types of content:



Voice-over videos - where you’ll need to go through my footage, understand the voice-over, and find the most relevant clips to match what is being said in the script or the most interesting clips if nothing is completely relevant.



Simple talking-head edits - where you’ll take existing clips and clean them up by removing mistakes, dead space, and awkward gaps in the audio.



I’m looking for someone who can follow instructions well, keep edits clean and engaging, and communicate clearly. This role is not for a generic editor who just throws clips together and hopes for the best. I want someone reliable, switched on, detail-focused and has good communication about how the edits are going or any problems.



What You’ll Do

- Edit short-form videos for social media

- Create voice-over led videos by matching the narration to relevant on-screen clips

- Edit simple talking or action-based videos by cutting out mistakes, pauses, dead space, and awkward audio gaps

- Keep edits clean, engaging, and easy to watch

- Follow instructions carefully and communicate clearly via WhatsApp

- Deliver work by the required deadline (typically a 12 hour turn-around time)

- Handle repetitive editing work with consistency and attention to detail

- Flag anything unclear, missing, or potentially incorrect rather than guessing



What I’m Looking For

- Strong experience with short-form video editing

- Excellent written English

- Strong spoken English comprehension

- Strong understanding of pacing, clip choice, and keeping videos engaging

- Able to understand a voice-over and match footage to it properly

- Strong attention to detail and able to edit accurately

- Good communication without needing constant follow-up

- Able to work independently and manage your own time

- Reliable, consistent, and not careless



Expectations

- Part-time role

- Videos normally need to be sent back with 12 hours 

- Communication must be clear and reasonably responsive through WhatsApp

- Accuracy and good judgment matter more than rushing and making sloppy edits

- You should be comfortable with work that requires consistency, patience, and close attention to detail

- You must be able to follow the intended style of the content and keep edits clean and watchable

- When required, you must be able to follow and recreate reference videos



Pay & Terms

- Track time with Timeproof

- Paid every 2 weeks

- Payment sent on Sunday UK time

- Payment method: PayPal

- Long-term role for the right person

- Opportunity for pay rises and bonuses over time if you are reliable and perform well



How to Apply

- To apply, your application must include this exact sentence somewhere in it:

“Benje I want to edit your short-form videos and I wrote this application myself”



Also include:

- A link to voice over, talking head and any other good videos you've done before (don't send me a full portfolio with nothing relevant in it or make me have to go through loads of videos)

- A short paragraph explaining why you think you’d be a good fit for this role



Applications that are generic, careless, or clearly copy-pasted will not be considered.

title: Direct Response Ad Copywriter for Health/Supplement Brand (DTC)
description:
We're a seven-figure direct-to-consumer supplement brand and we're scaling fast through paid ads. We need a copywriter who already knows how to sell through words, not someone who's looking to "learn copywriting." If you've never written an ad that actually got someone to pull out their wallet, this probably isn't for you.



What you'll actually be doing:



?? Writing direct response ad scripts at volume, multiple hooks, multiple angles, multiple formats



?? Studying winning ads from other brands, breaking down why they work, and applying those frameworks to our products



?? Researching our audience like your life depends on it, forums, reviews, Reddit threads, Amazon comments, all of it, until you know exactly how they talk and what keeps them up at night



?? Writing advertorials and listicle content that warms up cold traffic and gets people to buy



?? Iterating quickly based on what the data says, not based on what you think sounds clever



What you need to bring to the table:



?? At least 6 months of real experience writing ads for an ecommerce brand or supplement brand, not blog posts, not SEO content, not Instagram captions, actual ads that were designed to convert



?? A solid understanding of direct response fundamentals, you should already know what a hook is, what a lead is, what a unique mechanism is, and how a CTA works



?? Experience with or strong knowledge of advertorials and listicle funnels, you've either written them before or you've studied enough of them to write one by tomorrow



?? Fluent English, both written and spoken, our audience is entirely US-based so the copy needs to sound completely natural, this one is non-negotiable



?? The ability to write fast without dropping quality, we test a ton of creative which means you'll be writing a ton of creative

Who does well in this role:



?? You take feedback well and actually use it, we run everything off data and iteration so your ego can't be bigger than your output



?? You're naturally curious about why people buy things, you actually enjoy digging into pain points, emotional triggers, and buying psychology



?? You don't need someone hovering over you to get work done, if I hand you a reference ad and a product you should be able to study the format and come back with something solid



?? You want to grow with a brand, not just collect a check, this starts as a junior ad copy role but top performers get to move into landing pages, VSLs, and full funnel builds over time



Compensation:



Competitive base with performance bonuses tied directly to how your ads perform. The better your creative does, the more you make. We pay for results here, not just hours.



To apply:



Send your application through this platform. Tell me specifically what brands or products you've written ads for, what types of ads they were, and what kind of results you saw. If your application is generic and doesn't answer this, I'm going to skip it.



I look forward to speaking with you!

title: Operations Specialist (Landscaping)
description:
We’re looking for an **Operations Specialist (Landscaping)** to support a fast-growing landscaping and field-services business. You’ll manage day-to-day scheduling, client communication, and internal coordination while keeping tools, systems, and workflows running smoothly across English and Spanish-speaking crews.



This role is perfect for someone who thrives in a high-velocity environment, can take a loose brief and run with it, and knows how to solve problems without waiting for step-by-step instructions. If you have experience in landscaping, construction, or field-service operations, even better.



---



### **Why You’ll Want to Join**



- You will be paid in **USD** (bi-monthly: every 15th and 30th)

- Up to **14 days** of Paid Time Off annually (starting Day 1)

- Observance of **Holidays** per company guidelines

- **100% remote setup** so you can work wherever you feel most productive

- Join a company that values autonomy, initiative, and operational excellence

- Opportunity to help shape processes as the business scales



---



### **What You’ll Work On**



**Client Communication and Coordination**



- Manage
 correspondence with clients and vendors

- Handle inbound calls via VOIP and route them appropriately

- Follow up with HOAs, real estate partners, and new leads



**Scheduling and Field Operations**



- Build, adjust, and troubleshoot daily schedules in LMN

- Coordinate job assignments with field crews (English and Spanish speaking)

- Ensure next-day operations are fully prepared before signing off



**Systems and Data Management**



- Maintain CRM records and assist with the transition to HubSpot

- Keep LMN data clean, accurate, and optimized

- Manage files, Google Drive, and internal documents so information stays organized and accessible



**Reporting and Team Support**



- Build simple presentations, guides, and reports for field teams

- Update employee instructions and support documentation as needed

- Collaborate with the website designer when content or updates are required



---



### **What You Bring**



- **2–4+ years** in operations, coordination, or administrative support

- Experience in **landscaping, construction, home services, or field-service operations** is a strong plus

- Strong communication skills and confidence handling both clients and crew members

- High attention to detail, strong follow-through, and comfort managing many moving parts

- Competence with tools like **Google Workspace, WhatsApp, QuickBooks, ADP**, and CRM platforms

- Ability to work early PST hours (6am–7am and 9am–4pm) or split shifts with another coordinator



You will thrive here if you:



- Are a **self-starter** who figures things out instead of waiting for direction

- Handle pressure well and can course-correct fast

- Bring solutions instead of questions

- Can operate independently while keeping leadership fully informed



### **Nice to Have**



- Hands-on experience with **LMN** or other field-service scheduling tools

- Background coordinating multilingual teams

- Experience with website updates or light content management



---



### **How to Apply**



Please include:



1. Your **updated resume**

2. A **short Loom video (1–2 minutes)** introducing yourself and describing a time you solved a messy operational problem independently



**Only candidates who submit a Loom video will move forward.**



---



If you’re organized, proactive, and excited to support a business where your impact is felt daily, this role gives you the opportunity to build structure, improve operations, and keep a growing field-services team running at full speed.

Requirements:



Strong experience designing business or consulting-style presentations (e.g. Bain, McKinsey)



Ability to simplify complex information visually



Excellent PowerPoint skills

title: Automotive Commercial Video Editor (15s / 30s Spots)
description:
Job Description



We are seeking a highly skilled video editor to help produce 15-second and 30-second automotive commercials for regional dealership campaigns. This role supports our growing automotive production pipeline and requires an editor who understands the visual language of automotive advertising - pacing, polish, typography, motion graphics, and brand consistency. Deliverables typically need to be turned around within 48 hours once video production has completed.



Editors will receive:

- Pre-organized project folders

- Dealership b-roll and footage

- Access to national automotive brand assets

- Brand guidelines for each manufacturer



Your job is to assemble compelling automotive commercials that feel like national campaigns, while serving local dealership marketing needs.The final spots should feel like national-level creative produced for strong regional dealerships.



Projects typically include:

- 15s OTT commercials

- 30s OTT commercials

- Social media cuts

- Dealer branding and offer overlays



We are building a long-term relationship with editors who can reliably deliver high-quality work and scale with ongoing automotive campaigns.



Wage / Salary

$6 – $10 per hour depending on experience

Project-based bonuses available for strong editors who consistently deliver high-quality work.



Hours per Week

10 – 20 hours per week

(with potential to scale higher as projects increase)



Skills Requirements

Required Skills

- Advanced proficiency in Adobe Premiere Pro

- Comfortable using After Effects for simple motion graphics

- Strong sense of commercial pacing and storytelling

- Experience editing advertising, promotional, or commercial content

- Ability to follow brand guidelines and dealership compliance requirements

- Skilled with music selection, sound design, and commercial timing

- Organized and capable of working with shared cloud project folders



Preferred Experience

- Experience editing automotive commercials

- Experience with OTT ads, social ads, and dealership marketing

- Strong typography and clean graphic layout skills

- Experience working with brand asset libraries



Bonus Skills

- Spanish language ability (helpful for bilingual dealership spots)

- Experience with color grading automotive footage

- Understanding of regional dealership advertising styles



What Success Looks Like

A successful editor in this role will:

- Produce polished automotive commercials quickly

- Maintain brand consistency across multiple dealerships

- Deliver spots that feel premium, fast-paced, and high-impact

- Help scale production volume while maintaining national-level quality



If you're interested, please include:

1. A link to your portfolio or reel

2. Examples of commercial or advertising edits

3. A short introduction about your editing experience



Selected candidates will be given a paid 15–30 second test edit using provided automotive assets.

title: Bookkeeper - Amazon FBA / E-Commerce Business
description:
About Us

We are a California-based company that helps bicycle brands manage their Amazon presence. We handle FBA prep, product listings, marketing campaigns, and inventory management for well-known cycling brands. We are a small, fast-moving team based in California and are looking for a detail-oriented bookkeeper to join us full-time.



What You’ll Do

• Manage day-to-day bookkeeping in QuickBooks Online (categorizing transactions, bank reconciliations, credit card reconciliations)

• Reconcile Amazon Seller Central settlement reports with bank deposits — this is critical and requires understanding how Amazon disburses funds, withholds fees, and handles reimbursements

• Track and reconcile FBA fees including referral fees, fulfillment fees, storage fees, aged inventory surcharges, and advertising charges

• Reconcile payments to distributors and suppliers against purchase orders and invoices received

• Prepare monthly financial statements (P&L, balance sheet, cash flow)

• Maintain accurate records for inventory costs and cost of goods sold (COGS)

• Assist with sales tax tracking and reporting

• Communicate proactively when numbers don’t add up or when you spot discrepancies



Required Skills & Experience

• 2+ years of bookkeeping experience, ideally for a US-based e-commerce or Amazon FBA business

• Strong working knowledge of QuickBooks Online — you should be able to navigate it confidently, not just learning it

• Experience reconciling Amazon settlement reports (you understand how Amazon’s 14-day disbursement cycle works, what the settlement report columns mean, and how to match them to bank deposits)

• Solid understanding of double-entry bookkeeping, accrual vs. cash basis, and basic US accounting principles

• Highly organized and detail-oriented — our business involves thousands of SKUs and hundreds of transactions per month

• Strong English communication skills (written) — you’ll be communicating with the owner directly via chat and

• Reliable internet connection and a quiet workspace



Nice to Have (Not Required)

• Experience with inventory accounting and COGS tracking for physical products

• Familiarity with Amazon Seller Central reporting (Business Reports, FBA reports, advertising reports)

• Experience with A2X, Synder, or similar Amazon-to-QBO integration tools

• Basic understanding of sales tax nexus for e-commerce sellers

• Experience working with distributors and wholesale purchasing



Work Setup

• Full-time: 40 hours per week

• Remote position

• Must have at least 4–5 hours of overlap with US Pacific Time (PT) business hours for communication

• Paid via direct bank transfer monthly

• Long-term position — we are looking for someone who wants to grow with the company, not a short-term gig



Compensation

$800–$1,200 USD per month depending on experience and skill level. There is room for growth as the business scales and your responsibilities increase.



How to Apply

Please include the following in your application:

• Your resume or CV highlighting relevant bookkeeping and e-commerce experience

• A brief message (2–3 sentences) explaining your experience with Amazon settlement reconciliation specifically — if you haven’t done this before, be honest about it

• Your QuickBooks Online experience level (beginner / intermediate / advanced) and how long you’ve used it

• Your expected monthly salary in USD

• Your available working hours and time zone



We will ask shortlisted candidates to complete a short paid test task (approximately 30 minutes) to evaluate your bookkeeping and reconciliation skills before making a final decision.

title: Admin & Customer Support (Dumpster Rental Business)
description:
Job Title: Admin & Customer Support (Dumpster Rental Business)

We are seeking a reliable, customer-focused Admin & Customer Support to provide full front-office support for a local U.S.-based dumpster rental company. This role is critical in handling daily administrative operations, inbound customer communication, sales coordination, and scheduling so the business owner can step out of day-to-day tasks and focus on growth.



The ideal candidate will act as an office manager and customer support representative, confidently handling inbound calls, booking rentals, coordinating with drivers, and managing billing and CRM updates. Strong English communication, organization, and comfort handling customer inquiries and sales conversations are essential.



Note: We’re only processing applications submitted through the form.

Form link:



Key Responsibilities

s promptly

-Respond to text messages,
s, and website inquiries

-Clearly explain dumpster pricing, rental terms, weight limits, and company policies

-Handle basic objections and confidently close bookings

Sales & Quote Management

, or text

Billing & Administrative Tasks

 and Instagram

-Comfortable using CRM systems, Google Sheets, calendars, and scheduling tools

Preferred Qualifications

Note: We’re only processing applications submitted through the form.

title: Google Business Profile & Local SEO Specialist (Proven Results Required)
description:
Company Overview



Tyco Property Management Company is a family-owned property management firm based in San Diego, California. We have been in continuous operation since 1966 and specialize in homeowners association management as well as residential and commercial property management.



Learn more about us here:





We have successfully worked with remote tea
mbers in the Philippines for several years and maintain a professional, long-term working environment.



Position Overview



We are seeking an experienced Google Business Profile and Local SEO Specialist to improve our visibility in Google Maps and local search results.



This role focuses on optimizing and managing our Google Business Profile (also commonly referred to as Google My Business, GMB optimization, or Google Maps SEO).



Our company currently has over 170 Google reviews and a strong reputation, but we believe our Google Business Profile and local search strategy can be significantly improved.



This role is intended only for candidates with real experience improving Google Business Profile rankings for businesses.



This is not an entry-level or training role.



Applicants must be able to demonstrate actual results they have achieved for businesses in Google Maps or local search rankings.



Responsibilities



• Optimize and manage our Google Business Profile

• Improve ranking in Google Maps for relevant local searches

• Analyze competitor listings and local search opportunities

• Implement local SEO improvements

• Provide recommendations for improving visibility and engagement

• Assist with review strategy and responses where appropriate



Work Structure



• This role can be performed on a flexible schedule

• Work does not need to occur during U.S. business hours

• Occasional meetings may be scheduled during Pacific Time



Estimated hours:

5–10 hours per week initially



Requirements



• Proven experience managing Google Business Profiles

• Demonstrated success improving Google Maps rankings

• Strong understanding of local SEO

• Strong written English communication

• Organized and able to document work clearly



Please do not apply if:



• You are still learning SEO

• You have only taken courses but have no real client results

• You do not have examples of businesses you have helped rank



This role requires demonstrated experience and results.



HOW TO APPLY



Follow the steps exactly to be considered.



• Use a minimum of 7 AP points

• Use the following subject line:



LOCAL SEO SPECIALIST – TYCO



Your message must include the following:



-Links to three Google Business Profiles you have worked on



-A brief explanation of what you did to improve their rankings



-Screenshots or evidence of ranking improvements if available



-Your resume



-Your expected hourly rate



-Your DISC testing results



-Confirmation that you understand this is a results-based role requiring prior experience



-Please also answer the following question:



Visit our website:







In two or three sentences, tell us one improvement you would make to our Google Business Profile or local SEO strategy.



Applications that do not follow these instructions will not be considered.



Interview Process



Qualified candidates will receive a calendar link to schedule a short Zoom interview.

title: Operations & Marketing Virtual Assistant — US Financial Services Firm
description:
About Us

We are a growing financial services and employee benefits advisory firm based in New Jersey, USA. We serve medical practices, physicians, homecare agencies, auto dealerships, construction companies, professional services firms, and growing businesses across New Jersey, New York, and the broader tri-state area. We are aggressively expanding into new market verticals every quarter.

We operate two brands under the same ownership:



 — employee benefits and insurance consulting

 — retirement planning, wealth management, and financial advisory



We are launching multiple market expansion campaigns and need a reliable, detail-oriented operations and marketing professional to become the backbone of our daily execution.

This is NOT a generic virtual assistant role. You will be a core tea
mber responsible for our CRM system, marketing execution, and campaign operations. We are looking for someone who takes ownership, brings ideas, and wants to grow with us.



The Role — Two Halves, One Critical Person

HALF 1: Zoho CRM & Operations Administration (~12-15 hours/week)

You will be the primary administrator of our Zoho CRM system. This means you own the system — keeping it clean, updated, functional, and optimized for our sales team.

Day-to-day CRM responsibilities:



Maintain and optimize all deal pipelines across multiple market verticals (currently 3 pipelines, expanding to 5-8+ as we add new market segments). Build new pipelines, stages, and custom field configurations as the business adds verticals.



Import prospect data from CSV files into the Deals module (we provide the files, you map and import them accurately)

Ensure data hygiene: deduplicate records, standardize field entries, fix incomplete records, merge duplicates

Create and maintain custom views and filters for each tea
mber (sales team, consultants, enrollment specialists)

Build and modify workflow automation rules 
 notifications, task creation, stage-based triggers)

Generate weekly pipeline reports and export them for management review

Maintain the Campaign Command Center dashboard with up-to-date metrics

Manage user accounts: add new tea
mbers, assign roles and profiles, adjust permissions

Configure and manage Zoho Campaigns integration: sync CRM contact lists, segment audiences, schedule
 sequences

Troubleshoot CRM issues reported by tea
mbers (fields not displaying, automations not firing, etc.)

Perform monthly CRM audits: check for stale deals, orphaned contacts, incomplete records, and data inconsistencies



Periodic CRM projects:



Import database records (retirement and health plan filings) — we will provide filtered datasets, you import and tag them in CRM



Build and configure new pipelines, layouts, custom fields, and automations as we expand into new market verticals — including but not limited to medical practices, homecare agencies, auto dealerships, construction companies, professional services firms, and other industries. You should be comfortable spinning up a complete new vertical pipeline (stages, fields, views, automations, dashboards) independently with minimal direction



Create new workflow automations as our sales process evolves

Set up Zoho Blueprint process enforcement for deal stage transitions

Configure territory management when we add new sales tea
mbers

Integrate Zoho CRM with external tools (Calendly, Zoho Campaigns, potentially n8n or Zapier)



HALF 2: Marketing & Social Media Execution (~12-15 hours/week)

You will execute our marketing strategy across LinkedIn,
, and other channels. Content will be provided to you (pre-written and pre-approved) — your job is to post it, engage with our audience, and manage the logistics.

Daily marketing responsibilities:



Post pre-approved content to LinkedIn — 2 posts per day (1 on the founder's personal profile, 1 on the company page)

Manage TWO separate 
pany pages (Kandelaki Solutions and Kandelaki Financial) with distinct content calendars and brand voices

Engage on LinkedIn: send 20-30 personalized connection requests per day to target prospects (physicians, practice managers, HR directors, homecare agency owners in NJ/NY)

Comment thoughtfully on 10-15 target prospects' LinkedIn posts daily (genuine engagement, not spam)

Respond to all comments on our posts within 4 hours

Respond to LinkedIn direct messages and route qualified inquiries to the sales team in CRM

Schedule and send
 campaigns via Zoho Campaigns per the content calendar

Create graphics in Canva for LinkedIn posts,
 headers, and marketing materials (templates will be provided)

Monitor and report on LinkedIn analytics (impressions, engagement, follower growth, profile views)

Monitor and report on
 campaign metrics (open rates, click rates, unsubscribes)



Periodic marketing projects:



Coordinate direct mail campaigns (prepare mailing lists from CRM, coordinate with US-based print vendors)

Set up landing page tracking and UTM parameters for campaign attribution

Assist with webinar logistics (Zoom setup, registration page, reminder
s, post-event follow-up
s)

Create and manage
/Instagram retargeting audiences (upload
 lists, set targeting parameters)

Compile weekly marketing performance reports in a shared Google Sheet





Quarterly performance bonus: $100–$250 based on hitting KPI targets (LinkedIn engagement growth, CRM data quality,
 campaign performance). We reward results, not just hours."



Required Skills & Experience

Non-negotiable — you must have these:



Zoho CRM experience — you have configured pipelines, custom fields, workflow rules, views, and dashboards in Zoho CRM for at least one client or employer. Screenshots or references required.

Zoho Campaigns experience — you have created and sent
 campaigns, managed subscriber lists, and reviewed campaign analytics

LinkedIn management — you have managed a 
pany page and/or personal profile for a B2B or professional services company. Share a link to a page you've managed.

Strong written English — your posts,
s, and connection request messages must read as if a native English speaker wrote them. We will test this.

Canva proficiency — you can create professional-looking graphics from templates quickly

Google Sheets / Google Workspace proficiency — you will use shared spreadsheets for reporting and coordination daily

Reliable high-speed internet and a quiet workspace — you will be on video calls with us weekly and need stable connectivity

Self-motivated and proactive — you work independently with minimal supervision and flag issues before they become problems



Strongly preferred — these will put you ahead of other applicants:



Zoho Certified Administrator or Zoho Certified Associate

Experience working for a US-based financial services firm, insurance agency, real estate brokerage, or professional services company

Experience with Zoho Analytics or Zoho Reports

Experience with
 marketing beyond Zoho (Mailchimp, ActiveCampaign, HubSpot — shows transferable skill)

Basic understanding of CRM sales pipeline concepts (leads, deals, stages, conversion, win rates)

Experience with Zapier, n8n, or Make (Integromat) for workflow automation

Experience with
 Ads Manager or 
 Ads (we run paid campaigns)

Knowledge of SEO basics



Bonus — not required but would be amazing:



Any exposure to US insurance or financial services industry terminology

Experience with 
v, React, or basic web development

Video editing skills (CapCut, Premiere, or similar)

Experience managing multiple brands/clients simultaneously





What Success Looks Like

After 30 days: CRM is running smoothly with clean data, all automations firing correctly, and zero complaints from the sales team about system issues. LinkedIn is posting daily on schedule with consistent engagement.
 campaigns are going out on time with 20%+ open rates. You have a daily routine and are managing both halves of the role without being reminded.

After 60 days: LinkedIn impressions are growing 25-50% month-over-month. You're proactively identifying CRM improvements ("I noticed we could add an automation for X" or "This view would help the team see Y"). You're suggesting content ideas based on what's performing well. The founder trusts you to handle marketing and CRM independently with weekly check-ins only. When we d
 to launch a new market vertical, you can build the entire CRM pipeline infrastructure (stages, custom fields, views, automations, and dashboard components) within one working day without needing step-by-step instructions

After 90 days: You are an indispensable tea
mber. The CRM is the cleanest it's ever been. Marketing is generating measurable pipeline activity. You understand both brands, their audiences, and their compliance boundaries. You are ready for expanded responsibilities and potentially increased hours/compensation.



How We Work Together

Communication: WhatsApp or Slack (one channel — we don't scatter conversations across platforms)

Check-ins: Daily 15-minute video call for the first 2 weeks, then weekly 30-minute call thereafter

Reporting: You submit a daily scorecard (Google Sheet) tracking: posts published, connections sent, comments made,
s scheduled, CRM records updated, tasks completed. Weekly KPI summary every Friday.

Content workflow: Pre-written content is provided to you via a shared Google Sheet content calendar. Posts are pre-approved by our compliance department. You schedule and publish on time. You do NOT write financial content from scratch — you execute the approved content and manage engagement.

Tools you'll use daily: Zoho CRM, Zoho Campaigns, LinkedIn, Canva, Google Sheets, Google Drive, WhatsApp/Slack, Calendly

Tools you'll use periodically:
 Ads Manager, Zoom (webinar support), potentially n8n or Zapier



Compensation & Growth

Starting rate: $6–$9/hour USD based on experience and Zoho proficiency



$6-$7/hour: Strong VA skills + basic Zoho CRM experience

$7-$8/hour: Zoho certified or 2+ years of Zoho CRM admin for US-based companies

$8-$9/hour: Zoho certified + financial services industry experience + LinkedIn B2B management track record



Payment: Bi-weekly via Wise (TransferWise), Payoneer, or direct bank transfer — your preference

Hours: 25-30 hours/week to start. Potential to grow to 35-40 hours/week within 60-90 days based on performance and business growth.

Rate increases: Performance review at 90 days with potential $1/hour increase for strong performers. Annual review thereafter.

This is a long-term role. We are not looking for a short-term freelancer. We are building a team and want someone who will grow with us over months and years. If you are looking for a stable, long-term remote position with a growing US company, this is it.



How to Apply

Please send the following (applications without these items will not be considered):



Your resume — PDF format preferred

Zoho CRM experience proof — ONE of the following:



Screenshot(s) of a Zoho CRM you've configured (pipelines, dashboards, custom fields — blur client names if needed)

Zoho certification badge or certificate

A brief paragraph (3-5 sentences) describing the most complex Zoho CRM setup you've done





LinkedIn management proof — a link to a 
pany page or profile you've managed, or screenshots of analytics from a page you managed (blur names if needed)

Written English sample — write a SHORT LinkedIn post (3-5 sentences) on this topic: "Why small business owners in New Jersey should review their employee benefits package before their next renewal." This is a test of your writing quality — don't use AI to generate it, we want to see YOUR writing.

Your availability — confirm your available working hours in Philippine Time and whether you can work US Eastern Time mornings (8 AM - 1 PM ET = 8 PM - 1 AM PHT)

Your expected hourly rate within the posted range





About Our Team Culture

We are a small, fast-growing team. We value:



Ownership — you treat your responsibilities as if this were your own business

Honesty — if something goes wrong or you don't know how to do something, tell us immediately rather than guessing

Reliability — you show up on time, submit your work on schedule, and communicate proactively

Initiative — you don't wait to be told what to do when you see something that could be improved

Quality over speed — we'd rather have 1 excellent LinkedIn post than 3 mediocre ones



We are direct communicators. We give clear feedback — both positive and constructive. We expect you to receive feedback professionally and apply it quickly. In return, we will invest in your growth, respect your time, pay reliably, and treat you as a valued tea
mber — not just a task executor.

If this sounds like the kind of team you want to be part of, we look forward to your application.

title: Entry-Level Healthcare Virtual Assistant (full/part-time)
description:
APPLICATION PROCESS:

1
 us your resume in PDF format only. Include all of the jobs you've worked at and the month + year. Do not leave anything off. Do not leave anything off.  You must provide an explanation of any gaps in your work history. Include the compensation you received for each job. Do not give us your hourly pay, only your annual compensation or total compensation.  If there is any gap in your resume without an explanation of the gap, you will be disqualified.



2.
 us a 60-second video of yourself answering the following question:

What are the 3 most important things that the company you work for MUST do to show you that they care about you? For example, if they don’t give me these 3 things then that means they don’t care about me. The video CANNOT EXCEED 60 seconds, or you will automatically be disqualified.



3. IMPORTANT: Please
 us at 
 to follow the above instructions will result in automatic disqualifications.  Do not DM us or call us or contact us in any other way.



ABOUT OUR COMPANY:

Achieve Integrative Health is the #1 rated Acupuncture & Wellness Clinic in the United States with over 760 five star google reviews. Our Mission is to help people restore their body’s God given ability to heal itself so that they can do what they love. Our vision is to equip and inspire one million people around the world to do what they love, when they want, with whom they want. 



WHY JOIN US?

• You’ll Achieve your Goals = our team provides all of the resources (information, training, opportunities) you’ll need to achieve all of your Professional, Financial and Personal Goals, as long as you are willing to put in the work and deliver results.



• Peace and Joy Team = we have a phenomenal culture of care for our patients and our tea
mbers. We are very strict with our rules, policies and core values in order to protect our culture of peace and joy.  Imagine being on a team where you don’t have to deal with people who talk behind your back and end up back stabbing you.  Imagine a team where all of your teammates want you to succeed in Life and they will do their best to help you achieve that.



• Be Highly Rewarded as a Side Benefit = imagine being able to do your Passion everyday and make a phenomenal living as a side benefit. The average "experienced" VAs in the Philippines/Indonesia make $5-$7 USD/hr, our entry-level VAs start off making $5/hr. We have a quarterly bonus program, where some of our tea
mbers have earned $500-$1,000USD per quarter, and this year 2025, because the team has performed so well, some tea
mbers were paid an 'additional' year end bonus of $2000-$3000 USD.



BENEFITS

• Competitive Total Compensation = $5-$12 USD/hr for graveyard shift only.

• Unlimited Opportunities for Growth = as long as you can generate more results for the company we will never limit your ability to grow within our company. Every tea
mber can also become a partner of the business if they desire.

• Other Benefits for qualified tea
mbers = paid-time off, premiu
dical insurance, Employee Savings Matching Program

• Work from Home = no more 2-4 hour commutes to work

• Wellness Initiatives = benefit from complimentary virtual health services from our medical providers, ensuring your well-being and your family’s well-being is always a priority.



JOB RESPONSIBILITIES

• Receive all inbound calls to close Leads wanting to receive treatments at our clinic

• Call,
, and use various communication forms to identify the validity and potential of the lead

• Receive all inbound calls to answer questions – fact find and qualify lead/route to appropriate tea
mbers

• Work with patients to ensure they are satisfied with the services provided

• Encourage happy patients to send us their success stories

• Share patient success stories during daily company meeting

• Implement our CARE system to follow-up with our patients to provide 5 star service

• Check-in and checkout patients

• Verify Insurance Benefits

• Other additional tasks may be added based on your strengths…



CHARACTER REQUIREMENTS & QUALIFICATIONS

• You must truly have a caring heart and truly want to help people improve their health, if you are mainly focused on how much money you can make, we are not the team for you

• You must speak Fluent English (ie. someone on the phone can understand what you're saying w/o straining)

• You must be organized and be able to handle multiple tasks and responsibilities everyday. If you’re looking to only do one or two tasks per day, we are the wrong team for you.

• You must be able to follow instructions exactly as written, if you don’t like reading or following instructions, we are not the right team for you

• You must have a good heart. If you like to gossip behind peoples back, please don’t apply.

• You must value Results over effort. If you like to be paid based on how many tasks you completed or how much responsibilities you have, we are not the team for you. We pay ONLY based on you meeting your KPIs, metrics, quotas.

• You must sleep the same schedule 7 days a week, as this is a graveyard shift, you cannot switch back to the Philippines/Indonesian time zone on the weekends as this destroys your health. Your Health is our priority, and if you don’t value your own health we don’t want you on our team.

• You must be honest and have integrity. If you are caught lying, you will be immediately terminated.

• You must want to EARN your pay (ie. base salary + bonuses) instead of being given a pay (ie. focused only on base salary) that you didn’t earn.

* we are not looking for experience, we prefer candidates who have no medical VA experience, as having experience hinders your success on our team.  We are looking for character, who you are as a person.



WORKSTATION REQUIREMENTS

• You must have a separate quiet room to work in. You can not have your children or anybody else in the room that you work as your screen will be displaying confidential information, no exceptions.

• There can not be any background noise in your room when you are making phone calls.

• You will be required to provide photos of your workspace

• We will also randomly ask you to show your workspace via your webcam, and if you are caught lying you will be fired immediately.



COMPUTER AND INTERNET REQUIREMENTS:

• Fast and reliable wired internet connection of not less than 100 Mbps

• Secondary and Tertiary Back up Internet of not less than 10 Mbps

• At least one Power Station Backup

• Dual Monitor

• Intel Core i3 or higher Operating System with at least 8gb RAM

• Excellent quality headset with microphone, and a working webcam



WORK SCHEDULE:

OPTION 1 > Full-time 8:00 - 18:00 (M-Th) 8:00-16:00 (F) U.S. Central Standard Time, 2-hr lunch breaks 

OPTION 2 > Part-time 7:00-13:00 (M-F) U.S. Central Standard Time 

OPTION 3 > Part-time 13:00-18:30 (M-F) U.S. Central Standard Time

title: Creative Director / Content Research VA (Reels + YouTube)
description:
We are looking for a Creative Director / Content Research VA who understands viral content, social media trends, and audience psychology.



This is not a basic VA role.

Your job is to study what works in our niche, generate winning ideas, and help us execute consistently.



If you are someone who constantly studies viral content, understands hooks, and knows how to turn ideas into scripts, this role is for you.



Your Core Responsibilities



1. Viral Content Research

Your primary job will be identifying high-performing content in our niche.



This includes:

Researching Instagram Reels, TikTok, and YouTube daily

Finding viral videos in the trading / finance niche

Identifying patterns such as:

Hooks that stop the scroll

----Video formats

----Storytelling structures

----Topics that generate high engagement

----Logging viral ideas into a content idea database



Your goal is to bring winning ideas we can replicate and improve.



2. Script Creation Using AI



Once viral ideas are identified, you will:

Turn those ideas into high-quality scripts

Use AI tools like ChatGPT to assist with script writing

Structure scripts with:

----Strong hooks

----Clear value

----Simple explanations

----Calls to action



Scripts should be designed to maximize engagement and retention.



3. Content Scheduling

You will manage the scheduling of new content:



-Weekly responsibilities:

Schedule 5–6 new Instagram Reels

Schedule 1 YouTube video

Ensure content is posted consistently and on time



4. Repurposed Content Distribution

In addition to new content, you will:

Post 10–15 repurposed videos per week using Instagram Trial Reels

Help test older content to reach new audiences

Organize and track which videos perform best



Ideal Candidate



---You are someone who:

Understands how viral content works

Studies Instagram, YouTube, and TikTok trends

Can identify patterns behind high-performing videos

Has strong creative instincts

Is organized and reliable

Is comfortable using AI tools

Has experience scheduling social media content



---Bonus if you:

Understand the trading / finance niche

Have experience with Instagram growth strategies



---Tools You May Use

ChatGPT or AI writing tools

Google Docs / Sheets

Instagram scheduling tools

YouTube Studio



Expectations

You will be responsible for helping drive consistent content output and idea generation.



-----Weekly targets:

5–6 new Reels scheduled

1 YouTube video scheduled

10–15 repurposed trial reels posted

New viral content ideas documented

title: SEO Content Specialist
description:
To apply, visit 



=======



About Us:

Blume is a digital marketing company that builds websites and runs SEO campaigns for service businesses across the United States. We are looking for a dedicated, detail oriented SEO Content Specialist to join our team and help scale our content production across multiple clients.



What You'll Be Doing:

Each client serves a different market, so you will need to research the right keywords, write unique content, and ensure every page is properly optimized before it goes live.

Source and upload unique images for every page. No duplicate images across pages.

- Manage and prioritize page creation across multiple clients simultaneously.
