title: Administrative Virtual Assistant
description:
Job Opportunity: Administrative Virtual Assistant (Part-Time, Remote – Philippines)



Support a Nationwide Campaign and a Visionary Business Ecosystem



Position: Administrative Virtual Assistant



Location: Remote (Philippines)



Compensation: $5/hour (Paid Holidays & Annual Raises after Probation)



Schedule: Mon.-Thurs 24 hours/week (Part-Time, with potential for Full-Time after 90 days)



About Us

You will be supporting the CEO of Innovative Global Entities (IGE) — a multifaceted enterprise managing 16 active brands including Get Biz Credit, Reimagine iT Inc., Excel Media Group, Affluential Magazine and the Mind Your Business Podcast.



The flagship initiative you’ll primarily support is Fundable Futures — a 12-month program launching in 2026, designed to help 1,000 minority, women, and veteran-owned businesses in Atlanta qualify for $100K–$250K in business credit with no personal guarantee. You’ll help coordinate logistics, outreach, and reporting as we prepare for national scale.

Key Responsibilities



- Campaign Support & Task Coordination:

• Assist in managing timelines and tasks across Fundable Futures campaign phases

• Support communications with sponsors, cohorts, and partners

• Track deliverables from internal tea
mbers and partners

• Help document progress for reports and dashboards



- Administrative Management:

• Organize and update files across Google Drive, SharePoint, and Dropbox

• Maintain digital records and prepare reports or summaries fro
etings

• Schedule Zoom calls, prepare agendas, and track meeting outcomes



- Communications Support:

• Draft
 templates for outreach (Sendiio)

• Coordinate follow-up messages, reminders, and cohort instructions

• Monitor shared inboxes and support light customer service inquiries



- Systems & Brand Support:

• Help QA and organize brand materials across our 16 IGE brands

• Ensure SOPs and forms are updated in MS Teams, Google Sheets, or our CRM

• Assist in maintaining project management boards for current initiatives



You Must Be:



- Detail-oriented and highly organized — can manage multiple priorities calmly

- A fast learner — you pick up tools like Zapier, Google Workspace quickly

- Excellent communicator — written English must be clear and professional

- Tech-savvy — comfortable navigating CRMs, cloud drives, and automation tools

- Self-motivated — you manage your time well and take ownership of tasks

- Team-player — you work well under a visionary CEO who moves fast



Requirements



- At least 2 years of experience as a VA or Admin Assistant

- Must have a reliable laptop/PC and fast internet

- Must be comfortable working between 10 AM – 4 PM EST (or overlapping hours)

- Proficient with Google Workspace, MS Teams, Photoshop, Google Sheets

- Familiarity with ChatGPT and/or AI agents is a must

- Familiarity with workflow automation using Zapier or Sendiio is a plus

- Must be comfortable using our proprietary CRM system



Compensation & Benefits



- $5/hour USD (paid bi-weekly via Payoneer or PayPal)

- Paid holidays after 90 days (for Full-Time)

- Performance-based full-time promotion

- Annual performance review and raise eligibility

- Training and mentorship from a high-performing executive team

- Work with purpose across 16 brands with global impact



Deadline to apply: March 14, 2025

Start date: March 30, 20255



How to Apply: FOLLOW ALL INSTRUCTIONS BELOW



Create a Google Drive folder titled

“VA Skills Test – [Your Full Name]”

Inside that folder, complete and upload the following 4 required tasks (plus an optional bonus task).

When finished, share the folder link with >> 

and make sure sharing is set to

“Anyone with the link can view.”



Task 1 – Organizational & Task Management (Google Sheets)

Create a simple project tracker for a campaign called Fundable Futures Sponsor Outreach .

Include columns for:



Task Name

Responsible Person

Due Date

Status

Notes



Add at least 5 sample tasks and apply basic formatting (bold headers, color-coded status).

Upload: Google Sheet or exported PDF in your folder.



Task 2 – Communication & Writing Skills (Google Docs)

Write a short 120–150 word
 to a potential sponsor introducing the Fundable Futures program and requesting a short meeting.

Tone should be professional, clear, and persuasive.

Upload: Your
 as a Google Doc or PDF.



Task 3 – Tech & Systems Familiarity (Screenshots)

Take screenshots showing you using Google Sheets, Google Drive, and (if applicable) any automation tools like Zapier, Make (Integromat), or Sendiio.

Place them in a subfolder titled “Screenshots.”

Upload: Screenshots in a folder under your main Google Drive folder.

Bonus (Optional HIGHLY RECOMMENDED) – Initiative Check (1-Minute Video)

After You Finish

title: Real Estate Cold Caller (Lead Generation Specialist)
description:
We are looking for a reliable and experienced Cold Caller & Lead Manager to join our real estate investment company. Our business helps homeowners sell their homes quickly by providing fast cash offers.



Your role will include cold calling homeowners, answering inbound calls, responding to text messages, and managing leads inside Go High Level (GHL). You will be the first point of contact with potential sellers and will help identify motivated homeowners.



This is a long-term position for someone who is professional, organized, and comfortable communicating with homeowners.



Responsibilities



• Cold call homeowners from provided lead lists

• Answer inbound calls from potential sellers

• Respond to incoming text messages from leads

• Qualify homeowners and identify motivated sellers

• Follow our cold calling and texting scripts

• Schedule appointments for the acquisitions team

• Update notes, tags, and lead status in Go High Level (GHL)

• Maintain organized communication with all leads



Requirements



• Experience with cold calling required

• Experience using Go High Level (GHL) preferred

• Strong English speaking and writing skills

• Comfortable answering inbound calls and texts

• Friendly and confident phone presence

• Ability to handle objections and rejection

• Reliable internet connection and quiet workspace

• Ability to make 100+ calls per day



Compensation



• Competitive hourly pay based on experience

• Performance bonuses for qualified leads and appointments

• Long-term opportunity with room for growth

description:

We are a U.S.-based supplement manufacturing and fulfillment company looking for a reliable Remote Operations Assistant to join our team long-term.

title: Sales Representative
description:
A Virtual Assistant Sales Representative is a remote professional responsible for contacting and engaging with warm leads that have already expressed interest in a company’s products or services. The primary goal of this role is to follow up with potential customers, build rapport, answer questions, and help guide prospects through the sales process.



Key Responsibilities



Contact and follow up with warm leads provided by the company via phone calls.



Qualify prospects by confirming interest, needs, and readiness to purchase.



Clearly explain products or services and answer customer questions.



Schedule appointments, consultations, or demos when needed.



Maintain accurate records of conversations and updates in the CRM system.



Follow up with leads who require additional information before making a decision.



Maintain a professional, friendly, and persuasive communication style.



Meet daily or weekly call targets and conversion goals.



Required Skills & Qualifications



Strong phone communication and interpersonal skills.



Experience in sales, telemarketing, or customer service is preferred.



Ability to build rapport quickly and handle objections confidently.



Comfortable working remotely and managing time independently.



Basic experience using CRM systems, spreadsheets, or call tracking tools.



Reliable internet connection and quiet working environment.



Goal of the Role



The goal of the Virtual Assistant Sales Representative is to convert warm leads into qualified prospects or customers by providing timely follow-ups and excellent customer communication.

title: Grant Writer & Research Specialist (Part-Time | Nonprofit)
description:
Hours: 20 hours per week

Location: Remote

Organization: Winding Branch Ranch (Texas, USA)



Winding Branch Ranch is a farm animal rescue and agricultural education nonprofit located in the Texas Hill Country. Our mission is to rescue, revive, and rehome farm animals in need while educating communities about humane, ethical, and sustainable farming practices.



We are seeking an experienced Grant Writer and Research Specialist to work approximately 20 hours per week identifying funding opportunities and writing compelling grant applications that support animal rescue, education programs, and capital campaigns.



This role requires excellent written English and proven experience writing successful grants.



Responsibilities



• Research foundations, corporations, and grant opportunities aligned with our mission

• Maintain a database of grant opportunities and deadlines

• Write grant proposals, letters of inquiry, and applications

• Assist with capital campaign and program funding proposals

• Gather statistics and impact data to support applications

• Track submitted grants and reporting deadlines

• Assist with donor and foundation research for future funding prospects

• Edit and refine written materials for clarity and impact



Requirements



• Proven experience writing grants for nonprofits or foundations

• Exceptional written English skills (this is critical)

• Strong research ability

• Ability to write clearly, persuasively, and creatively

• Organized and able to manage multiple deadlines

• Experience with nonprofit fundraising or development preferred



Bonus Experience



• Experience writing grants for animal welfare, education, agriculture, or environmental organizations

• Experience with capital campaign funding

• Familiarity with US-based foundations and philanthropic giving



To Apply Please include:

A brief introduction about your grant writing experience

Examples of grants you have written (or excerpts)

A short writing sample explaining why humane animal care and agricultural education matter

Applications without writing samples will not be considered.

title: Experienced Book Formatter & Copywriter for Amazon KDP (AI Book Software Experience Preferred)
description:
.Job Description:



I am looking for a highly experienced book formatter and copywriter to prepare a completed book for Amazon KDP publishing. The book is already written, and all pages, chapters, charts, and workbook materials are complete. Your role will be to combine all chapters into one cohesive manuscript, maintain consistent formatting, and prepare the final files for Amazon Kindle Direct Publishing (KDP).



This book also includes charts and workbook-style pages, so experience formatting instructional books or workbooks is very important.



I am specifically looking for someone who understands modern publishing tools, book formatting software, and AI-assisted book production tools to ensure a professional, clean final layout.



Responsibilities:



Combine all provided chapters, pages, charts, and workbook sections into one complete manuscript



Ensure consistent formatting throughout the entire book



Maintain the original structure and style, while improving layout where needed



Perform light copyediting or copywriting adjustments if necessary for clarity and readability



Format the book according to Amazon KDP publishing standards



Prepare final print-ready and Kindle-ready files



Assist with uploading and preparing the book on Amazon KDP



Required Skills & Experience:



Proven experience formatting books for Amazon KDP



Strong knowledge of book layout, typography, and manuscript structure



Experience working with charts, worksheets, and structured workbook content



Excellent attention to detail and ability to follow instructions carefully



Experience maintaining consistent formatting across long manuscripts



Software & Tools Experience (Important):

Candidates should have experience using professional book formatting and publishing tools, including some of the following:



Adobe InDesign



Microsoft Word Advanced Formatting



Atticus Book Formatting Software



Vellum



Scrivener



Canva Book Layout



Kindle Create



AI-assisted book formatting tools



ChatGPT or other AI tools used to assist with editing or formatting workflows



Bonus Skills (Preferred):



Experience formatting workbooks, instructional books, or self-help books



Experience with Amazon KDP upload process and publishing setup



Knowledge of AI-assisted publishing workflows



Project Status:



Book content: 100% complete



All chapters, pages, charts, and workbook materials: Provided



Goal: Professional formatting and KDP publishing preparation



To Apply, Please Include:



Examples of books you have formatted for Amazon KDP



The software and tools you use for formatting



Your timeline to complete the project



Any experience with AI-assisted publishing tools



I am looking for a detail-oriented, experienced book formatter who understands both traditional publishing tools and modern AI-assisted workflows to help bring this book to publication professionally.

title: Appointment Setter
description:
A Virtual Assistant Appointment Setter is a remote professional responsible for contacting warm leads provided by the company and scheduling appointments for the sales team. The primary focus of this role is to communicate with interested prospects, confirm their needs, and successfully book qualified appointments.



Key Responsibilities



Call and follow up with warm leads provided by the company.



Introduce the company’s services and briefly explain the value offered.



Qualify prospects by confirming their interest and availability.



Schedule appointments, consultations, or demos for the sales team.



Send confirmations and reminders for upcoming appointments.



Maintain accurate records of calls, notes, and scheduled meetings in the CRM or scheduling system.



Follow up with leads who did not answer or who requested a later contact time.



Maintain a friendly, professional, and confident tone on every call.



Meet daily or weekly call and appointment-setting targets.



Required Skills & Qualifications



Strong phone communication and interpersonal skills.



Ability to build rapport quickly and keep conversations focused.



Experience in appointment setting, telemarketing, customer service, or sales is preferred.



Strong organization and time-management skills.



Familiarity with CRM systems, calendars, or scheduling tools.



Ability to work independently in a remote environment.



Reliable internet connection and quiet workspace.



Goal of the Role



The goal of the Virtual Assistant Appointment Setter is to convert warm leads into confirmed appointments for the sales team, ensuring a consistent and qualified meeting pipeline.

This role focuses on initiating contact with prospects, introducing our services, and identifying qualified leads for further follow-up. You will not be responsible for closing sales — your primary goal is to generate interest and pass qualified prospects to the appropriate tea
mber.

title: WFH: Remote Digital Support Assistant
description:
At Starlight Marketing, a lot of important work happens quietly in the background. This role exists to support those daily operations by keeping information organized, tasks updated, and systems running smoothly—without phone calls or voice work.



As a Digital Support Assistant, your day is structured but not overwhelming. You’ll work through written tasks at a steady pace, follow clear instructions, and make sure nothing important is overlooked. The role is designed for focus and consistency rather than multitasking or decision-making.



Your responsibilities will include:

-Reviewing assigned tasks or inboxes at the start of each shift

-Updating internal tools, trackers, or records based on instructions

-Sorting or tagging information so it’s easy for the team to access

-Flagging anything unclear, incomplete, or missing for review



Most of the work is system-based and repetitive in a good way. Templates, checklists, and step-by-step processes are always provided, so you’ll never be guessing what to do next. Communication is done internally through chat or task tools only.



This role is ideal for someone who prefers non-voice work, enjoys structured routines, and is comfortable working independently. Attention to detail and reliability matter more than speed or experience.



This is a fully remote, long-term position with stable responsibilities and opportunities to grow into coordination or administrative roles as Starlight Marketing continues to expand.

title: Dropshipping Operations & Store Build Specialist
description:
START YOUR APPLICATION WITH: "OVERLAND READY" (in bold). Applications without this are deleted.

ABOUT THE ROLE

We are a growing high-ticket dropshipping business: running multiple high-ticket dropshipping stores targeting the US market across fast-growing, high-AOV niches. The strategy, systems, supplier playbook, competitor research, and 30-day execution plan are all built. I need a skilled operator to run the machine.

WHAT YOU'LL DO

- Build and configure the Shopify store from scratch (theme, apps, checkout, policies)

- Set up Google Merchant Centre (product feeds, shipping, tax settings)

- Execute supplier outreach using provided
 templates and phone scripts, submit applications, run follow-up cadence, and maintain tracker daily

- Build product pages for approved suppliers (descriptions, specs, images)

- Process and fulfil orders using the provided checklists

- Handle customer
s (response time under 4 hours)

- Send a daily check-in message + weekly operations report every Friday

YOU MUST HAVE

- Proven Shopify store setup experience (built at least one store from scratch)

- Google Merchant Centre experience (product feeds, disapprovals, shipping configs)

- Strong written English for US supplier and customer communications

- Experience with supplier/wholesale outreach via
 and phone

- Attention to detail, you follow documented SOPs and checklists without skipping steps

- Reliable Monday–Friday, minimum 4 hours/day, daily check-in required

NICE TO HAVE

- Klaviyo or similar
/CRM tool experience

-
 Pixel and Conversions API setup experience

- Knowledge of High Ticket Dropshipping products

WHAT I WILL GIVE YOU

This is not a role where you are left guessing. You will receive:

?	Fully documented Supplier Outreach Playbook  5
 templates, 3 phone scripts, 5-touch follow-up system, prioritised supplier list of 60+ US/AU/CA/UK/EU vendors

?	Completed competitor analysis across all  markets, 8 named competitors per market, their weaknesses, and your positioning advantage

?	High-Ticket Market Research Tracker: 27 markets researched, your markets with full product category breakdowns

?	30-Day Execution Plan with a daily task breakdown, you will know what to do every single day

?	Operational checklists: Store Launch, Order Processing & Fulfilment, CRO, Google Merchant Centre, Hiring & Outsourcing

?	Direct access to me daily, I am hands-on and available. This is a partnership, not a hand-off.

?	Growth opportunity as the business scales; this role scales with it



COMPENSATION

$500 USD/month base salary + 15% of verified monthly net profit share — from Month 1.



Earnings examples:

? $30K revenue at 15% margin = $1,175/month total

? $60K revenue at 15% margin = $1,850/month total

? $100K revenue at 15% margin = $2,750/month total

Full P&L transparency every month. Payment via Wise or PayPal.

TO APPLY — include all 4:

1. Open with "OVERLAND READY" in bold

2. Name one Shopify store you built from scratch

3. Describe your supplier/wholesale outreach experience

4. One reference (name + company +
)

I am not looking for someone to manage. I am looking for someone to trust.

If you are the type of person who needs hand-holding, cuts corners on documentation, or treats deadlines as suggestions, please do not apply. You will be miserable, and so will I.

title: ***AMAZING Video Editor For E-Commerce Business Needed ASAP***
description:
We are a dynamic and fast-growing e-commerce company seeking an experienced Video Editor to join our team on Upwork. The ideal candidate will have a strong background in creating, editing, and optimizing video content for e-commerce brands. If you're passionate about crafting visually compelling stories that drive engagement and thrive in a collaborative, fast-paced environment, we want to hear from you!



Responsibilities:

Edit and produce high-quality videos tailored for various digital platforms, including social media ads, pro duct launches, and customer testimonials.

Work closely with the marketing and design teams to ensure video content aligns with overall business goals and brand guidelines.

Develop creative video strategies to enhance engagement, drive sales, and improve customer retention.

Implement feedback and revisions quickly while maintaining high-quality standards and meeting tight deadlines.

Use video editing software such as Adobe Premiere, Final Cut Pro, After Effects, or similar tools to produce and refine content.

Incorporate sound design, color grading, motion graphics, and effects to enhance video quality and storytelling.

Stay up-to-date with the latest video trends and techniques, ensuring content remains fresh and cutting-edge.

Requirements:

Proven experience as a Video Editor with a portfolio showcasing your work in e-commerce or related industries.

Fluent in English, with excellent communication skills to interpret briefs and collaborate with cross-functional teams.

Proficiency in video editing tools such as Adobe Premiere, Final Cut Pro, After Effects, or similar platforms.

Strong understanding of visual storytelling, pacing, and design principles.

Ability to work in a fast-paced environment, manage multiple projects, and meet deadlines.

Analytical mindset with a data-driven approach to optimizing video performance.

Preferred Qualifications:

Experience in the e-commerce industry, especially with Direct-to-Consumer (DTC) brands.

Familiarity with AI tools and platforms for video editing or optimization.

Knowledge of social media platforms and how to create content for specific channels 
, Instagram, TikTok, YouTube).

Understanding of basic color correction, motion graphics, and sound editing techniques.

Experience with A/B testing and optimizing video content for improved engagement and conversion rates.



We are looking towards your application and we appreciate you taking the time to complete your application for this position. 



All the best, and good luck.



Thank you.

title: Wedding Photo Editor Culler Retoucher
description:
Hello there,



Hope you are having an amazing day.



My wife and I are a husband and wife wedding photography team based in Canada. We photograph refined, emotionally weddings for couples who care deeply about storytelling, culture, and elevated aesthetics. We are currently growing and looking for a skilled wedding photo editor to join us long term.



We are not looking for someone who simply applies presets. We are looking for someone who understands light, skin tones, polish, and consistency. Our work leans clean, crisp, true to life, and high end. Attention to detail is everything for us.



You must have previous experience editing weddings and portraits. Strong proficiency in Lightroom and Photoshop is required. We need someone who can cull efficiently and intelligently from 6000 to 10000 images down to a powerful storytelling gallery of 600 to 1000 images. Retouching skills such as blemish removal, subtle dodge and burn, fabric cleanup, bra strap removal, smoothing wrinkles, and refining distractions are extremely important.



We are detail oriented and value consistency, communication, and growth. We want someone who is coachable, learns quickly, and does not repeat the same mistakes. We are easy going but hold a high standard for the final product.



This role can be structured monthly or project based depending on season. Our busy season runs May through December and volume will vary each year. We are ideally looking for someone who wants to grow with us year after year and become part of our long term team. We are open to doing a per photo on-going contract or monthly.



We are hoping to start with a $300 Canadian Dollar monthly pay for 8-9 months of the year. Per project basis for the off season months whenever jobs come in.



If you love weddings, storytelling, and refining images until they feel timeless and intentional, we would love to hear from you.



Thank you so much for applying.

title: Web Automation Bot Builder / Data Scraping Specialist
description:
We want to build automation tools that search the internet for public information that signals potential work opportunities.



These tools will automatically search approved websites, collect specific data, and log the information into our database for review.



?



Job Overview



We are looking for a technical Virtual Assistant or developer who can build and maintain web search bots / data scraping automation tools.



Your role is to create bots that:

 1. Search approved websites

 2. Extract specific information

 3. Clean the data

 4. Remove duplicates

 5. Log results into Google Sheets or Airtable

 6. Flag incomplete results for review



The system should be reliable, organized, and easy to maintain.



?



What You Will Be Building



The automation tools will monitor public online data such as:

 • government records

 • permit databases

 • public i
 reports

 • violation databases

 • public notices



The bot must automatically detect new records or updates and record them in a spreadsheet.



Example data fields we collect:

 • address

 • violation type

 • permit type

 • date issued

 • status

 • source link

 • notes



?



Your Responsibilities



You will be responsible for:



1. Research & Source Identification



Identify and document websites that contain relevant public information.



2. Manual Testing



Test the data collection manually first to verify the process works.



3. Bot Development



Build automation scripts that:

 • search websites

 • extract data

 • process results

 • store data



4. Data Processing



Clean and standardize the collected data.



5. Duplicate Detection



Ensure the same records are not logged twice.



6. Data Logging



Send all results into our master spreadsheet or database.



7. Maintenance



Monitor the bots weekly and fix issues if websites change.



?



Technical Skills Required



Applicants must have experience with at least one of the following:



Python automation using:

 • Playwright

 • Selenium

 • BeautifulSoup



OR automation platforms such as:

 • Apify

 • Browse AI

 • Puppeteer

 • 

 • Zapier



You must also understand:

 • HTML page structure

 • CSS selectors

 • web scraping techniques

 • data formatting

 • API usage (preferred)



?



Deliverables



Your final system should:



? Search websites automatically

? Extract specific data fields

? Store results in Google Sheets or Airtable

? Run automatically or on schedule

? Flag missing data

? Prevent duplicates

? Be documented so it can be maintained later



?



Tools We Currently Use



You may work with:

 • Google Sheets

 • Airtable

 • Python scripts

 • automation platforms



You should recommend the best technical solution for reliability and long-term maintenance.



?



Important: Application Test (Required)



To be considered for this role, you must complete the following small test task.



This helps us verify you actually understand web data extraction.



?



TEST TASK



Find 5 building violations in New York City from the public building database.



Use this site:



NYC Building Information System





Steps:

 1. Search for properties in the Bronx or Brooklyn.

 2. Open the Violations section for each property.

 3. Collect the following information:



 • property address

 • violation number

 • violation type

 • issue date

 • status

 • source page link



Create a small table like:

Address -Violation # -Type-Date- Status-Source



Bonus (Optional)



If you want to stand out, also include:

 • a short explanation of how you would automate collecting this information

 • what tools or programming language you would use

 • how the bot would store the data



?



What We Look For



Strong candidates will demonstrate:



? ability to analyze websites

? understanding of automation workflows

? clean data organization

? ability to build reliable scripts

? clear communication



?



How to Apply



When applying, please include:

 1. Your experience with web scraping or automation

 2. Tools or languages you are strongest with

 3. A link to any previous automation projects (if available)

 4. Your completed test task



Applications that do not complete the test will not be reviewed.



?



Opportunity for Long-Term Work



This position may expand to additional projects including:

 • monitoring public records

 • tracking permit filings

 • monitoring industry data

 • building multiple automation systems



Reliable candidates may receive long-term weekly work.

title: Video Editor & AI Content Creator ? Scale With a $1M+/Year Scandinavian Brand (Full-Time, $900-1200/mo + Bonuses)
description:
JOB DESCRIPTION:

Start your application with the word "Viking" or it won't be read.



Here's what's happening:

We're a Scandinavian e-commerce brand in pet health that crossed $1M+ in annual revenue in our first year. We have 25,000+ customers. Our ads are what built this — not investors, not luck, not partnerships. Direct response ads on Meta that convert cold traffic into buyers, every single day.

And we're just getting started.

Right now, our biggest bottleneck is creative. We need more ads, faster, better, and we need someone who can own that process alongside the CEO. Not just "edit videos." Actually understand why an ad works, build more of what wins, kill what doesn't, and constantly push the bar higher.

That's you.



WHY THIS ROLE IS DIFFERENT:

This isn't a "here's a brief, make it pretty" job. You'll see real numbers. You'll know which ads are printing money and which ones flopped. You'll understand the strategy behind every creative decision. And over time, you'll go from executing briefs to creating winning concepts on your own.

We want someone who grows into a Creative Strategist — not someone who stays a button-pusher forever.

Where you start:

Video Editor & AI Content Creator — executing briefs, editing ads, building assets.

Where you can go (6-12 months):

Creative Lead — concepting ads, directing UGC creators, owning the entire creative pipeline.

We've seen what happens when we find the right person and give them room to run. That's what we're offering.



WHAT YOU'LL ACTUALLY DO:

Week 1-4 (Onboarding):

Learn our brand, our customer (we'll share our full research), our ad library, and our workflows. Edit 3-5 video ads per week from existing footage and assets. Get familiar with our brand and content pipeline. Go through our editing training program.

Month 2+ (Full Speed):

Edit 5-10 short-form video ads per week 
, Instagram, TikTok). Create UGC-style and testimonial-style edits from raw footage. Build image and video assets using AI generation tools (Midjourney, Runway, Kling, CapCut AI — we'll train you on our specific stack). Repurpose winning concepts into new variations and formats. Experiment with new AI tools and workflows — then show the team what works. Assist with creative assets as needed 
 banners, thumbnails, simple motion graphics).

KPIs — How we measure success:

Ads delivered on time (deadline = deadline, no exceptions).

Creative hit rate — percentage of your ads that beat our control (we track this).

Volume — consistent output without quality dropping.

Proactivity — you flag problems, suggest ideas, and improve without being asked.



WHO WE'RE LOOKING FOR:

You're a video editor who's already playing with AI tools because you're genuinely curious. Not because someone told you to — because you can't help it. You've tested Runway, Kling, Pika, Midjourney, CapCut AI, or similar tools on your own time. You understand that AI doesn't replace creativity — it 10x's it.

You also understand direct response. You know that the first 3 seconds of an ad d
 everything. You've watched breakdowns of winning ads. You notice hooks, transitions, pacing. Maybe you've edited ads before. Maybe you've just studied them obsessively. Either way, you get it.



Required:

Strong video editing skills (Premiere Pro, DaVinci Resolve, or CapCut — tool doesn't matter, output does).

Experience editing short-form content (ads, Reels, TikToks).

Hands-on experience with at least 2 AI tools (image gen, video gen, or AI-assisted editing).

Good eye for typography, pacing, and visual hierarchy.

Solid written English for team communication.

Reliable internet and a setup that can handle video editing.

Bonus (will put you ahead):

You can show ads you've edited that actually ran as paid campaigns.

You understand hook ? story ? CTA structure.

Experience with Shopify, Canva, or Figma.

Motion graphics or animation skills.

Experience in pet, health, wellness, or DTC e-commerce.



COMPENSATION & GROWTH:

$900 – $1,200 USD/month base (depending on experience).

Performance bonuses on winning ads (ads that beat our control and scale = bonus for you).

13th month bonus after 1 year.

Salary review at 6 months — if you're performing, you'll be compensated for it.

Clear path from Video Editor ? Creative Lead as we scale.

Paid monthly via EasyPay or PayPal.



THE DETAILS:

Full-time, 40 hours per week.

Flexible schedule — but minimum 3-4 hours daily overlap with Central European Time (CET).

Long-term position — we're building a team, not hiring for a project.

You'll work directly with the CEO. No layers. No bureaucracy. Direct feedback, fast decisions.

Remote — work from anywhere in the Philippines.



HOW TO APPLY (READ CAREFULLY):



Applications that skip any of these steps will be deleted immediately.

Step 1: Start your message with the word "Viking."

Step 2: Send your portfolio OR 3 examples of short-form video content you've edited (ads, Reels, TikToks). If you've created anything using AI tools, include it — it will put you ahead.

Step 3: Answer these two questions (2-3 sentences each):

— "What AI tool have you experimented with recently, and what specifically did you use it for?"

— "What's a
 or Instagram ad you've seen recently that you thought was really well made? Why?"

Step 4: Record a 60-90 second Loom video introducing yourself. Show your face, tell us who you are, why this role excites you, and what you'd bring. (If you don't know Loom — it's free at 
. This is part of the test.)



HIRING PROCESS:



1. Application review (we read every "Viking" application)

2. Portfolio review — does your work match our standard?

3. Top 5-6 candidates receive a paid test task ($20-30 USD) — a real brief, real footage, real deadline

4. Top 2-3 get a Zoom interview with the CEO

5. Offer + 2-week paid trial

6. Full-time hire



We keep this post active and review applications on a rolling basis. If you're reading this, we're still hiring. Apply now.

title: Customer Retention Specialist
description:
IMPORTANT: APPLICATIONS WILL ONLY BE CONSIDERED FROM CANDIDATES WITH PRIOR SAAS INDUSTRY EXPERIENCE IN RETENTION-FOCUSED ROLES.





ABOUT THE POSITION:

We are seeking a proactive and relationship-driven Customer Retention Specialist to support and nurture our growing customer base. In this role, you will focus on strengthening customer relationships, improving overall satisfaction, and promoting long-term retention.



The ideal candidate is highly organized, communicates clearly, and takes initiative in identifying ways to enhance the customer experience. You will work closely with customers to understand their goals, address concerns, and ensure they continue to receive value from our platform.



As the primary point of contact for assigned customers, you will build and maintain strong, long-term relationships while monitoring customer satisfaction and resolving concerns proactively. You will conduct regular check-ins to ensure customers are achieving their goals and identify opportunities to improve retention and engagement.



In addition, you will collaborate with internal teams to resolve customer issues effectively, assist with onboarding new customers, and maintain accurate records of all customer interactions. You will also track feedback, identify trends or recurring concerns, and support renewal efforts to help maintain long-term customer relationships.



WHAT WE ARE LOOKING FOR:

• Strong English communication skills — both written and verbal are REQUIRED

• Proven experience in a customer retention role is REQUIRED

• Strong interpersonal and relationship-building skills

• Strong problem-solving abilities and attention to detail

• Ability to collaborate effectively with internal teams

• Calm, professional, and solution-oriented when handling challenges

• Strong analytical thinking and ability to interpret customer feedback and trends



WORK SETUP:

• Remote

• Full-time

• 8 hours per day, 5 days per week



HOW TO APPLY:

     • Use “SUCCESS” as the subject line of your

     • Write a short cover letter about yourself and relevant experience

     • Include a link to your most updated resume/CV



APPLICATIONS WITHOUT A RESUME OR RESUME LINK WILL NOT BE REVIEWED

title: Instagram Cold DM Setter / VA for Fitness Coaching Business
description:
I am looking for a motivated, reliable, and skilled VA to help assist me with Instagram cold outreach for my fitness coaching business.



What you will be doing:

You will be sending 80–100 cold DMs per day to potential clients using my outreach framework and following up with leads consistently.



This role is not just about copying and pasting messages. I need someone who knows how to start natural conversations, keep them going, ask probing questions, build rapport, and help move the conversation in the right direction.



What I’m looking for:



Previous Instagram cold outreach / DM setting experience



Experience in the fitness industry or strong familiarity with fitness coaching offers, fitness clients, and the types of struggles they deal with



Experience with sending completely cold DM's with an end without ads organically



Strong understanding of how to identify quality prospective clients



Someone who is an excellent conversationalist and can make interactions feel natural, engaging, and genuine



Ability to ask the right follow-up and probing questions to keep conversations moving



Hardworking, dependable, and able to consistently meet daily outreach requirements



Strong written communication skills



Someone who can follow instruction, stay organized, and represent my brand well



Compensation:



$300/month base pay



Bonus structure with the opportunity to make $1,500+ per month



Bi-weekly pay via PayPal or Wise



To apply:

To demonstrate your seriousness, please apply with the word “FIT” at the top of your application.



I will not review your application if you do not include this.



Please also attach in your portfolio or application any previous Instagram DM cold outreach experience, especially anything related to the fitness industry, if applicable.



I’m looking for someone who can come in, learn quickly, connect with people well, and become a valuable part of the team.



I look forward to hearing from you soon.

title: Shopify Ads Specialist
description:
We are looking for an experienced Shopify Advertising Specialist to help scale our Shopify store through high-converting advertising campaigns.



The ideal candidate understands e-commerce funnels, paid traffic, and conversion optimization, not just running ads.



Responsibilities

 • Create and manage paid ad campaigns for our Shopify store

 • Optimize campaigns for ROAS, CPA, and conversions

 • Conduct audience targeting and retargeting strategies

 • Test creatives, ad copies, and landing pages

 • Analyze ad performance and continuously improve results

 • Implement conversion tracking and pixel setup

 • Provide weekly reports and scaling strategies



Platforms You Must Have Experience With

 • Meta Ads Manager

title: Local SEO and AEO (LLM Search) Specialist
description:
Hello! 



Podcast Builders is looking for a highly driven SEO/AEO specialist to help us become the most visible podcast company in the western Chicago suburbs.



Our goal is not to “do SEO tasks.”

Our goal is to dominate search results.



When founders search things like:



• podcast studio near me

• podcast production company near me

• podcast marketing agency

• how to start a podcast for business

• Chicagoland podcast studio



Podcast Builders should consistently appear at or near the top of results.



We also want to appear in AI-generated answers from platforms such as:



• ChatGPT

• Gemini

• Claude

• Perplexity



This role is about building a strategy and executing it so Podcast Builders becomes the default company people discover when searching for podcast services locally.



Compensation



$800 USD per month 



This has the potential to be a long-term role with potential for growth based on performance and results. (Although it will start as a 3 month role 



The Objective:



Within the next 3-6 months we want Podcast Builders to become:



• One of the top results on Google for podcast-related searches in the western Chicago suburbs

• A top Google Maps result for podcast studios and podcast production

• A company that frequently appears in AI search results and recommendations



Success in this role means increased rankings, traffic, and leads from search.



What Success Looks Like



Examples of outcomes we want to achieve:



Ranking on page one for searches like:



• podcast studio near me

• podcast studio Chicago suburbs

• podcast production company near me

• podcast marketing agency near me



Showing up in AI answers and recommendations when people ask questions like:



• how do I start a podcast for my business

• what is the best podcast studio near Chicago

• should my company start a podcast



Increasing:



• organic website traffic

• Google Business profile visibility

• inbound leads from search



Your Role



Your job is to design and execute a strategy that improves our visibility across:



• Google search

• Google Maps

• AI search platforms

• blog and content rankings



You will identify the highest-value opportunities and implement strategies that move us toward the goal of becoming the top podcast brand discovered through search locally.



This may include:



• optimizing our Google Business profile

• improving website SEO

• developing content strategies

• building backlinks

• optimizing content for AI search engines



But the focus is always on results, not activity.



Skills Required



Strong experience with:



• Local SEO

• Google Business Profile optimization

• Keyword research and search intent

• On-page SEO

• Content SEO

• Backlink strategies



Bonus experience:



• AI search optimization (AEO / LLM search)

• Schema markup

• SEO tools like Ahrefs or SEMrush



Tools



Google Search Console

Google Analytics

Ahrefs or SEMrush

AI tools for research and optimization



How to Apply



Please include:



Your resume

Examples of websites you helped rank in Google search

The SEO/AEO tools you typically use



Podcast Builders is looking for someone who wants to win in search, not just complete tasks.



If you enjoy building strategies that lead to real visibility and real growth, we’d love to hear from you.



Looking forward to hearing from you! 



-Alex

title: Virtual Assistant – Digital Media & Creative Operations (Remote)
description:
If you love film, television, Hollywood, media content, and the entertainment industry, this may be the perfect opportunity for you.



We are seeking a reliable and detail-oriented Virtual Assistant based in the Philippines to support a creative professional in Los Angeles who works as an Actor, Writer, Director, and Producer.



This role supports multiple creative and business projects including social media, online coaching, voice-over work, digital products, drama education resources, and fil
dia production projects.



This is a beginning-level position with excellent potential for future growth in responsibility and salary as the business grows and becomes more successful. 



You will work directly with the business owner and help manage the operational side of a growing creative brand in the entertainment industry.





Responsibilities - 





Social Media & Content Support:



Schedule and publish social media posts for multiple accounts (Instagram, YouTube, TikTok)



Write captions and research hashtags



Upload short-form video content and organize media files



Track analytics and engagement metrics



Assist with content repurposing across platforms





Research & Business Growth:



Conduct online research for new business opportunities



Identify potential clients, collaborators, and marketing opportunities



Research entertainment industry contacts and opportunities



Find new ideas and strategies to help grow the business





Coaching & Workshop Promotion:



Assist in promoting online acting coaching sessions and workshops



Update website information and online listings



Manage signups and help organize workshop materials





Voice-Over & Media Support:



Help organize voice-over submissions and audition materials



Upload media content to platforms like YouTube



Assist with organizing digital media files and recordings





AI Tools & Digital Workflow:



Use AI tools to assist with content creation, research, and writing



Follow AI prompt workflows provided by the business owner



Help implement AI systems for efficiency and productivity





Film & Media Production Support:



Assist with research and coordination for film and media projects



Support development, pre-production, production, and post-production organization



Help organize scripts, documents, and production materials





Drama Education & Digital Products:



Assist with formatting and organizing drama education materials



Help prepare digital products such as PDFs and teaching resources



Upload and manage product files when needed





Administrative Support:



Conduct travel research and booking options



Help track travel points and loyalty programs



Update calendar appointments and scheduling



General administrative and organizational tasks





Required Skills:



Strong written English communication



Excellent organizational skills



Ability to conduct accurate online research



Detail-oriented and reliable



Comfortable using new software and online tools



Strong internet connection





Bonus Skills (Not Required but Helpful):



Canva or basic graphic design



Video editing or media organization



Social media management tools



Experience using AI tools (ChatGPT, etc.)



YouTube uploads or content scheduling tools





Work Schedule:



Remote position

Full-time or part-time available

Flexible schedule with consistent weekly hours



Compensation:



This position offers growth opportunities as the business expands, including potential increases in responsibility and compensation, as well as bonuses. This is a long-term position. 





Why This Is a Unique Opportunity:



You will be working directly with a creative professional in Los Angeles, gaining exposure to the entertainment industry, filmmaking, online media, and digital entrepreneurship.





This role is ideal for someone who is:



Interested in film and television



Curious about media production



Excited about working with creative projects



Motivated to grow with a small but expanding business



To confirm that you carefully read this job description, please include the word "Hollywood" in the first line of your application.

Manage multiple projects simultaneously while staying adaptable in a fast-changing environment.

title: Bankruptcy Petition Preparer
description:
We are seeking an individual with experience preparing Chapter 7 and Chapter 13 bankruptcy petitions on "Best Case" software. The candidate we hire must possess the following skills:



1. Familarity with Best Case software, including creating new cases, importing credit reports, and reviewing pay information to prepare budgets.

2. Familarity with both state and federal exemptions (though we will teach NYS exemptions as needed)

3. Familiarty with Means Testing calculations.



Candidate will access data by logging into our CRM database remotely.



Approx volume of petitions will be 70-90 per month. 



Unfortunately, we cannot train a candidate without actual experience in the US consumer bankruptcy field.  This is a very specific legal specialty, and we require someone who can start this position with little training.

title: SALES & MARKETING MANAGER (Part-Time, Remote)
description:
We are a UK commercial cleaning and facilities company building a remote outbound sales team. We need an experienced Sales & Marketing Manager to lead two Philippines-based VAs — one running cold
 sequences via Instantly, one handling calls and bookings.

This is a leadership role. You own the team’s results.



WHAT YOU WILL DO



• Lead, motivate and train both VAs daily

• Review daily reports and send written feedback every morning

• Monitor and manage Instantly cold
 campaigns

• Audit lead quality and coach the team to hit targets

• Send a weekly pipeline report to the CEO

• Be the single point of contact between the CEO and the VA team



PAY & BENEFITS

• $7.50/hr base ($6.50/hr for 30-day trial period)

• Up to $150/month KPI bonus based on team performance

• 2% revenue bonus on every client contract signed — uncapped

• Hours increase to 20–30 hrs/week as we grow the sales team

• Paid weekly via Wise (USD), every Friday



YOU MUST HAVE

• 3+ years in B2B sales management or outbound marketing management

• Experience managing and coaching a remote sales or outreach team

• Hands-on experience with Instantly, Lemlist, or a similar cold
 tool

• Strong CRM skills (Zoho, HubSpot, or similar)

• Excellent written and spoken English

• Available 09:00–13:00 UK time, Monday–Friday (Manila: 16:00–20:00 BST / 17:00–21:00 GMT)



HOW TO APPLY



Send a message that includes all three of the following. Applications missing any of these will not be reviewed:

• A short intro explaining your experience managing a cold outreach or sales team

• Your answer to this: “A Sales VA is making 25 calls per day against a target of 40. What do you do?”

• Confirmation you are available 09:00–13:00 UK time, Monday–Friday



THIS ROLE IS NOT FOR YOU IF



• You manage by weekly check-ins only — this role needs daily engagement and daily feedback

• You are not comfortable giving direct, honest feedback to people you manage

• You have never personally used a cold
 tool like Instantly or Lemlist

• You treat reporting as your main output — results are your main output

• You are looking for a passive or low-effort part-time role

title: Social Media Lead Generation Specialist for Apartment Locating Brand
description:
Compensation:

Hourly base + performance-based bonuses



About the Role

We are hiring a highly skilled Social Media Lead Generation Specialist to help grow an apartment locating business through Instagram and TikTok.



This is not a basic social media posting job. We are looking for someone who knows how to create content that brings in real leads, not just likes or views.



You will be responsible for managing social media content across our apartment locating pages, editing videos, creating Canva graphics, posting consistently, responding to engagement, and helping turn content into inbound leads.



We already have content. Some of it is edited and some of it is raw. We need someone who can organize it, edit it well, post strategically, and improve our social media presence so it generates leads at scale.



What You’ll Be Doing



Manage content posting across Instagram and TikTok



Edit short-form videos for reels and TikTok



Create Canva graphics, story content, and social media visuals



Repurpose existing content into multiple posts



Write captions, hooks, on-screen text, and lead-focused calls to action



Help generate inbound apartment leads through social media content



Respond to comments and initial DMs during your shift



Track what content is performing well and what is generating leads



Submit weekly reports with top posts, leads generated, and recommendations



Keep content organized and easy to reuse



Daily Content Expectations



TikTok: 5 posts per day



Instagram: 3 feed posts or reels per day across active pages



Stories: 5 to 10 story frames per day



Community management during shift



Daily lead/source tracking



What We’re Looking For



Strong video editing skills for short-form content



Strong Canva design skills



Experience growing Instagram and TikTok pages



Ability to create clean, polished, engaging content



Understands how to create content that drives DMs, inquiries, and leads



Strong English communication skills



Organized and able to work independently



Fast turnaround and consistent execution



Able to follow direction but also bring ideas and recommendations



You Are a Great Fit If You



Know how to turn raw footage into strong short-form content



Understand hooks, CTAs, captions, and content formatting



Can make social media content look polished and professional



Care about results, not just posting for the sake of posting



Have experience with lead generation, local service brands, or real estate-related content



Bonus if You Have Experience With



Real estate content



Apartment locating content

title: Music Management and Entertainment Growth Assistant
description:
Job Posting: 

Location: Remote (Philippines)







Focus: Exclusive Support for a Professional Recording Artist



About the Artist: You will be working directly for [Artist Name], a rising [Genre, e.g., Pop/Country/Soul] recording artist. With a signature sound described as [Vibe, e.g., "emotive, powerhouse vocals with a modern edge"], the brand is currently at an exciting tipping point. Having already achieved [Mention 1-2 wins, e.g., 50k monthly listeners / a sold-out local residency / a new album release], we are now focused on scaling the performance schedule and expanding the digital fanbase. We need a "growth engine" to help take this career to the next level.



About the Role: As the Music & Entertainment Growth Assistant, you aren't just handling admin—you are driving the business forward. Your mission is twofold: ensure the artist’s digital presence is flawless and fill the calendar with high-value performances. This role requires a mix of creative marketing, meticulous organization, and the "hustle" to make sales calls and close deals with talent buyers.



Key Responsibilities:



Marketing, Relationship Mgmt, Bookings & Business Development : You will proactively research venues, festivals, and corporate events. You will be responsible for making outbound sales calls and sending personalized pitches to secure paid performances.



Social Media Management: You will plan and schedule content across social media platforms like TikTok, Instagram, YouTube staying on top of music trends and engaging with fans to build a tight-knit community.



 Marketing: You will manage the artist’s mailing list, designing and sending weekly/monthly newsletters to announce new music, merchandise drops, and tour dates.



Relationship Nurturing & CRM: You will maintain our database of industry contacts, ensuring we follow up with talent buyers and past clients to keep the artist "top of mind."



Admin & Logistics: You will update the official website, manage the master calendar, and ensure the Electronic Press Kit (EPK) is always updated for high-stakes opportunities.



Requirements:



Exceptional Verbal English: You must be confident, clear, and persuasive on the phone with US-based venues and organizers.



Sales Mindset: You enjoy the challenge of outreach and are motivated by hitting booking targets and earning bonuses.



Marketing Savvy: Proficient in Canva,
 platforms (like Mailchimp), and social media scheduling tools.



Proactive & Reliable: You don't wait to be told what to do; you look for opportunities to grow the brand. You must have a stable, high-speed internet connection.



How to Apply (Mandatory)

To be considered, we require a 1–2 minute video introduction. Applications without a video link will be automatically disqualified. Please include:



Experience: A quick summary of your background in sales or digital marketing.



The "Why": Why does the music industry excite you?



The Live Pitch: Spend 30 seconds pretending I am a festival organizer. Pitch me on why I should book Marionna for my event.



The Link: Upload your video to Loom, Google Drive, or YouTube (unlisted) and include the link with your resume.

title: Facebook Ads Media Buyer / Campaign Manager
description:

 Ads Media Buyer to join our team. Your primary responsibility will be the day-to-day management and execution of our
 ad campaigns, ensuring new creatives are tested efficiently and data is tracked flawlessly.



We operate at a high scale, so strict adherence to our standard operating procedures (SOPs) and meticulous data tracking are non-negotiable.

- Campaign Execution: Uploading and launching new ad creatives into our test campaigns exactly as outlined in our SOPs.

- Daily Reporting: Conducting end-of-day check-ins detailing total spend, ROAS, and explicitly noting which ads were turned off.

- Meticulous Tracking: Updating our master tracking sheets daily.

- Data Organization: Cataloging every single ad in our database, ensuring all required fields are filled out accurately (e.g., creative angle, link to our Notion board, and the live ad link).

 Ad spend.

- Fluent English: Impeccable English comprehension and speaking skills are strictly required for team communication and reporting.

- System-Oriented: You must be highly organized, comfortable working heavily in spreadsheets and Notion, and able to follow precise instructions without deviation.



How to Apply

- Introduce yourself and explain your previous media buying experience.

- Provide screen-share proof of the ad accounts you have managed, specifically demonstrating experience with $5k-$10k+ daily spends.

title: Executive Assistant to the Physician-CEO
description:
I am a US-based physician with an active clinical practice and several business ventures in the healthcare space. My work spans patient care, online education, and health technology — and I need reliable, organized support to keep everything running smoothly.



I need a highly organized, intelligent, and proactive Executive Assistant who can serve as the operational backbone of my professional life — someone who takes ownership, thinks ahead, and gets things done without needing to be micromanaged.



This is not a typical EA role.

You will support a busy physician across both clinical and business operations — handling communications, documentation, research, and scheduling across multiple concurrent projects. If you thrive in a fast-paced environment and enjoy bringing order to complex work — this role is for you.



Core Responsibilities

This is a full-time, long-term remote position. You will handle a wide range of administrative and operational tasks across both clinical and business activities. You must be comfortable managing multiple priorities simultaneously and working independently with minimal supervision.



RESPONSIBILITIES

Manage calendar, scheduling, and appointments across multiple time zones

Handle
 correspondence via Gmail — draft, send, and organize on behalf of the principal

Organize and maintain files in Google Drive (documents, reports, contracts, protocols)

Transcribe and format voice-dictated notes into polished Google Docs

Track tasks and action items across concurrent projects and follow through on deadlines

Coordinate with contractors, vendors, clinical staff, and external partners

Conduct research tasks — medical, regulatory, business, and administrative

Assist with formatting presentations, business documents, and one-pagers

Monitor and triage inboxes; flag priority items and respond to routine inquiries

Support light bookkeeping and expense tracking in Google Sheets

Assist with social media scheduling and basic online presence tasks



REQUIREMENTS

Excellent written and spoken English (C1 or above)

Expert-level Google Workspace — Docs, Sheets, Gmail, Drive, Calendar

Strong transcription and document formatting skills

Prior experience as a VA or EA supporting a business owner or executive

Highly organized, detail-oriented, and proactive

Able to handle confidential medical and business information with discretion

Reliable internet connection and a dedicated, quiet workspace



NICE TO HAVE

Background in healthcare administration or medical settings

Experience with research tasks (PubMed, regulatory, market)

Familiarity with Canva, slide design, or basic content tools

Experience with project tools such as Asana, Notion, or ClickUp



CONFIDENTIALITY NOTE

A signed Non-Disclosure Agreement (NDA) is required before work begins. This role involves access to protected health information (PHI), confidential business materials, and sensitive legal documents. You must be comfortable handling all such information with strict discretion. Confidentiality obligations apply during and after employment.



Note: I am looking for the best of the best you must be competent and efficient.

* Leverage AI-driven tools to streamline workflows, optimize response times, and enhance the quality of support delivered.

* Drive continuous improvement by gathering and sharing actionable customer insights with product and internal teams to enhance offerings and processes.



You’re Perfect for This Role If You

* Understand fraud detection, repayments, and collections, with empathy for customers’ financial situations.

* Communicate effectively across chat,
, and phone, adapting tone and approach to each channel.

* Are tech-savvy and comfortable using AI tools and automation to streamline work.

* Thrive in a fast-paced, customer-first startup environment where priorities shift quickly.

* Are an empathetic problem solver with strong attention to detail, professionalism, and integrity.

title: Content Strategist and Creative Producer
description:
JOB OPPORTUNITY

Content Strategist & Creative Producer

Dental Industry | Remote | Base Salary + Performance Bonuses



We're building an in-house content machine for a growing group of dental practices and we need the

person who makes it all run.

This isn't a "post on social media" job. You're the creative engine. You research what's working in the

market, develop ideas, write scripts using AI tools, brief the team on exactly what to film, and then

manage the content through editing and publishing. You own the pipeline from idea to live.



WHAT YOU'LL ACTUALLY DO

• Research competitors weekly using Meta Ads Library and spot trends before they peak

• Generate ad concepts and organic content ideas constantly, always testing new hooks and angles

• Write detailed scripts and shot briefs using AI, so the clinic team knows exactly what to film with

zero guesswork

• Coordinate content through the full workflow: filming team, video editor, ad specialist, and organic

posting schedule

• Develop a steady stream of content across formats: UGC talking videos, patient testimonials,

before/after reveals, educational tips from the dentist, behind-the-scenes clinic 
nts, staff

culture clips, and offer ads



YOU'RE A FIT IF

• You're fluent with AI tools and use them to move faster, not as a crutch

• You think like a media company, not a social media manager

• You're organized enough to manage a multi-step content workflow across a team

• You understand what makes people stop scrolling, specifically in health and service industries

WHAT'S ON OFFER



Base salary + performance bonuses based on content output and results. This role grows with the

team. If you can build something that works, there's a real opportunity here.



To apply, send your portfolio or examples of content you've ideated, scripted, or managed.

title: Senior Bookkeeper *Superstar Only*
description:
We are looking for two experienced bookkeepers to join our finance team and take ownership of expense categorization, transaction reconciliation, accounts payable, and invoice processing across multiple legal entities.



The bookkeepers will work closely with the CFO, ensuring that all financial transactions are accurately recorded, categorized, and reconciled on a regular basis. This role is ideal for someone who is detail-oriented, organized, and comfortable managing financial data across multiple platforms — including Xero, Stripe, PayPal, Shopify, and our custom CRM.



Key Responsibilities

- Categorize all expenses and transactions in Xero, ensuring accurate classification for reporting and compliance

- Reconcile transactions across multiple payment platforms, including Stripe, PayPal, Shopify, and custom CRM tools

- Manage accounts payable, ensuring all invoices are properly reviewed, recorded, and scheduled for payment

- Assist with invoice processing, ensuring all vendor invoices are accurately documented and match purchase orders where applicable

- Work closely with the CFO to provide up-to-date financial records for monthly, quarterly, and annual reporting

- Ensure all financial data is accurate and properly organized to support compliance across multiple jurisdictions

- Flag discrepancies or unusual transactions for review by the CFO



What We’re Looking For

- At least 5 years of experience in bookkeeping and expense reconciliation

- Strong proficiency in Xero

- Experience working with Stripe, PayPal, Shopify, and custom CRMs

- Strong attention to detail and organizational skills

- Experience handling multi-entity, multi-currency financial data preferred

- Comfortable working in a remote-first environment

- Fluent in English, both written and spoken



Requirements for Effective Remote Work

- Reliable computer or laptop capable of photo and video editing

- Stable high-speed internet connection

- Conducive work environment



Working Schedule

- Full-time opportunity

- Remote work setup (Philippines-based applicants only)



Benefits

- Competitive pay

- Training and growth opportunities

- Opportunity to work with a fast-growing content-driven company



Salary range

- Php 50, 000 to Php 70, 000 (based on experience)



Application Instructions

Since this is a long-term position, there will be an in-depth qualification process. If you believe you have what it takes, here is what to do next:



Please go to the link below, review the questions carefully, and share the required information.






If you believe you meet our qualifications and requirements, we encourage you to apply now and become a valuable part of our rapidly expanding company.

title: Notion Systems Architect (Zapier/Make) — Build a Founder Operating System
description:
We are looking for someone who doesn’t just automate workflows, but can design and build the operating system behind them.



Systems Architect (Notion + Automation)



Luxure Lifestyle is a high-touch lifestyle and executive support brand entering a growth phase. We are building the internal systems required to support scale while protecting executive focus.



We are hiring a Systems Architect to design and build our founder operating system from the ground up.



This role is hands-on. You will personally architect and configure the systems that manage operations, reporting, and organizational visibility.



This is not a strategy-only position. You will design and build the system yourself.



---------------------
. Founder Operating System (Notion)

Design and build a centralized operating system including:

Relational databases for tasks, meetings, initiatives, KPIs, hiring, and SOPs

Clean database architecture and structured permissions

Connected workflows that eliminate fragmented tools

Scalable systems designed for long-term use



2. Automation & Workflow Infrastructure

Build systems that organize and route operational work:

Centralized intake from Gmail, Slack, and meeting outputs

Approval pipelines and structured review processes

Automation using Zapier or Make

Safeguards to prevent duplicate or missed requests



3. Executive Reporting & Visibility

Create systems that provide leadership with clear visibility:

KPI dashboards connected to measurable outcomes

Initiative tracking tied to company priorities

Automated reporting views

Monitoring logs for automation and workflow activity



4. Governance & Documentation

Ensure systems are usable and sustainable:

Clear escalation and decision pathways 

Documentation for non-technical teams

Operational infrastructure designed for scale

------------------------------------

Requirements



3–5+ years experience with Zapier or Make

Strong expertise in Notion relational database architecture

Experience building automation workflows and integrations

Experience building dashboards or KPI reporting systems

Ability to design systems for long-term scalability

Strong documentation and process design skills

------------------------------------

Engagement Structure



This role begins with a 90-day build and observation period.

During this period you will deploy the operating system and present a complete system walkthrough.

Long-term engagement will depend on system clarity, performance, and structural integrity.

-------------------------------------

Application Requirements



To apply, submit:



Resume

A portfolio, case study, or walkthrough showing a system you designed (Notion workspace, dashboard, or architecture overview).

By reading the job responsibilities, how can you help build the system architecture for the company? Generic answers will not be entertained.

title: Client Success Manager (CSM)
description:
We are Apartment locators who  helps renters secure apartments faster by matching them with the best options, booking tours, and guiding them through the application process. We move quickly, follow up consistently, and operate with tight systems so no lead falls through the cracks.



Hourly pay  + Bonus's 

Part-time

5 days/week

You must be available to respond to leads quickly during your shift.

Compensation

Competitive hourly 

Performance-based bonuses available after training (tours booked, apps submitted, leases confirmed)



Your Mission

Turn leads into leases by responding fast, following up consistently, booking tours, and keeping our CRM pipeline clean. This role is for someone who can execute daily.



Core Responsibilities (Daily)

1) Lead Follow-Up + Tour Booking (Top Priority)

Respond to new leads quickly and professionally

Follow up with warm leads until tours are booked or the lead is closed out

Collect key details: move date, budget, city, must-haves, unit preferences, income/approval needs

Book tours and confirm details with clients and properties when needed



2) CRM Pipeline Management (Daily hygiene)

Update stages correctly (New Lead ? Qualified ? Options Sent ? Tour Pending ? Tour Booked ? Applied ? Leased/Won)

Correctly label Ghosted vs Closed Lost

Tag leads properly, remove duplicates, and ensure notes are complete



3) Marketplace Lead Gen (Light but consistent)

Create 3
 Marketplace posts/day

Reply to messages at the start and end of your shift



4) Social Posting (Consistency)

Post at least 1 piece of content/day on Texas Apartment Finds IG or TikTok

Light/simple content is fine (leasing tips, quick slides, captions, reposts, basic reels)



5) Daily Reporting (Non-negotiable)

Update our Google Sheet “Daily Ops Command Center” at the end of every shift:

follow-ups sent

stage moves

tours requested/booked

apps started/submitted

SLA met (Y/N)

end-of-shift notes + blockers



Performance Standards (KPIs)

You will be measured on:

Speed-to-lead: New leads responded to within 10 minutes during shift (tracked Y/N)

Follow-ups: 15–25 follow-ups/day

Progression: leads moved forward daily (stage moves)

Tours: 1–2 tours booked/day or 5/week

Apps: at least 1+ app started/submitted weekly (goal increases as volume grows)

Clean, accurate CRM stages (no mislabeling)



Tools We Use

GoHighLevel (CRM + texting)

Google Sheets (daily scoreboard)

 Marketplace

Instagram + TikTok

Dropbox/Drive (light file access)

ASANA

You do not need to be a GoHighLevel expert, but you must be willing to learn quickly and follow SOPs.



Requirements

Strong written English (clear, professional, friendly)

Comfortable sending follow-ups daily (you cannot be shy about outreach)

Organized and detail-oriented (CRM accuracy matters)

Able to handle repetitive tasks with consistency

Fast learner + coachable

Reliable internet and quiet work environment

Bonus (not required):

Apartment locating/leasing/real estate admin experience

Customer support or inside sales experience

Experience booking appointments/tours



Training + Onboarding

Paid training period

SOPs provided

You’ll start with follow-ups + tour booking first, then add posting/content tasks



How to Apply (Required)

To apply, include:

A short intro + your relevant experience

Your internet speed + device type

Your availability (hours + timezone)

The phrase “TAF CSM – speed matters” in your subject line/message

Answer this scenario (2–4 sentences):

A lead says: “I need something downtown Austin under $2,000, moving in 3 weeks.”

Write your response to qualify them and move toward booking tours.

We will only interview applicants who follow instructions.

title: Remote Customer Support and Lead Management-Dental Practice
description:

Twin Oaks Family Dental

Remote | Full-Time | 8:00 AM – 5:00 PM (Central Time)



Position Overview



Twin Oaks Family Dental is a modern dental practice specializing in dental implants, smile makeovers, and full-arch restorations. We are looking for a remote Patient Coordinator who excels at phone communication and can professionally manage incoming calls and online leads from patients interested in dental implant treatment.



This role is focused on answering inbound calls, responding to new patient inquiries, educating patients about treatment options, and scheduling consultations with our doctors.

Maintain prompt response times to new patient leads

Build trust and rapport with prospective patients



Scheduling



Schedule new patient consultations

Lead Follow-Up



Follow up with unscheduled leads



Re-engage patients who inquired but have not yet booked



Track and manage leads through the CRM or practice management software



Documentation



Log call notes and patient interactions



Maintain accurate records in the scheduling system



Update lead status and outcomes



Qualifications

Required



Strong phone communication and customer service skills



Comfortable discussing healthcare treatments and costs



Excellent organizational and follow-up skills



Reliable internet connection and quiet work environment



Ability to work 8 AM – 5 PM Central Time



Preferred



Dental office experience

Sales or lead conversion experience



Familiarity with dental practice management software (Open Dental or similar)



Ideal Candidate



The ideal candidate:



Is personable, confident, and empathetic



Can build trust quickly on the phone



Is comfortable guiding patients toward scheduling



Enjoys helping people improve their health and confidence



Is motivated by helping convert inquiries into scheduled consultations



Compensation



Competitive hourly pay (based on experience)

Opportunity for long-term growth with our practice



About Twin Oaks Family Dental



Twin Oaks Family Dental is a patient-focused dental practice in O’Fallon, Missouri specializing in advanced implant dentistry and full smile transformations. Our team is committed to providing life-changing dental care in a supportive and professional environment.
