title: SENIOR MEDICAL BILLER
description:
SENIOR MEDICAL BILLER

Full-Time | 40 hours/week | 8:00 AM – 5:00 PM EST (Strictly Required)

Location: Remote (Philippines)

Rate: $7.00 USD/hour 

Benefits: 13th Month Pay (Pro-rated) | Paid Training | Performance-based increases



-SHIFT STABILITY REQUIREMENT-

This is a graveyard shift (US Daytime). We are only seeking candidates who have experience working these hours. You must have a proven, established household routine that allows for quiet sleep during the day and high energy during your shift. Please do not apply if you are new to working US hours or new to working from home.



-A SPECIAL NOTE ON PATIENT INTERACTION-

We are looking for a teammate who loves helping people! This is an interactive role which includes patient-facing written and phone comms. Beyond the technical billing work, you will be the billing voice of our practice, helping postpartum mothers understand their insurance, deductibles, and balances via phone and text.



 - Voice Clarity: A neutral or near-accentless North American accent is essential so our sleep-deprived mothers can understand you with ease.



 - Heart for Service: We value warmth, patience, and clear, empathetic communication.



ABOUT US

Atlanta Lactation is a patient-centered, insurance-supported practice providing home visits and telehealth across Georgia. We are an all-female, fully remote healthcare team. We take pride in our stability; our core Filipino tea
mbers have been with us for over 5 years. We value longevity and treat our team like partners in care.



TIME OFF & HOLIDAYS

 - Paid U.S. Holidays: Christmas Day, New Year’s Day, and U.S. Thanksgiving are paid days off. We typically work other U.S. holidays.

 - Flexibility: Unpaid time off is available for Philippines holidays, family events, or medical appointments with advance notice.

 - Support: We are an understanding and flexible team; your health and well-being matter to us!



POSITION OVERVIEW

 - You will manage the full billing cycle: claims submission, denial analysis, and appeals. As a patient liaison, you will be the primary expert helping families navigate their coverage with confidence and clarity.



TECHNICAL EXPERTISE & KEYWORDS

 - Carriers: Aetna, Cigna, UnitedHealthcare (UHC), UMR, and BCBS.

 - Note: We do NOT handle Medicaid or Medicare.

 - Specialized Billing: DME Billing (Durable Medical Equipment), Outpatient Professional Claims.

 - Coding: ICD-10 and CPT code proficiency.



REQUIREMENTS

 - Experience: 3–5+ years of U.S. medical billing. Experience with payer-side (Zelis, Optum, etc.) and private practice is highly preferred.

 - Professional Standards: We value clear, structured communication. We encourage the use of modern tools (AI/spell-checkers) to help your written work stay polished and professional.

 - Technical Resourcefulness: You should be comfortable managing your own home office tech (internet, logins, etc.). Our in-house tech support is wonderful and helpful, so we look for someone who troubleshoots the basics but knows to reach out to us early if they need a hand!

 - Hardware: Reliable high-speed internet, noise-canceling headset, and a quiet home office.

 - Software: We use Office Ally and TriZetto. We provide specific paid training on our internal systems.

 - Eligibility: Female candidates only (due to sensitive communication with postpartum mothers).



HOW TO APPLY (We can’t wait to hear from you!)

 - We want you to succeed! To help us get to know your unique strengths, please message us here on OJP with your Resume link and a 1–2 minute voice recording (audio or video). Both are required. To help us hear your clarity right away, please BEGIN your recording by reading the script below FIRST:

...."Hi, this is [Name] from Atlanta Lactation. I’m calling to follow up on your insurance claim. I noticed a small discrepancy with the deductible, but I’ve already contacted the payer to ensure your benefits are applied correctly so you can focus on your recovery. Please let me know if you have any questions!"

....Your Story: After the script, we’d love to hear:

....Your U.S. medical billing background and the systems/EMRs you’ve mastered.

....Where you are currently working and why you are looking for a new long-term role with our team.

....Your experience with the payer side versus private practice.

....A quick mention of your home office setup and your experience staying tech-ready while working remotely.



We prioritize applications that follow these steps, as it helps us ensure a perfect fit for our professional, self-sufficient team!

title: Meta Ads Creative Strategist
description:
TO APPLY, please fill in application form here: 



We're looking for a systematic Meta Ads specialist who can build Meta ads that consistently hits ROAS targets and scales profitably.



This role is for a data-driven marketer who can own our entire Meta ads system—from scripting to scaling—and deliver measurable results.



You'll receive clear targets (ROAS, budget, CPA) and build a system that delivers these metrics consistently through systematic testing and optimisation.



We want to hire a strategist who can:



- run full-funnel Meta ads (prospecting + re-engagement + retargeting)

- consistently hit ROAS, CPA, spend, and scale targets



You will manage:

- scripting

- concepting ideas

- creative testing

- production workflows

- performance scaling





Who this role is NOT for:

- people who rely on “trends”

- people who only run ads for clothing, beauty pages, or aesthetic reels

- people who managed < 5kusd / mo

- people who can’t articulate why an ad works in data terms (CTR, CPM)

- people who never created video ads





You’ll thrive here if:

- you understand the logical flow of selling - how to build attention, interest, desire and action in a short-form video.

- You build systematic workflows e.g. 5 hooks x 3 lengths x 2 formats = 30 test variations

- You can write high-converting scripts using AIDA, PAS, and other direct-response frameworks

- You have created or scripted over 30 video ads.

- You analyse every metric (CTR, CPM, CPC, AOV) and know exactly why ads win or fail

- You are excited to learn, grow, and eventually lead a team as the company scales 80%+ year on year.





Must-Have Skills:

- Explain how CTR, CPM, CVR influence CAC

- Break down a funnel and identify bottlenecks e.g. what to fix when CPC rises

- Build a systematic creative testing framework e.g. 5 hooks x 3 angles x 2 lengths = 30 videos

- Script value-based, conversion-driven videos





Responsibilities:



- Strategic Ad Creative System – Build a machine delivering 5-10 weekly video ad creatives tailored to different customer pain points and awareness levels



- End-to-End Script Development – Write data-backed scripts using proven frameworks, and develop creative briefs for creators to execute



- Creator Management – Coordinate creators in the US and Australia with precise briefs, manage production timelines, quality control all content, and build repeatable templates for consistent output



- Performance Scaling Framework – Launch structured tests with statistical significance, scale winners systematically, kill losers fast, and document winning patterns



- Data Analysis & Optimisation – Monitor daily performance metrics, conduct weekly creative refreshes to combat fatigue, deliver monthly reports with actionable insights, and continuously refine the formula



- Budget & ROAS Management – Take full ownership of scaling profitably, maintaining target ROAS while increasing spend, and building predictable growth models





What We’re Looking For:

- 3+ years scaling Meta ads for DTC eCommerce brands

- Proven track record of managing 5k USD /month profitably

- Expert-level understanding of Meta Ads Manager and creative testing methodologies

- Strong copywriting skills with direct-response marketing principles

- Advanced analytical ability to interpret data and make systematic improvement

- Experience managing remote creators and production workflows





Details:

- This is a full-time remote role based in Philippines.

- Remuneration: 130,
,000 PHP / month (may vary based on experience)

- Commitment: Full-time (Monday to Friday, 9.30am - 6.30pm)



Why Join Crafti?

- Work on Products That Sell Themselves - Our wellness and lifestyle products are genuinely exciting to market. You'll create ads for products that improve people's lives, with authentic customer stories that make compelling content.



- Direct Impact & CEO Access - You'll report directly to the CEO with full ownership of our Meta ads performance in a Singapore company. Your campaigns directly drive our revenue—when you win, the company wins.



- Rapid Career Growth - We're scaling from 7 to 8 figures, and you'll grow with us. Strong performers can progress from Team Lead to Head of Performance within 12-18 months.





About Crafti



Crafti is a fast-growing Direct-to-Consumer health and wellness brand with sales in the USA and Singapore. We are headquartered in Singapore and operate remotely across 4 countries.



In the last 4 years, we’ve grown to 7 figures in annual revenue with 60–80% YoY growth. As we scale towards 8 figures, we’re looking for driven individuals who want to learn, grow, and advance quickly alongside the company.

title: Creative Strategist 7-fig EU Beauty Brand
description:
About the Company

We’re an aggressively growing e-commerce brand scaling our paid social efforts across Meta and Snapchat. Static image ads are a core driver of our growth, and we’re expanding our creative team to produce more high-performing static concepts.



If you understand how to turn customer insights, angles, and hooks into static ads that capture attention and drive clicks, this role is for you.



The Opportunity

We’re hiring a skilled Creative Strategist to join our remote team full-time. You’ll collaborate directly with our marketing team to develop performance-driven static ad concepts for paid social.



Your ideas will directly impact campaign performance and revenue.



What You’ll Do

- Develop high-converting static ad concepts for paid social (Meta and Snapchat)

- Analyze competitor ads and identify winning hooks, angles, and visual patterns

- Create clear creative briefs for designers to produce image ads

- Produce multiple concept variations for structured A/B testing (hooks, angles, formats, offers)

- Identify new creative opportunities based on performance data and market trends



What We’re Looking For

- Proven experience creating paid social ad concepts (portfolio required)

- Strong understanding of direct response marketing and customer psychology

- Ability to analyze winning ads and replicate successful patterns

- Ability to generate a lot of creative concepts per week

- Familiarity with Meta ads and performance-driven creative testing



Who You Are

- Performance-focused and results-driven

- Analytical about why ads work

- Creative but structured in your thinking

- Organized and system thinker

- Proactive communicator who collaborates well with designers and media buyers



Compensation & Growth

- Rate is on experience

- Fully remote, long-term position

- Direct collaboration with experienced performance marketers

- Opportunity to grow into a senior role as we scale



Expectations

- Full-time availability (40 hours per week, Monday–Friday)

- Consistent weekly delivery of big volumes of ad consepts.



If you’re ready to create ad concepts that scale and be part of a team that values performance and creativity please apply.



When you apply by sending us a message with the following: 

1. URL to the part of your portfolio you find relevant for this job. Dont send your whole portfolio. 

2. A loom video yourself. Share something exceptional you have done related to this position. I am looking for evidence of excellence. Share screen if needed. Do not share any confidential info. Applicants without Looms is not considered.

3. Expected hourly rate for this job.

description:

Your main responsibility will be keeping our accounting system accurate and up to date so the owner can clearly understand the financial health of the company.



This role focuses on record keeping, organization, and financial reporting.



You will not be responsible for sending payments or controlling company funds.



?

Part-Time Position

Monday

?

?

?

title: Google Ads | Meta Ads | SEO Specialist
description:
Google Ads | Meta Ads | SEO Specialist

QVM Digital Marketing Inc. — Winnipeg, MB (Remote-Friendly)



About QVM Digital Marketing

QVM Digital Marketing Inc. is a Winnipeg-based agency helping businesses and non-profits grow through SEO, paid advertising, and web development. We work with clients across Canada, delivering real results with a close-knit, highly collaborative team. We move fast, we care about quality, and we're looking for someone who takes ownership of their work.



The Role

We're looking for a driven and well-rounded digital marketing specialist who can confidently run paid ad campaigns on Google and Meta while also contributing to SEO strategy and execution. This is a single, blended role — not three separate jobs. You'll collaborate directly with our founder and work across multiple client accounts.



What You'll Do

Google Ads



Plan, launch, and optimize Search, Display, Performance Max, and Remarketing campaigns

Conduct keyword research and develop bidding strategies aligned to client goals

Write compelling ad copy and continuously A/B test for performance

Monitor budgets, pacing, and ROAS — and proactively flag issues

Produce clear, client-ready performance reports



Meta Ads



Build and manage campaigns across
 and Instagram (awareness, lead gen, conversions)

Develop audience segments, lookalikes, and retargeting funnels

Collaborate on creative briefs and ad assets — copy, imagery, video direction

Monitor campaign health and optimize based on data, not guesswork

Stay current on Meta algorithm changes and best practices



SEO



Support on-page SEO: meta tags, headings, internal linking, content optimization

Conduct keyword research for organic strategy and blog content planning

Assist with local SEO including Google Business Profile (GBP) management

Run basic technical SEO audits and communicate findings to the dev team

Contribute to monthly SEO reporting and strategic recommendations





What We're Looking For



2+ years of hands-on experience managing Google Ads campaigns (agency experience preferred)

1+ year of experience with Meta Ads Manager

Working knowledge of SEO fundamentals — enough to execute and contribute strategically

Google Ads certification is a strong asset

Comfortable working across multiple client accounts simultaneously

Strong analytical mindset — you understand what the numbers mean and what to do about them

Clear communicator who can explain performance to non-technical clients

Self-managed, detail-oriented, and accountable





Nice to Have



Experience with GoHighLevel, HubSpot, or similar CRM/marketing platforms

Familiarity with Google Analytics 4 (GA4) and Google Tag Manager

Basic understanding of WordPress or web platforms





What We Offer



Competitive compensation based on your experience

Remote-friendly work environment

Direct collaboration with leadership — your ideas matter here

Diverse client portfolio across industries including non-profit, construction, legal, and more

A team that values quality, communication, and growth

title: Content Executive (Part-Time, with path to Full-Time)
description:
Content Executive (Part-Time, with path to Full-Time)



Location: Philippines

Type: Initially part-time, with potential to move into a full-time role

Reporting to: Content Marketing Manager / Service Delivery Team

Company: Bristow & Hardy



About Bristow & Hardy



Bristow & Hardy is a specialist marketing agency for recruitment businesses. We help recruitment agencies attract more clients, strengthen their brand, and create better marketing systems across content,
, social, websites, assets, and campaigns.



We are looking for a reliable, detail-driven Content Executive based in the Philippines to support our growing client delivery team. This role will begin on a part-time basis, with the opportunity to become full-time as responsibilities expand.



The Role



This is a hands-on content production role. You will support the creation, editing, formatting, and quality-checking of marketing content for recruitment agency clients.



This is not a purely creative "blank page" role. We need someone who can take briefs, follow structure, adapt to different brand tones, produce clean first drafts, and reduce the amount of revision required internally.



You'll work across a mix of written and content-support tasks, helping the team produce high-quality deliverables efficiently and consistently.



Key Responsibilities



- Write and adapt content for different recruitment agency clients

- Produce first drafts for: LinkedIn posts, website copy, blogs, guides / lead magnets, brochures / PDFs,
 copy, landing page copy

- Repurpose long-form content into shorter pieces across channels

- Follow brand guidelines, messaging documents, and client tone of voice

- Carry out self-proofing and QA before submitting work

- Make amendments based on internal feedback

- Help format and polish documents so they are client-ready

- Support content research for client assets and campaigns

- Work from briefs, templates, examples, and internal processes

- Keep work organised and communicate clearly on progress, blockers, and deadlines



What Success Looks Like in This Role



- Content is submitted on time and in the right format

- First drafts require minimal rewriting

- Tone of voice is followed accurately across multiple clients

- Internal revision time comes down

- The wider team can trust the work to be accurate, clean, and usable

- You become a dependable part of the delivery engine and can take on more ownership over time



Who This Role Would Suit



This role would suit someone who is strong at structured writing and production, enjoys working from briefs, and takes pride in detail. It is ideal for someone who wants to grow into a larger content role over time, rather than someone who only wants high-level creative direction work.



Essential Skills and Experience



- Strong written English

- Experience writing marketing or business content

- Strong attention to detail

- Ability to follow a brief closely

- Ability to write in different tones of voice

- Comfortable receiving feedback and making revisions

- Strong organisation and time management

- Able to work independently and communicate clearly remotely



Preferred Experience



- Experience working with agencies or multiple brands

- Experience writing B2B content

- Experience in recruitment, staffing, or professional services marketing

- Familiarity with Canva, Google Docs, Google Sheets, ChatGPT, or similar tools

- Experience formatting lead magnets, guides, or sales enablement assets



Important Traits for This Role



- Reliable

- Proactive

- Detail-focused

- Fast learner

- Low ego, high standards

- Process-friendly

- Commercially aware



Working Arrangement



- Starts part-time

- Opportunity to grow into full-time based on performance, quality, and business need

- Remote role

- Some overlap with UK working hours preferred for communication and handovers



What We Want From the Right Person



We are not looking for someone who simply writes words. We are looking for someone who can make the content team more efficient by producing quality work, following process, and helping us maintain standards across multiple clients.



The right person will be someone we can trust with more responsibility over time.

Retention & Feedback

Clearly document cancellation reasons when customers leave



Share feedback and common issues with the team



? Requirements



Strong spoken and written English



Neutral accent (you will be calling U.S. customers)



Experience with:



SaaS support OR CRM tools



Intercom, Zendesk, or similar chat tools



Confident talking to non-technical customers



Reliable internet, headset, and quiet workspace

U.S.-based customers



Sales or retention experience



Ability to spot problems and suggest improvements



???? Growth Opportunity



This role starts part-time, but if you’re good:



You can move into a full-time Customer Success role



Take on more responsibility



Grow with a fast-moving startup



We care more about competence and attitude than fancy resumes.



???? How to Apply



Please include:

Your availability (nights + weekends)

Any experience with Intercom or customer calls



Applications without a voice recording will not be considered.

title: Social Media Growth Manager
description:
TO APPLY, please fill up the application form: 



We're looking for a social media creative strategist with systematic thinking who can turn scroll-stopping content into profitable
 & Instagram (Meta) ads. 



This role is for someone who understands what makes people stop, watch, and buy on social platforms—and can build a repeatable system to produce that content at scale.



You'll create content that doesn't look like ads but drives measurable results: ROAS, conversions, and profitable growth. You will work with our video editor and designer to create these content.



We Want Someone Who Can:

- Create thumb-stopping social content that sells (not traditional ads)

- Build systematic content production workflows

- Think in pipelines: ideation ? scripting ? production ? testing ? scaling

- Learn Meta ads strategy and apply creative thinking to performance marketing

- Analyse what works and turn wins into repeatable systems



You Will Manage:



- Content ideation and scripting

- Creator briefing and coordination

- Production workflows and quality control

- Creative testing frameworks

- Performance analysis (with our guidance on media buying)



Who This Role is NOT For:



- people who are not interested in numbers, testing and optimization

- people who only want to make aesthetic content without thinking of conversion

- people who never scripted or produced video content at scale



Who this role is for:



You'll thrive here if:



- You have taste. You know what content stops the scroll and makes people feel something.

- You understand persuasion. You can explain why a piece of content makes someone want to buy— even if you don't know the technical marketing terms yet.

- You think in systems. You naturally build workflows: 5 hooks × 3 angles × 2 formats = 30 test variations.

- You can script compelling stories. You've written 30+ video scripts that drove engagement.

- You let data sharpen your creative instincts. You are excited to learn how performance data can reveal which hooks work, which angles convert, and how to systematically improve your creative strategy.

- You're hungry to learn. You're excited to apply your content skills to performance marketing and eventually lead a team as we scale 60–80% year on year.



Responsibilities:



- Content Production System: Build a pipeline that delivers 5-10 weekly video creatives that feel native to social platforms but drive conversions.



- End-to-End Script Development: Write scroll-stopping scripts based on customer pain points, brand voice, and platform best practices. Develop creative briefs for execution.



- Creator Management: Coordinate creators in the US and Australia with precise briefs, manage timelines, ensure quality control, and build templates for consistent output.



- Systematic Testing Framework: Launch structured creative tests to test how the content convert - scale winners, kill losers fast.



- Performance Analysis: Monitor daily creative performance (we'll teach you the metrics), conduct weekly refreshes to combat fatigue, deliver monthly reports, and refine the system.



- Learn & Scale: Work closely with the CEO to learn Meta ads strategy, apply your creative thinking to media buying, and take increasing ownership of budget and ROAS targets over time.





What We're Looking For:



- 3+ years creating social content that drove measurable results (sales, leads, or high engagement)

- Portfolio of 30+ short-form videos you've scripted or produced

- Proven ability to build workflows and manage production pipelines

- Strong writing skills for scripts, hooks, and direct-response copy

- Willingness to learn performance marketing and data analysis

- Experience managing creators or production workflows (preferred but not required)





Details:

- Location: Remote (Philippines-based)

- Remuneration: 80,
,000 PHP/month (based on experience)

- Commitment: Full-time, Monday to Friday, 9.30am - 6.30pm (GMT+8)





Why Join Crafti?



- Work on Products That Sell Themselves: Our wellness and lifestyle products are genuinely exciting to market. You'll create content for products that improve people's lives, with authentic customer stories that make compelling material.





- Direct Impact & CEO Access: You'll report directly to the CEO with full ownership of our content-to-conversion system. Your creatives directly drive revenue—when you win, the company wins.





- Rapid Career Growth: We're scaling from 7 to 8 figures, and you'll grow with us. Strong performers can progress from Content Lead to Head of Growth within 12-18 months.





About Crafti



Crafti is a fast-growing Direct-to-Consumer health and wellness brand with sales in the USA and Singapore. We are headquartered in Singapore and operate remotely across 4 countries.



In the last 4 years, we've grown to 7 figures in annual revenue with 60–80% YoY growth. As we scale towards 8 figures, we're looking for driven individuals who want to learn, grow, and advance quickly alongside the company.

title: Appointment Setting Assistant (Outbound)
description:
Appointment Setting Assistant (Outbound)



Starlight Marketing is looking for a reliable and confident Appointment Setting Assistant (Outbound) to support our outreach efforts by scheduling qualified calls for the team.



In this role, your main responsibility is to connect with potential prospects, introduce our services using a provided script, and book appointments for interested individuals. You will not be closing sales — your focus is on starting conversations and securing scheduled meetings.



What your day will look like:

? Making outbound calls to assigned leads

? Following a structured script to introduce our services

? Answering basic questions and handling simple objections

? Booking qualified prospects into the calendar

? Logging call outcomes accurately in the tracking system

? Meeting daily or weekly booking targets



Availability Requirement:

? Must not have any current full-time employment

? Must be fully available during assigned working hours

? No overlapping remote jobs while working with the company



Technical Requirements:

? Must have your own laptop or desktop computer

? Minimum 8GB RAM

? Stable internet connection with at least 30 Mbps speed



Experience in appointment setting, telemarketing, or outbound calling is a plus but not required. Training and scripts will be provided for the right candidate who is coachable and motivated.



This is a remote, long-term opportunity with stable hours and performance-based growth potential as Starlight Marketing continues to grow.



If you’re confident on the phone, fully available, and motivated by booking appointments and hitting targets, we’d love to hear from you.

title: Video Editor (Short-Form TikTok Videos)
description:
Overview



We are looking for a skilled Video Editor to create engaging short-form content for TikTok Shop promotional videos. The role focuses on editing product-based videos that capture attention quickly and drive conversions.



Responsibilities



- Edit short-form video content using CapCut (preferred) or another professional video editing software.

- Cut, trim, and assemble raw footage into polished promotional videos.

- Add captions, transitions, effects, emojis, animations, and sound effects to enhance viewer engagement.

- Optimize videos for TikTok and similar platforms (vertical format, pacing, hooks).

- Organize and manage video assets for efficiency.



Requirements



- Strong communication skills and fast response times are absolutely required. If you cannot communicate reliably and respond quickly during working hours, you will not be hired.

- Must be available Monday through Friday AT LEAST a few hours a day

- Pay structure: Payouts will solely depend on the number of videos you edit and finish. A video can be approved, requested for changes, or denied. If a video is denied in the editing process and it does not meet the requirements, you will not be paid, so make sure you follow the requirements and understand the style of editing we use, which we will provide.

- Starting pay: $2 per video, with raises based on performance.

- Portfolio or examples of short-form video work required.



Nice to Have



- Familiarity with e-commerce or product-based video content.



Test Project



1. To be considered, applicants must complete a short test project:

2. You will receive a set of raw clips uploaded by us.

3. A reference video will be provided as an example.



Your task is to recreate a similar video in style, pacing, and structure.



Deliver the final edit in vertical format (9:16) optimized for TikTok, export in 1080x1920 60fps using HEVC / h.265  compression uploaded in Quicktime / .mov format



Submissions should use the same style of editing as videos in my

title: Tax Staff
description:
Tax Staff – Job Description

(Remote | U.S. Accounting Required)



Job Summary



The Tax Staff is responsible for preparing and reviewing business and personal tax returns while ensuring accurate reconciliation of tax data to the company’s financial statements. This role requires a high level of attention to detail, strong analytical skills, and the ability to work independently. The position plays a critical role in ensuring that tax filings accurately reflect the company’s financial records through thorough balance sheet analysis, account tie-outs, and reconciliation procedures.



This is not an entry-level role and requires demonstrated experience in tax preparation and financial statement analysis.



Key Responsibilities



Prepare and review corporate, partnership, and other business tax returns in compliance with federal and state regulations.



Perform detailed reconciliations between tax returns and financial statements to ensure accuracy and completeness.



Conduct comprehensive balance sheet analysis, demonstrating a deep understanding of how accounts impact tax reporting.



Tie out balance sheet and income statement accounts to external tax workpapers and supporting documentation.



Perform detailed retained earnings reconciliations, ensuring consistency between prior year filings, financial statements, and current year tax reporting.



Investigate and resolve discrepancies between general ledger accounts, financial statements, and tax workpapers.



Maintain well-organized tax workpapers that clearly support all reported tax positions.



Work independently to analyze financial data and identify potential tax issues or inconsistencies.



Collaborate with senior tax professionals when complex tax issues arise.



Ensure all tax documentation and filings meet strict accuracy and compliance standards.



Qualifications



Several years of tax preparation experience in public accounting or corporate tax environments.



Strong experience with financial statement analysis and balance sheet reconciliation.



Proven ability to work independently with minimal supervision.



Experience reconciling tax workpapers to audited or internal financial statements.



Required Skills and Competencies



Exceptional attention to detail and accuracy



Strong balance sheet and financial statement expertise



Advanced reconciliation and account tie-out skills



Ability to independently analyze financial data and resolve discrepancies



Strong organizational and documentation skills



Ability to manage multiple priorities and deadlines



Key Technical Expectations



This role requires the ability to:



Reconcile tax returns to financial statements with precision



Tie out general ledger accounts to tax workpapers and external schedules



Analyze and reconcile retained earnings accounts year-over-year



Ensure all balance sheet accounts are properly reflected in tax reporting

?

?

?

?

?

NGI Design Assistant

Additional Notes

?

title: Virtual Administrative Assistant  (NDIS & Allied Health – Australia)
description:
ABOUT US:



We are an Australian NDIS-registered allied health provider seeking a highly organised and detail-oriented Virtual Administrative Assistant to support the General Manager and clinical team. Due to the nature of our work, accuracy and attention to detail are extremely important.



ABOUT THE ROLE:



You will work directly with the General Manager to reduce administrative pressure and improve workflow systems.

This is not a phone-based role. It is a structured administrative and documentation-focused position requiring strong written English and high attention to detail.



This is a long-term opportunity within a growing healthcare practice. During the initial training period (typically the first few weeks), the role will start at approximately 20 hours per week before increasing to 40 hours per week once the candidate is comfortable with the systems and workflow. Availability should be aligned with Australian Eastern Standard Time (Sydney).



KEY RESPONSIBILITIES:



• Draft and manage professional
 communication with the clinical team, clients, Support Coordinators and other stakeholders

• Monitor inboxes daily, prioritise urgent matters, and escalate when required

• Draft documents using structured templates, such as Service Agreements and invoices

• Track incoming referrals and follow up on outstanding invoices 

• To confirm you have read this job description carefully, please include the phrase "Halaxy Admin" in the subject line of your application

• Confirm relevant information such as funding availability and NDIA endorsement prior to commencement of services

• Track participant funding utilisation, including plan start and end dates

• Create and maintain client profiles within Halaxy practice management software



Accuracy is critical — small errors in funding categories or plan dates can create compliance issues.



HOW TO APPLY:



Due to the high volume of applications, only candidates who follow the application instructions carefully will be considered. Please
 
 and include:



1. A short introduction about yourself

2. A summary of your administrative experience

3. Confirmation that you are comfortable with the rate of USD $5 per hour

4. Your internet speed

5. A screenshot of your workspace

6. A short writing sample drafting a professional
 confirming receipt of an NDIS referral

title: Sales Force Engineer/Developer
description:
Description



The Salesforce Engineer designs, builds, and supports scalable Salesforce solutions that enable business operations and strategic objectives. This role focuses on keeping the Salesforce platform reliable, efficient, and easy to use, while integrating with other enterprise systems as needed. Working closely with Product and Senior Management, the Salesforce Engineer translates requirements into well-designed solutions that improve user experience and deliver measurable business value.



Key Responsibilities



Design, build, and support Salesforce applications, components, and integrations.

Configure and customise Salesforce environments to ensure performance, scalability, and maintainability.

Design and manage data models to support reporting, analytics, and data integrity.

Manage configuration and release processes, including deployments, version control, and change tracking.

Investigate and resolve application issues to maintain system reliability and availability.

Collaborate with cross-functional teams to design, test, and integrate solutions within the wider enterprise architecture.

Develop and maintain automation and lifecycle processes for development, testing, and deployment.

Plan and execute testing strategies, including both automated and manual testing.

Document system designs and technical solutions in a clear and practical manner.

Continuously improve development practices, tools, and standards.

Share knowledge and mentor tea
mbers through documentation, training, and collaboration.

Design, develop, and maintain custom Salesforce solutions using:

Apex

Visualforce

Lightning Web Components (LWC)

Aura Components

Configure and customize Salesforce features:

Objects, fields, validation rules

Workflows, Process Builder, Flows, and automation

Build and maintain integrations with external systems using:

REST / SOAP APIs

Web services and middleware tools

 



Qualifications



Bachelor’s degree (any course).

Minimum 3 years of hands-on Salesforce development experience.

Strong, practical experience with:

Visualforce, Aura, and Lightning Web Components (LWC)

Apex Classes, Triggers, and Test Classes

Declarative tools (Flows, Process Builder, automation)

Proven experience integrating Salesforce with external APIs / REST / SOAP / 3rd-party systems.

Strong debugging and problem-solving skills (must be able to explain and defend technical decisions).

Experience working on enterprise-level Salesforce solutions.

Salesforce certification is a plus but hands-on technical ability is required.

Amenable to working in Makati under a remote setup.



Skills, Knowledge & Expertise



Essential



Proven experience in Salesforce engineering or development roles.

Strong hands-on experience with Salesforce configuration, customisation, and integrations.

Practical experience with Apex, Visualforce, Lightning Web Components (LWC), and Salesforce APIs (REST/SOAP/Bulk).

Solid understanding of Salesforce data architecture, data modelling, and data management principles.

Experience working with SDLC practices, including version control, CI/CD pipelines, and release management tools (e.g. Git, Jenkins, Copado, Gearset).

Ability to design, build, test, and deploy scalable Salesforce solutions using best practices.

Strong troubleshooting and performance optimisation skills.

Experience integrating Salesforce with other enterprise systems and platforms.

Familiarity with Agile and/or DevOps ways of working.

Strong problem-solving and analytical skills.

Clear communicator, comfortable working across technical and non-technical teams.

Desirable



Salesforce certifications (e.g. Platform Developer I/II, Administrator, Application Architect).

Experience with test automation tools such as Selenium, Provar, or similar.

Exposure to cloud infrastructure concepts (e.g. AWS, Azure) and modern design patterns.

Experience mentoring or supporting junior engineers or business users.



COMPANY



We are an innovative mortgage broking business based in Melbourne, Australia. Looking for someone to join our team, in a fun and dynamic team with employee beenfits program and growth and development opportunities.

title: Website & Branding Designer (Remote)
description:
If you're a talented website and branding designer who's passionate about creating stunning, conversion-focused designs using modern tools like Figma and AI-enhanced workflows, and you are based in the Philippines, this remote opportunity is perfect for you.



We are an Australian website & branding agency, Studio1 Design that creates world-class custom websites, branding, and marketing graphics for clients all over the world, using proven strategies and online marketing funnels to grow their businesses.



We're looking for a creative Website and Branding Designer who is excited to build a long-term career with us in the evolving world of AI-enhanced design.



Your Design Responsibilities:

- Design custom branding, logos, and marketing graphics

- Use AI tools to enhance your creative process and speed up design workflows



Your Responsibilities

- Create stunning, conversion-focused website designs for premium clients using Figma

- Design custom branding, logos, and marketing graphics that convert

- Understand how to design systems and component libraries in Figma

- Use AI tools to enhance your creative process and speed up workflows where appropriate

- Collaborate with our team of website designers to bring our client’s vision to life



Note: You won't handle coding/development - our talented dev team handles that phase.



Here's What Makes You Perfect for This Role:



Design Excellence

- Outstanding Portfolio: Exceptional website designs, branding, and logos that demonstrate conversion-focused thinking

- Figma Mastery: Advanced Figma skills with experience building design systems and component libraries

- UX/UI Expertise: Deep understanding of user experience and conversion-focused website design principles

- Efficiency & Quality: Ability to work at a reasonable pace, while maintaining premium creative standards

- Modern Tools: Experience with AI design tools (Midjourney, ChatGPT, Canva AI, to enhance workflows



Personal Qualities:

- Excellent design eye with close attention to detail

- Self-motivated to work productively from your own workspace

- Experience working remotely and collaborating with remote teams

- Excellent communication skills, including strong English writing

- Enthusiastic about both creating beautiful designs and helping Studio1 improve



Your Setup Requirements

- Fast and reliable PC or Mac with sufficient processing power

- Professional home office setup with good lighting for occasional video calls

- Stable internet connection for seamless collaboration



What's In It For You?



Work-Life Balance:

- Work from the comfort of your own home, full-time, Mon-Fri, 8 hours per day

- Flexible hours within business requirements

- Regular weekly income paid directly to your bank via WISE



Professional Growth:

- Work with a world-leading website design & branding agency on high-level client projects

- Be part of an established, innovative design team embracing AI technology

- Opportunity to develop your design skills with AI-enhanced designs

- Continuous learning opportunities in emerging design technologies



Team Culture:

- Join a positive, upbeat team that treats each other with respect and gratitude

- Collaborative environment that values creativity and innovation

- Recognition and rewards for exceptional performance



Application Process

- Cover letter explaining why you want to work with Studio1 and your experience with AI design tools

- Link to your design portfolio showcasing your best website designs, and your CV/resume

- Review our core values and company culture on our ‘About Page’: on 



Selection Process:



If we like your application and portfolio, we'll invite you to a Zoom video interview.



If you are a successful candidate will start with a fully paid 4-week trial. If successful, we offer you a permanent full-time position.



Ready to Join the Future of Design?



We're excited to meet talented designers who are ready to embrace AI while maintaining the highest standards of creative excellence!



Thank you & good luck!



Greg & The Studio1 Design Team

mber,

title: Consultative Sales Closer (Remote)
description:
We are seeking a confident, consultative Sales Closer who excels at guiding business owners through meaningful sales conversations and converting qualified prospects into long-term clients.



This role goes beyond traditional sales. You will act as a trusted advisor, leading consultative discussions, identifying business needs, presenting solutions, and confidently guiding prospects toward a decision.



The ideal candidate is someone who understands that great sales are built on trust, clarity, and leadership in the conversation. You should be comfortable speaking with business owners, running structured demo calls, addressing objections, and confidently moving conversations toward a close.



This is a performance-driven role where strong communicators and skilled closers can thrive by building relationships while driving results.



Key Responsibilities



• Conduct consultative sales calls and product/service demos with business owners

• Lead structured conversations to uncover client needs and opportunities

• Position solutions clearly and confidently based on client goals

• Handle objections professionally and guide prospects toward informed decisions

• Build strong rapport and credibility with decision makers

• Maintain control of the sales process from presentation through closing

• Follow up with prospects to finalize agreements and secure commitments

• Consistently meet or exceed sales performance targets



What We’re Looking For



• Fluent English with a neutral or clear accent

• Exceptional communication and conversational skills

• Confidence speaking with business owners and decision makers

• Ability to run client-facing demo calls and presentations

• Strong consultative sales approach and relationship-building skills

• Skilled at handling objections and guiding prospects toward decisions

• Comfortable working in a fast-paced, performance-driven environment

• Highly motivated, organized, and results-oriented

• A natural closer who enjoys achieving targets and driving revenue



Compensation



Starting at $10/hour + commission (depending on experience)

Commission for every successful signed client

Performance-based growth opportunities

High performers can significantly increase earnings through commissions





Benefits & Perks



Health Insurance – Medical Stipend Program

We provide a Medical Stipend Program to help you enroll in the health insurance plan of your choice.



- Up to 100,000 PHP per year toward your health insurance policy

- Eligible after 90 days of employment

- Choose coverage that fits your needs, location, and preferred providers

- You may include beneficiaries (spouse, children) as long as total premiums stay within the allowance

- Annual premium is divided into weekly payments and added to your paycheck

- If your chosen plan exceeds the allowance, you simply pay the difference



Internet Allowance



- PHP 1,500 per month



Rice Allowance



- 1,000 per month



Annual Bonus



- Equivalent to one month’s base pay

- Paid annually on your work anniversary



Paid Time Off (PTO)



- 1 week paid vacation leave

- 1 week paid family/sick leave

- Use-it-or-lose-it policy to encourage rest and family time



- Tuition Reimbursement



50,000 PHP annually for your education or a family member’s educational expenses

title: Amazon FBA Product Sourcing Specialist (Online Arbitrage – Keepa Required)
description:
I am looking for a disciplined and detail-oriented product researcher to help identify profitable Online Arbitrage products for my Amazon FBA business.



This role focuses on structured product analysis, stable listings, and replenishable products rather than high-volume lead generation. I will be providing child access to Sellar Central to help with the validation of ungated leads.



I value quality over quantity and prefer well-researched opportunities with strong long-term potential.



Compensation



• Base Pay: $250 USD per month

• Bonus: $2.50 USD for each product I purchase from your lead

•Potential for increase in pay after first 90 days

I pay via paypal



Work Expectations



• Submit 1–2 qualified product leads per weekday (Monday–Friday)

• Minimum 30 qualified leads per month

• At least 50% of submitted leads should have strong replenishment potential



Lead Submission Process



All leads must be submitted in a shared Google Sheet provided after hiring.



Each lead submission must include:



• Amazon ASIN

• Product source link

• SellerAmp screenshot

• Keepa chart screenshot

• Estimated ROI and profit calculation

• Current number of sellers on the listing



Lead Quality Guidelines



Leads submitted should generally meet the following criteria unless a clear opportunity exists outside these guidelines:



• Minimum 30 estimated monthly sales

• Preferred: fewer than 15 FBA sellers

• Higher seller counts may be acceptable if sales velocity clearly supports seller rotation

• Amazon should not be consistently dominating the Buy Box within the last 90 days

• Stable 90-day Buy Box pricing (no aggressive tanking or compression patterns)

• Minimum 25% realistic ROI

• Minimum $4 estimated net profit per unit preferred

• Avoid high-risk categories such as Hazmat, Meltable, or Oversized products unless margins clearly justify the risk



Requirements



• Active paid subscription to Keepa

• Active paid subscription to SellerAmp

• Prior experience researching products for Amazon FBA Online Arbitrage

• Strong understanding of Keepa charts and Buy Box behavior

• Ability to analyze seller competition and price stability



Trial Phase:

The first week will be a paid trial where I evaluate your ability to deliver.



Important

This role prioritizes structured sourcing and quality analysis. I prefer fewer high-quality leads over large quantities of low-quality submissions.  



Application Instructions

To confirm you have read the full job description, please start your application message with the word "Structure".



When applying, please include:



1. Confirmation that you have active paid subscriptions to both Keepa and SellerAmp

2. A brief description of your product research experience

3. In your own words, explain what you believe makes a strong Online Arbitrage lead and how your research process helps identify those opportunities.

4.Answers to the following two questions:



Question 1

Explain how you determine if a Buy Box price is stable using the Keepa chart.



Question 2

If a product has 12 FBA sellers and 40 estimated monthly sales, how would you determine if it is still a good opportunity?





All candidates will complete a short product analysis test before hiring.



Thanks for your interest in the role and I look forward to working with you!

title: Website Delivery Lead for WordPress & Elementor (Law-Firm SEO Agency)
description:
I am a former lawyer and now run a specialist law-firm SEO & website agency based in Sydney, Australia, and I’m looking for a long-term **Website Delivery Lead** to own our web projects end?to?end.



We build and rebuild websites for boutique law firms and regulated advisory practices. Our clients are serious, professional, and expect calm, authoritative websites – not loud e?commerce designs.



We already have a solid Elementor developer on the team. What we need now is a **leader for web delivery**: someone who can translate strategy and copy into page structures, manage implementation, and guide projects smoothly from kickoff to launch.



This is a long-term role for someone who wants to grow into a leadership position inside a small, specialist team – **not** a short-term side gig or “one of many clients.”



ABOUT THE ROLE ????



You will:

- Join key client calls (kickoff + selected feedback calls) with me.

- Turn strategy notes + copy into page structures, wireframes, and clear dev briefs.

- Manage and QA our existing Elementor developer (and any future devs):

          - Create tasks, Looms, and checklists

          - Review work against our standards

          - Ensure deadlines are met

- Implement changes yourself in Elementor when needed (especially fine?tuning and smaller builds).

- Apply our SEO & CRO best-practice checklists.

- Own website timelines from kickoff to launch (usually 6–8 weeks per build).



Over time, you become the person who “owns” website delivery so projects run smoothly and clients feel looked after.



SUPPORT & GROWTH ????

This is a **leadership track** role, and I don’t expect you to be perfect on day one.



You will get:

- **1:1 support fro
** (founder) – regular calls, private Looms, and direct feedback.

- Clear **templates, checklists, and examples** for how we structure law-firm sites.

- Coaching on:

          - How to run web projects with law-firm partners

          - How to handle client feedback and push back calmly when needed

          - How to brief developers clearly and review their work

If you are ambitious and want to grow into a true leadership role (owning a function, not just tasks), this is what we are building this role for.



REQUIREMENTS ?

Must have:

- 3+ years working with **WordPress + Elementor** on real client projects.

- Experience building sites for **professional services / B2B** (law, consulting, finance, SaaS, healthcare, agencies, etc.).

- Strong & clear **spoken and written English** – comfortable on Zoom with professional clients. Accent is fine; clarity and confidence matter.

- Solid project-management skills: can manage timelines, scopes, and feedback without drama.

- High attention to detail, especially on mobile layouts.



Nice to have (bonus, not required):

- Previous experience with **law firms** or other regulated / conservative industries.

- Basic understanding of on?page SEO (H1/H2 structure, internal linking, meta basics).



We will train you on our specific law-firm patterns, templates, and checklists.



HOURS, RATE, AND STRUCTURE ????

- Start as **part-time**: approx **20–25 hours per week** during trial.

- If we work well together and pipeline supports it, this can grow into **full-time**.

- Rate:  $16 AUD (Australian Dollars) per hour (or equivalent in your currency), depending on experience.

- Long-term, remote contractor role with stable work if performance is strong.



We’re looking for someone who wants **one main home** and stable, ongoing work – not 20 tiny clients.



WHO THIS ROLE IS A GOOD FIT FOR ????

This is for you if:

- You like the idea of **growing into a leadership role**, not just taking tickets.

- You want to **own outcomes** and be trusted to run projects.

- You are comfortable working with a **small, serious team** and a clear niche (law firms).

- You may not feel 100% ready on client calls yet, but you **want to get there** with support and coaching.



This is NOT for you if:

- You want maximum variety and dozens of short projects.

- You dislike client interaction and have no interest in improving that.

- You are mainly an agency trying to plug in a team, not an individual contributor.



HOW WE’LL START (PAID TEST) ????

1. You apply with answers to the screening questions below.

2. If shortlisted, I’ll give you:

          - A **small paid test**: rebuild a law?firm hero + 1–2 sections in Elementor from my copy and notes.

          - A short **Loom explainer** task about a law-firm page I send you.

3. If that goes well, we start an **8-week part-time trial** on real client work with close support fro
.

4. If we’re both happy, we extend long?term and increase your hours.



HOW TO APPLY (SCREENING QUESTIONS) ????

Question 1: In the next 2–3 years, what do you want your work situation to look like: (a) many different short freelance projects, or (b) one primary long?term role where you become part of a single company’s team? Please explain your answer honestly.

Question 2: Share links to 2–3 professional services/B2B client websites you built or led (e.g. law, consulting, finance). Record a 3–5 minute Loom (screen+voice+camera) on 1 site: what the site is for, what you personally did, key decisions/trade-offs.

Question 3: Share 3–5 minute Loom (screen+voice+camera) reviewing ANY law?firm or professional?services site (not yours). : Explain what is working well, what you would change for clarity & conversion & how you would brief a developer to implement those changes.

Question 4: We are based in Sydney (AEST) & most clients are in Australia. What working hours (local time) can you do that give 3–4 hrs overlap with 9am–5pm AEST, Mon–Fri? How many hrs/week can you commit now, & could you go full?time if the fit is right?

Question 5: This role is budgeted at up to 16 AUD/hour (or equivalent). There may be increases over time based on performance & company results. Are you comfortable with this? Answer YES or NO & add any context.



If this sounds like the kind of role and growth path you want, I’d love to hear from you.

title: VIRTUAL ASSISTANT // GO HIGH LEVEL SPECIALISTS // CUSTOMER SERVICE
description:
Job Title: Go High Level Specialist / Client Relations Coordinator

Company Overview

We are a growing construction company based in Canada, dedicated to delivering high-quality projects and building strong relationships with clients and partners. We are seeking a motivated individual for a long-term role to support our expansion and enhance our client engagement strategies.

Job Summary

We are looking for a dedicated and enthusiastic candidate to join our team in a full-time, long-term position. The ideal applicant will be a specialist in using and managing the Go High Level (GHL) platform, with strong customer service skills and experience in lead generation and social media campaigns. This role focuses on client relations, inbound lead management, and supporting marketing initiatives. You will work Monday through Friday, collaborating with our design team and other specialists to drive growth.

Key Responsibilities



Provide exceptional customer service by answering inbound calls,
s, and leads promptly and professionally.

Manage lead generation efforts, including nurturing inbound leads and converting them into opportunities.

Oversee and optimize the Go High Level platform for CRM, automation, and workflow management.

Launch and manage Meta social media campaigns, including content scheduling, performance tracking, and optimization (training available if needed, with support from our existing teams).

Develop and execute
 campaigns targeted at collaborators such as realtors, mortgage firms, and other industry partners.

Handle client relations, ensuring high satisfaction and building long-term partnerships.

Collaborate with internal teams, including designers and Google Ads specialists, to align marketing efforts.



Note: We have an established Google Ads team in place. While proficiency in Meta ads is preferred and will be prioritized in candidate selection, we offer training and team support for those with strong skills in other areas.

Requirements



Proven experience as a Go High Level specialist, including platform setup, automation, and management.

Strong customer service skills with a focus on inbound leads and client interactions.

Expertise in lead generation strategies.

Experience running Meta social media campaigns (preferred; training available if not fully proficient).

Excellent communication skills, both written and verbal.

Ability to work independently and collaboratively in a fast-paced environment.

Availability for a full-time schedule, Monday to Friday.

Based in or willing to work in Canada (remote options may be considered).



Preferred Qualifications



Background in construction, real estate, or related industries.

Familiarity with
 marketing tools and CRM systems beyond GHL.

Analytical mindset for tracking campaign performance and ROI.



If you are a motivated professional eager to contribute to a growing company and excel in client-focused marketing, we encourage you to apply. Priority will be given to candidates with comprehensive experience in all listed areas.
